mapper.select: SELECT 1 FROM SID.IDO_A_UUE_INSN_CALENDAR WHERE ENTY_ID = 1 AND HDAY_YN = 'N' -- 해당일이 휴일이 아닌 영업일인 경우 AND TAGT_DATE = #{yyyymmdd}

SELECT '1' AS EXC -- 전영업일의 거래내역 데이터가 들어왔는지 확인 FROM SID.IDO_A_MBA_TRDG A , SID.IDO_A_UUE_INSN_CALENDAR B WHERE A.TRDG_DATE = B.PREV_BSNS_DATE AND B.ENTY_ID = 1 AND B.TAGT_DATE = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AND ROWNUM = 1
mapper.insert: ALTER SESSION ENABLE PARALLEL DML
ALTER SESSION DISABLE PARALLEL DML

INSERT /*+ APPEND */ INTO SSQ.NIC01B SELECT /*+ FULL(T) PARALLEL(T 8) */ T.RNMCNO , T.CS_NO , T.RNM_CNFR_CCD , T.CS_ST_CD , T.CS_RGST_DT , T.CS_MDFY_DT , T.CS_DLT_DT -- , T.CS_NM , CASE WHEN T.CS_NM = '폐쇄이관고객' THEN CASE WHEN T.CS_NM_CDD = '폐쇄이관고객' THEN NVL(T.CS_NM_ORIGIN, T.CS_NM) ELSE T.CS_NM END ELSE T.CS_NM END AS CS_NM , T.CORP_RGST_NO , T.ENG_CS_NM , T.NTN_CD , T.RSDNC_F , T.RSDNC_PLC_NTN_CD , T.INDV_CORP_CCD , T.INDST_RSK_DVD_CD , T.AML_JOB_GUBN , T.LG_AMT_ASTS_F , T.EMAIL_ID , T.EMAIL_HOST_NAME , T.TL_ASTS_AMT , T.NPRFT_GROUP_F , T.CS_EXCTN_BRN_CD , T.CS_MANAG_BRN_CD , T.CS_TYP_CD , T.INTERVIEW_CCD , T.NTV_FGNR_CCD , T.DL_CHNNL_CD , T.HNDL_DY_TM , T.L_HNDL_P_ENO , T.AML_CRT_DT , T.AML_HNDL_P_ENO , T.PEP_YN , T.BRTDY , CASE WHEN T.NDVL_INSN_TYPE_CODE = 'IN' AND T.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE <> '3' /* 개인고객만 직업코드를 분류 */ THEN CASE T.AML_JOB_GUBN WHEN '110' THEN '01' /* 일반기업체 -> 직장인 */ WHEN '120' THEN '01' /* 공무원 -> 직장인 */ WHEN '130' THEN '01' /* 교육계 -> 직장인 */ WHEN '140' THEN '01' /* 금융계 -> 직장인 */ WHEN '150' THEN '01' /* 언론계 -> 직장인 */ WHEN '160' THEN '01' /* 공기업 -> 직장인 */ WHEN '170' THEN '01' /* 전문직 -> 직장인 */ WHEN '190' THEN '01' /* 기타 -> 직장인 */ WHEN '210' THEN '02' /* 제조업 -> 개인사업자 */ WHEN '220' THEN '02' /* 도소매업 -> 개인사업자 */ WHEN '230' THEN '02' /* 건설업 -> 개인사업자 */ WHEN '240' THEN '02' /* 숙박및음식업 -> 개인사업자 */ WHEN '250' THEN '02' /* 부동산 -> 개인사업자 */ WHEN '260' THEN '02' /* 사행성사업 -> 개인사업자 */ WHEN '270' THEN '02' /* 예술품판매업 -> 개인사업자 */ WHEN '280' THEN '02' /* 귀금속판매업 -> 개인사업자 */ WHEN '290' THEN '02' /* 기타 -> 개인사업자 */ WHEN '310' THEN '02' /* 변호사 -> 개인사업자 */ WHEN '320' THEN '02' /* 의사 -> 개인사업자 */ WHEN '330' THEN '02' /* 공인회계사 -> 개인사업자 */ WHEN '340' THEN '02' /* 세무사 -> 개인사업자 */ WHEN '350' THEN '02' /* 법무사 -> 개인사업자 */ WHEN '360' THEN '02' /* 관세사 -> 개인사업자 */ WHEN '390' THEN '02' /* 기타 -> 개인사업자 */ WHEN '410' THEN '01' /* 환전업 -> 직장인 */ WHEN '420' THEN '01' /* 전당포 -> 직장인 */ WHEN '430' THEN '01' /* 대부업 -> 직장인 */ WHEN '440' THEN '01' /* 투자자문업 -> 직장인 */ WHEN '450' THEN '01' /* 가상통화취급업 -> 직장인 */ WHEN '490' THEN '01' /* 기타금융업-기타 -> 직장인 */ WHEN '910' THEN '03' /* 정년퇴직자 -> 무직 */ WHEN '920' THEN '03' /* 주부 -> 무직 */ WHEN '930' THEN '03' /* 학생 -> 무직 */ WHEN '940' THEN '03' /* 정치인 -> 무직 */ WHEN '950' THEN '03' /* 무직 -> 무직 */ WHEN '990' THEN '03' /* 기타 -> 무직 */ WHEN '000' THEN '99' /* 미제공 -> 파악할 수 없음 */ ELSE '99' /* 파악할 수 없음 */ END ELSE ' ' END AS STR_JOB_GUBN /* STR직업구분코드 */ /* 2019.01.22 KHS : 매핑 변경 */ , T.CDD_NTN_CD , T.OFSF_YN , CASE WHEN T.NDVL_INSN_TYPE_CODE = 'IN' AND T1.RISK_DTLS_CODE IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' -- 20210828 고위험직업/업종은 C.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE 비영리법인 무시해도 될듯 WHEN T.NDVL_INSN_TYPE_CODE <> 'IN' AND T2.RISK_DTLS_CODE IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS HR_JOB_YN /* 36 고위험직업업종여부 */ FROM ( SELECT TO_CHAR(X.ENTY_ID) AS RNMCNO /* 1 고객엔티티ID */ , TRIM(X.ENTY_ALIS_CRYP) AS CS_NO /* 2 실명확인번호암호문 */ /*, CASE B.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE WHEN 'BRGN' THEN '03' WHEN 'CRGN' THEN '05' WHEN 'DIRN' THEN '99' WHEN 'FICN' THEN '12' WHEN 'FRIN' THEN '08' WHEN 'FRRN' THEN '07' WHEN 'FSSN' THEN '99' WHEN 'PSPT' THEN '04' WHEN 'SSCN' THEN '01' WHEN 'TXID' THEN '09' ELSE '99' END */ , NVL((SELECT TRNSFRM_CD FROM SSQ.NIC95B WHERE CD = 'L200' AND CD_VL9 = B.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE ), '99') AS RNM_CNFR_CCD /* 3 실명확인구분코드 */ , X.CS_ST_CD AS CS_ST_CD /* 4 고객상태코드 */ , D.PRCE_DATE AS CS_RGST_DT /* 5 고객등록일자 */ , A.IFMN_RGSN_DATE AS CS_MDFY_DT /* 6 고객수정일자 */ , NULL AS CS_DLT_DT /* 7 고객삭제일자 */ , CASE WHEN TRIM(C.CDD_FLFL_DATE) IS NOT NULL THEN CASE WHEN Z7.CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_DATE IS NOT NULL THEN CASE WHEN TO_DATE(TRIM(C.CDD_FLFL_DATE),'YYYYMMDD') >= TO_DATE(Z7.CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_DATE,'YYYYMMDD') THEN NVL(TRIM(C.TAGT_CLNT_NAME),TRIM(TO_SINGLE_BYTE(X.ENTY_NAME))) ELSE NVL(TRIM(TO_SINGLE_BYTE(X.ENTY_NAME)),TRIM(C.TAGT_CLNT_NAME)) END ELSE CASE WHEN TO_DATE(TRIM(C.CDD_FLFL_DATE),'YYYYMMDD') >= TO_DATE(NVL(TRIM(X.RESN_DATE1),X.PRCE_DATE),'YYYYMMDD') THEN NVL(TRIM(C.TAGT_CLNT_NAME),TRIM(TO_SINGLE_BYTE(X.ENTY_NAME))) ELSE NVL(TRIM(TO_SINGLE_BYTE(X.ENTY_NAME)),TRIM(C.TAGT_CLNT_NAME)) END END ELSE TRIM(TO_SINGLE_BYTE(X.ENTY_NAME)) END AS CS_NM /* 8 고객명 : 20201109 2BYTE SPACE 제거 */ , TRIM(C.TAGT_CLNT_NAME) AS CS_NM_CDD , TRIM(X.ENTY_NAME) AS CS_NM_ORIGIN , B1.ENTY_ALIS_CRYP AS CORP_RGST_NO /* 9 법인등록번호암호문 */ , CASE WHEN TRIM(C.CDD_FLFL_DATE) IS NOT NULL THEN CASE WHEN Z8.CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_DATE IS NOT NULL THEN CASE WHEN TO_DATE(TRIM(C.CDD_FLFL_DATE),'YYYYMMDD') >= TO_DATE(Z8.CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_DATE,'YYYYMMDD') THEN NVL(TRIM(C.TAGT_ENNM),TRIM(X.ENTY_ENNM)) ELSE NVL(TRIM(X.ENTY_ENNM),TRIM(C.TAGT_ENNM)) END ELSE CASE WHEN TO_DATE(TRIM(C.CDD_FLFL_DATE),'YYYYMMDD') >= TO_DATE(NVL(TRIM(X.RESN_DATE1),X.PRCE_DATE),'YYYYMMDD') THEN NVL(TRIM(C.TAGT_ENNM),TRIM(X.ENTY_ENNM)) ELSE NVL(TRIM(X.ENTY_ENNM),TRIM(C.TAGT_ENNM)) END END ELSE TRIM(X.ENTY_ENNM) END AS ENG_CS_NM /* 10 영문고객명 */ , Z1.CNTY_CODE AS NTN_CD /* 11 국가코드 */ , CASE WHEN Z2.CNTY_CODE = 'KR' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RSDNC_F /* 12 거주여부 */ , Z2.CNTY_CODE AS RSDNC_PLC_NTN_CD /* 13 거주지국가코드 */
--, CASE WHEN S1.NDVL_INSN_TYPE_CODE = 'IN' AND C.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE <> '3' THEN '1' /* 개인 */ -- ELSE '2' /* 법인 */ -- END AS INDV_CORP_CCD /* 14 개인법인구분코드 */ /* 20211022 수정 */ , CASE WHEN S1.NDVL_INSN_TYPE_CODE <> 'IN' -- 고객정보 : 개인이 아니거나 OR (S1.NDVL_INSN_TYPE_CODE = 'IN' AND C.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE = '3') -- 고객정보 : 개인 & CDD : 비영리법인 ===> 법인으로 마이그 THEN '2' ELSE '1' END AS INDV_CORP_CCD /* 14 개인법인구분코드 */
/* 2019.1.12 안창우 : 가상통화취급 업소는 99999로 강제 적용 */ , CASE WHEN Z4.BIT_COIN_YN IS NOT NULL THEN '66199' WHEN S1.NDVL_INSN_TYPE_CODE = 'IN' AND C.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE <> '3' THEN '' /* 개인고객은 산업위험분류안함 */ ELSE CASE WHEN C.STND_INDY_CLSN_CODE = '99995' THEN '64201' WHEN C.STND_INDY_CLSN_CODE = '99996' THEN '91249' WHEN C.STND_INDY_CLSN_CODE = '99997' THEN '66199' WHEN C.STND_INDY_CLSN_CODE = '99998' THEN '64919' WHEN C.STND_INDY_CLSN_CODE = '99999' THEN '66199' WHEN C.STND_INDY_CLSN_CODE = 'ZZZZZ' THEN '94990' ELSE TRIM(C.STND_INDY_CLSN_CODE) END /* 법인은 산업위험분류함 */ END AS INDST_RSK_DVD_CD /* 15 산업위험분류코드 */ , CASE WHEN S1.NDVL_INSN_TYPE_CODE = 'IN' AND C.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE <> '3' THEN CASE WHEN TRIM(C.CDD_FLFL_DATE) IS NOT NULL THEN CASE WHEN Z6.CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_DATE IS NOT NULL THEN CASE WHEN TO_DATE(TRIM(C.CDD_FLFL_DATE),'YYYYMMDD') >= TO_DATE(Z6.CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_DATE,'YYYYMMDD') THEN NVL(TRIM(C.JOB_CODE),TRIM(A4.JOB_CODE)) ELSE NVL(TRIM(A4.JOB_CODE),TRIM(C.JOB_CODE)) END ELSE CASE WHEN TO_DATE(TRIM(C.CDD_FLFL_DATE),'YYYYMMDD') >= TO_DATE(NVL(TRIM(X.RESN_DATE1),X.PRCE_DATE),'YYYYMMDD') THEN NVL(TRIM(C.JOB_CODE),TRIM(A4.JOB_CODE)) ELSE NVL(TRIM(A4.JOB_CODE),TRIM(C.JOB_CODE)) END END ELSE TRIM(A4.JOB_CODE) END ELSE ' ' END AS AML_JOB_GUBN /* 16 AML직업구분코드 */ , CASE WHEN ZZ.ASST_VLTN_ACML_AMNT >= 1000000000 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS LG_AMT_ASTS_F /* 17 고액자산여부 */ , CASE WHEN TRIM(C.CDD_FLFL_DATE) IS NOT NULL THEN CASE WHEN Z5.CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_DATE IS NOT NULL THEN CASE WHEN TO_DATE(TRIM(C.CDD_FLFL_DATE),'YYYYMMDD') >= TO_DATE(Z5.CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_DATE,'YYYYMMDD') AND TRIM(C1.EMAL_ID_CRYP) IS NOT NULL THEN TRIM(C1.EMAL_ID_CRYP) ELSE TRIM(X.EMAL_ID_CRYP) END ELSE CASE WHEN TO_DATE(TRIM(C.CDD_FLFL_DATE),'YYYYMMDD') >= TO_DATE(NVL(TRIM(X.RESN_DATE1),X.PRCE_DATE),'YYYYMMDD') AND TRIM(C1.EMAL_ID_CRYP) IS NOT NULL THEN TRIM(C1.EMAL_ID_CRYP) ELSE TRIM(X.EMAL_ID_CRYP) END END ELSE TRIM(X.EMAL_ID_CRYP) END AS EMAIL_ID /* 18 이메일ID */ , CASE WHEN TRIM(C.CDD_FLFL_DATE) IS NOT NULL THEN CASE WHEN Z5.CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_DATE IS NOT NULL THEN CASE WHEN TO_DATE(TRIM(C.CDD_FLFL_DATE),'YYYYMMDD') >= TO_DATE(Z5.CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_DATE,'YYYYMMDD') AND TRIM(C1.EMAL_HOST_NAME_CRYP) IS NOT NULL THEN TRIM(C1.EMAL_HOST_NAME_CRYP) ELSE TRIM(X.EMAL_HOST_NAME_CRYP) END ELSE CASE WHEN TO_DATE(TRIM(C.CDD_FLFL_DATE),'YYYYMMDD') >= TO_DATE(NVL(TRIM(X.RESN_DATE1),X.PRCE_DATE),'YYYYMMDD') AND TRIM(C1.EMAL_HOST_NAME_CRYP) IS NOT NULL THEN TRIM(C1.EMAL_HOST_NAME_CRYP) ELSE TRIM(X.EMAL_HOST_NAME_CRYP) END END ELSE TRIM(X.EMAL_HOST_NAME_CRYP) END AS EMAIL_HOST_NAME /* 19 이메일호스트명 */ , NVL(Z.MM_AMNT,0) AS TL_ASTS_AMT /* 20 총자산금액 */ , CASE WHEN C.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE = '3' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS NPRFT_GROUP_F /* 21 비영리단체여부 */ , D1.DTBR_CODE AS CS_EXCTN_BRN_CD /* 22 개설지점코드 */ , E.DTBR_CODE AS CS_MANAG_BRN_CD /* 23 관리지점코드 */ , CASE C.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE WHEN '1' THEN CASE WHEN M1.ACNT_OWNR_ID IS NOT NULL THEN '02' /* 개인이면서 개인사업자용계좌가있을경우 -> 개인사업자 */ ELSE '01' /* 개인이면서 개인사업자용계좌가없을경우 -> 개인 */ END WHEN '2' THEN '03' /* 영리법인 -> 법인 */ WHEN '3' THEN '04' /* 비영리법인 -> 비영리법인 */ ELSE '*' END AS CS_TYP_CD /* 24 고객유형코드 */ , ' ' AS INTERVIEW_CCD /* 25 대면비대면구분코드 */ , CASE Z1.CNTY_CODE WHEN 'KR' THEN 'A' WHEN NULL THEN '*' ELSE 'B' END AS NTV_FGNR_CCD /* 26 내외국인구분코드 */ , CASE SUBSTR(D.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE,1,1) WHEN 'A' THEN 'C01' WHEN 'B' THEN 'C02' WHEN 'C' THEN 'C03' WHEN 'D' THEN 'C04' WHEN 'E' THEN 'C05' WHEN 'F' THEN 'C06' WHEN 'G' THEN 'C07' WHEN 'H' THEN 'C08' WHEN 'I' THEN 'C09' WHEN 'J' THEN 'C10' WHEN 'K' THEN 'C11' END AS DL_CHNNL_CD /* 27 가입채널코드 */ , D.PRCE_DATE_TIME AS HNDL_DY_TM /* 28 처리일시 */ , D.PCPR_ID AS L_HNDL_P_ENO /* 29 처리자사번 */ , SYSDATE AS AML_CRT_DT /* 30 AML생성일자 */ , 'BATCH' AS AML_HNDL_P_ENO /* 31 AML처리자사번 */ , C.PEP_YN AS PEP_YN /* 32 정치적주요인물여부 */ , CASE WHEN S1.NDVL_INSN_TYPE_CODE = 'IN' AND C.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE <> '3' THEN CASE WHEN SUBSTR(A.RSDN_RGSN_BRDT,1,4) <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYY') AND SUBSTR(A.RSDN_RGSN_BRDT,5,2) BETWEEN '01' AND '12' AND SUBSTR(A.RSDN_RGSN_BRDT,7,2) BETWEEN '01' AND '31' THEN A.RSDN_RGSN_BRDT ELSE CASE WHEN SUBSTR(C.BRDT,1,4) <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYY') AND SUBSTR(C.BRDT,5,2) BETWEEN '01' AND '12' AND SUBSTR(C.BRDT,7,2) BETWEEN '01' AND '31' THEN C.BRDT ELSE CASE WHEN SUBSTR(I.BRDT,1,4) <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYY') AND SUBSTR(I.BRDT,5,2) BETWEEN '01' AND '12' AND SUBSTR(I.BRDT,7,2) BETWEEN '01' AND '31' THEN I.BRDT ELSE '' END END END ELSE ' ' END AS BRTDY /* 33 생년월일 */ , Z3.CNTY_CODE AS CDD_NTN_CD /* 34 CDD국가코드 */ , NVL(TRIM(A4.OFSF_YN),'N') AS OFSF_YN /* 35 임직원여부 */ , S1.NDVL_INSN_TYPE_CODE , C.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE FROM ( SELECT X.ENTY_ID , X.RGSN_DATE AS RESN_DATE1 , TO_CHAR(X.PRCE_DATE_TIME,'YYYYMMDD') AS PRCE_DATE , CASE WHEN X1.BYBS_CLNT_CLSN_TYPE_CODE = 'CL' THEN X5.ENTY_ALIS_CRYP /* 폐쇄이관고객은 폐쇄이관1단계의 주민번호 */ ELSE X4.ENTY_ALIS_CRYP /* 폐쇄이관아니면 고객정보의 주민번호 */ END AS ENTY_ALIS_CRYP , CASE WHEN X1.BYBS_CLNT_CLSN_TYPE_CODE = 'CL' AND X4.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE = X5.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE THEN X5.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE ELSE X4.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE END AS ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE , CASE WHEN X1.BYBS_CLNT_CLSN_TYPE_CODE = 'CL' THEN X3.ENTY_NAME /* 폐쇄이관고객은 폐쇄이관1단계의 이름 */ ELSE X.ENTY_NAME /* 폐쇄이관아니면 고객정보의 이름 */ END AS ENTY_NAME , CASE WHEN X1.BYBS_CLNT_CLSN_TYPE_CODE = 'CL' THEN X3.ENTY_ENNM ELSE X.ENTY_ENNM END AS ENTY_ENNM , CASE WHEN X1.BYBS_CLNT_CLSN_TYPE_CODE = 'CL' THEN X71.EMAL_ID_CRYP /* 폐쇄이관고객은 폐쇄이관1단계의 EMAIL ID */ ELSE X61.EMAL_ID_CRYP /* 폐쇄이관아니면 고객정보의 EMAIL ID */ END AS EMAL_ID_CRYP , CASE WHEN X1.BYBS_CLNT_CLSN_TYPE_CODE = 'CL' THEN X71.EMAL_HOST_NAME_CRYP /* 폐쇄이관고객은 폐쇄이관1단계의 EMAIL호스트명 */ ELSE X61.EMAL_HOST_NAME_CRYP /* 폐쇄이관아니면 고객정보의 EMAIL호스트명 */ END AS EMAL_HOST_NAME_CRYP , CASE WHEN X1.BYBS_CLNT_CLSN_TYPE_CODE = 'CL' THEN '1' /* 폐쇄이관고객은 삭제고객 */ ELSE '0' /* 폐쇄이관아니면 정상고객 */ END AS CS_ST_CD , X3.RGSN_DATE /* 폐쇄이관등록일자 */ FROM SID.IDO_A_UUE_LEGAL_ENTY X /* IDO_A_Entity_LegalEntity */ LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_BYBS_CLNT_CLSN X1 /* 폐쇄이관 관련정보 */ ON X.ENTY_ID = X1.ENTY_ID AND X1.VLD_YN = 'Y' AND X1.BYBS_CLNT_CLSN_TYPE_CODE = 'CL' LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_BYBS_CLNT_CLSN X2 /* 폐쇄이관 관련정보 */ ON X.ENTY_ID = X2.ENTY_ID AND X2.VLD_YN = 'Y' AND X2.BYBS_CLNT_CLSN_TYPE_CODE = 'MV' LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_LEGAL_ENTY_K X3 /* 고객 폐쇄이관1단계 */ ON X.ENTY_ID = X3.ENTY_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_CLIENT_ENTY_ALIAS X4 /* 주민번호정보 */ ON X.ENTY_ID = X4.ENTY_ID AND X4.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE != 'CRGN' LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_CLNT_ENTY_ALIAS_K X5 /* 주민번호 폐쇄이관 1단계 */ ON X.ENTY_ID = X5.ENTY_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_ENTY_CONTACT X6 /* 연락처정보 */ ON X.ENTY_ID = X6.ENTY_ID AND X6.CNTT_ADDR_BSWR_TYPE_CODE = 'CLNT' /* 연락처업무유형코드('CLNT':고객) */ AND X6.CNTT_ADDR_TYPE_CODE = 'EML' /* 연락처유형코드('EML':E메일) */ LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_EMAIL_ADDRESS X61 ON X6.CNTT_ADDR_ID = X61.CNTT_ADDR_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_ENTY_CONTACT_K X7 /* 연락처정보 폐쇄이관 1단계 */ ON X.ENTY_ID = X7.ENTY_ID AND X7.CNTT_ADDR_BSWR_TYPE_CODE = 'CLNT' /* 연락처업무유형코드('CLNT':고객) */ AND X7.CNTT_ADDR_TYPE_CODE = 'EML' /* 연락처유형코드('EML':E메일) */ LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_EMAIL_ADDRESS X71 ON X7.CNTT_ADDR_ID = X71.CNTT_ADDR_ID WHERE NVL(X2.BYBS_CLNT_CLSN_TYPE_CODE,' ') != 'MV' -- 폐쇄이관 2단계고객은 제외 ) X , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_ADDN_IFMN A /* IDO_A_고객정보_고객부가정보기본 */ , SID.IDO_A_UUF_CLNT_BSC S1 /* NDVL_INSN_TYPE_CODE */ , SID.IDO_A_UUF_BZPR_BSC S2 /* NTNY_ID, RSDT_CNTY_ID */ , SID.IDO_A_UUF_CLNT_ADDN_IFMN A4 /* IDO_A_고객_고객부가정보 - JOB_CODE용 */ , ( SELECT C.ENTY_ID /* 고객엔티티ID */ , A.STND_INDY_CLSN_CODE /* 표준산업분류코드 */ , B.DSCN_CTNT FROM SID.IDO_A_UUE_INDY_CLSN A /* IDO_A_Entity_IndustryClassification */ , SID.IDO_A_UUE_INDY_CLASS_DESC B /* IDO_A_Entity_IndustryClassificationDescription */ , SID.IDO_A_UUE_INST_INDY_CLASS C /* IDO_A_Entity_InstitutionIndustryClassification */ WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.INDY_CLSN_ID = B.INDY_CLSN_ID AND A.INDY_CLSN_ID = C.INDY_CLSN_ID ) A1 , ( SELECT CNTNT FROM SSQ.NIC92B WHERE CD LIKE 'S008' AND GRP_CD = 'EDDT' ) A2 , ( SELECT CNTNT FROM SSQ.NIC92B WHERE CD LIKE 'S009' AND GRP_CD = 'EDDT' ) A3 , SID.IDO_A_UUE_CLIENT_ENTY_ALIAS B /* IDO_A_Entity_ClientEntityAlias */ , SID.IDO_A_UUE_CLIENT_ENTY_ALIAS B1 /* IDO_A_Entity_ClientEntityAlias */ , SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD C /* CDD수행내역 */ , ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT /*+ FULL(A) PARALLEL(A 4) */ A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , A.CNTT_ADDR_ID , B.EMAL_ID_CRYP , B.EMAL_HOST_NAME_CRYP , ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID ORDER BY A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID, A.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_TAGT_CODE, A.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_SECT_CODE, A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO DESC) AS CNT FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_CNTT_ADDR_CH A , SID.IDO_A_UUE_EMAIL_ADDRESS B WHERE A.CNTT_ADDR_ID = B.CNTT_ADDR_ID(+) AND A.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_SECT_CODE(+) = 'EML' ) WHERE CNT = 1 AND EMAL_ID_CRYP IS NOT NULL ) C1 , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_RGSN_DTLS D /* IDO_A_고객정보_고객등록상세 */ , SID.IDO_A_UUE_SAMSUNG_DPRT D1 /* 개설지점코드추출용 */ , ( SELECT ACNT_OWNR_ID , DTBR_CODE FROM ( SELECT M.ACNT_OWNR_ID , M.ACNT_ID , M.MNGG_BRNH_ENTY_ENTY_ID , M1.DTBR_CODE , ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY M.ACNT_OWNR_ID ORDER BY M.OPNG_DATE DESC) AS RNK FROM SID.IDO_A_UUA_ACNT M , SID.IDO_A_UUE_SAMSUNG_DPRT M1 /* 관리지점코드 추출용 */ WHERE M.MNGG_BRNH_ENTY_ENTY_ID = M1.ENTY_ID(+) ) WHERE RNK = 1 ) E /* 고객별관리점 마지막 개설계좌의 관리점을 고객관리점으로 적용 */ , ( SELECT C.ENTY_ID /* 고객엔티티ID */ , A.STND_INDY_CLSN_CODE /* 표준산업분류코드 */ , B.DSCN_CTNT FROM SID.IDO_A_UUE_INDY_CLSN A /* IDO_A_Entity_IndustryClassification */ , SID.IDO_A_UUE_INDY_CLASS_DESC B /* IDO_A_Entity_IndustryClassificationDescription */ , SID.IDO_A_UUE_INST_INDY_CLASS C /* IDO_A_Entity_InstitutionIndustryClassification */ WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.INDY_CLSN_ID = B.INDY_CLSN_ID AND A.INDY_CLSN_ID = C.INDY_CLSN_ID ) F , ( SELECT DISTINCT A.ACNT_OWNR_ID FROM SID.IDO_A_UUA_ACNT A , SID.IDO_A_UUA_ACNT_FUNCTION B WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.ACNT_ID = B.ACNT_ID AND A.ACNT_STAS_TYPE_CODE != 'CL' AND B.ACNT_FNCN_TYPE_CODE = 'PRBS' -- 개인사업용계좌 AND B.ALWD_YN = 'Y' ) M1 , ( SELECT CLNT_ENTY_ID , SUM(NVL(ASST_VLTN_ACML_AMNT,0) / NVL(STCK_DAYS,1)) AS AVR_AMNT -- 평잔(자산평가누적금액 / 적수일수)의 합계 , SUM(NVL(ASST_VLTN_BLNC_AMNT,0)) AS MM_AMNT -- 월말잔고(자산평가잔고금액)의 합계 FROM SID.IDA_SETL_STD_BAL_D /* IDA_고객투자_일별결제기준잔고 */ WHERE STNR_DATE = #{yyyymmdd} GROUP BY CLNT_ENTY_ID ) Z , ( SELECT CLNT_ENTY_ID , SUM(ASST_VLTN_ACML_AMNT)/(SELECT TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(LAST_DAY(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{yyyymmdd},'YYYYMMDD'), - 1)), 'DD')) FROM DUAL) AS ASST_VLTN_ACML_AMNT FROM SID.IDA_SETL_STD_BAL_M WHERE STNR_YYMM = TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{yyyymmdd},'YYYYMMDD'), - 1), 'YYYYMM') GROUP BY CLNT_ENTY_ID ) ZZ , SID.IDO_A_UUE_COUNTRY Z1 /* 소속국가 */ , SID.IDO_A_UUE_COUNTRY Z2 /* 거주국가 */ , SID.IDO_A_UUE_COUNTRY Z3 /* CDD국가 */ , ( SELECT DISTINCT C.CLNT_ENTY_ID RNMCNO /* 2021.08.23 팍스넷 2건 존재해 DISTINCT 추가 */ , 'Y' BIT_COIN_YN FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_VRAC_TRS_BSNS_IF A , SID.IDO_A_UUE_CLIENT_ENTY_ALIAS B , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_ADDN_IFMN C WHERE TRIM(A.BZNO_CRYP) = TRIM(B.ENTY_ALIS_CRYP) AND B.ENTY_ID = C.CLNT_ENTY_ID ) Z4 /* 2019.1.12 안창우 : 비트코인 업체 체크 */ , (SELECT CLNT_ENTY_ID , CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_DATE FROM ( SELECT /*+ FULL(C) PARALLEL(C 4) */ C.CLNT_ENTY_ID , MAX(C.CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_DATE) KEEP (DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY C.CLNT_ENTY_ID,C.CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_DATE DESC) AS CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_DATE FROM SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_ACNT_INF_CHG C WHERE CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_ITEM_CODE = '74' AND TRIM(CLNT_IFMN_AFCH_CTNT) IS NOT NULL GROUP BY C.CLNT_ENTY_ID ) ) Z5 , (SELECT CLNT_ENTY_ID , CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_DATE FROM ( SELECT /*+ FULL(C) PARALLEL(C 4) */ C.CLNT_ENTY_ID , MAX(C.CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_DATE) KEEP (DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY C.CLNT_ENTY_ID,C.CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_DATE DESC) AS CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_DATE FROM SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_ACNT_INF_CHG C WHERE CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_ITEM_CODE = '11' AND TRIM(CLNT_IFMN_AFCH_CTNT) IS NOT NULL GROUP BY C.CLNT_ENTY_ID ) ) Z6
, (SELECT CLNT_ENTY_ID , CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_DATE FROM ( SELECT /*+ FULL(C) PARALLEL(C 4) */ C.CLNT_ENTY_ID , MAX(C.CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_DATE) KEEP (DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY C.CLNT_ENTY_ID,C.CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_DATE DESC) AS CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_DATE FROM SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_ACNT_INF_CHG C WHERE CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_ITEM_CODE = '01' AND TRIM(CLNT_IFMN_AFCH_CTNT) IS NOT NULL GROUP BY C.CLNT_ENTY_ID ) ) Z7 , (SELECT CLNT_ENTY_ID , CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_DATE FROM ( SELECT /*+ FULL(C) PARALLEL(C 4) */ C.CLNT_ENTY_ID , MAX(C.CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_DATE) KEEP (DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY C.CLNT_ENTY_ID,C.CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_DATE DESC) AS CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_DATE FROM SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_ACNT_INF_CHG C WHERE CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_ITEM_CODE = '02' AND TRIM(CLNT_IFMN_AFCH_CTNT) IS NOT NULL GROUP BY C.CLNT_ENTY_ID ) ) Z8 , SID.IDO_A_UUE_INDIVIDUAL I -- Individual(for 생년월일) WHERE X.ENTY_ID = A.CLNT_ENTY_ID AND X.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE = A.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE AND A.CLNT_ENTY_ID = B.ENTY_ID AND A.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE = B.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE AND A.CLNT_ENTY_ID = A1.ENTY_ID(+) AND A4.JOB_CODE = A3.CNTNT(+) AND A.CLNT_ENTY_ID = A4.ENTY_ID (+) AND A1.STND_INDY_CLSN_CODE = A2.CNTNT(+) AND B.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE != 'CRGN' /* 법인등록번호로 등록된 고객은 실제고객에서 제외 */ AND B.ENTY_ID = B1.ENTY_ID(+) AND B.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE = B1.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE(+) AND B1.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE (+)= 'CRGN' /* 법인등록번호가 등록된경우 법인등록번호 추출 */ AND A.CLNT_ENTY_ID = C.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID(+) AND A.CLNT_ENTY_ID = C1.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID(+) AND A.CLNT_ENTY_ID = D.CLNT_ENTY_ID(+) AND X.ENTY_ID = E.ACNT_OWNR_ID(+) AND X.ENTY_ID = F.ENTY_ID(+) AND X.ENTY_ID = M1.ACNT_OWNR_ID(+) AND A.CLNT_ENTY_ID = Z.CLNT_ENTY_ID(+) AND A.CLNT_ENTY_ID = ZZ.CLNT_ENTY_ID(+) AND S2.NTNY_ID = Z1.CNTY_ID(+) AND S2.RSDT_CNTY_ID = Z2.CNTY_ID(+) AND C.NTNY_ID = Z3.CNTY_ID(+) AND D.PRBN_ENTY_ID = D1.ENTY_ID(+) AND X.ENTY_ID = Z4.RNMCNO(+) /* 2019.1.12 안창우 : 비트코인 업체 */ AND X.ENTY_ID = Z5.CLNT_ENTY_ID (+) /* 2020.11 : 고객변경정보(EMAIL용) 추가 */ AND X.ENTY_ID = Z6.CLNT_ENTY_ID (+) /* 2020.11 : 고객변경정보(직업코드용) 추가 */ AND X.ENTY_ID = Z7.CLNT_ENTY_ID (+) AND X.ENTY_ID = Z8.CLNT_ENTY_ID (+)
AND X.ENTY_ID = I.ENTY_ID (+)
AND X.ENTY_ID = S1.ENTY_ID AND X.ENTY_ID = S2.ENTY_ID
AND X.ENTY_ID NOT IN (1000082069)
) T, (SELECT A.RISK_DTLS_CODE FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_RISK_INDR_MN A WHERE A.RISK_LARG_CLSN_CODE = 'CLNT' --고객 AND A.RISK_MDUM_CLSN_CODE = 'JOB' --직업 AND A.CDD_RGTY_RISK_SECT_CODE IN ('Y', 'H')) T1, (SELECT A.RISK_DTLS_CODE FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_RISK_INDR_MN A WHERE A.RISK_LARG_CLSN_CODE = 'CLNT' --고객 AND A.RISK_MDUM_CLSN_CODE = 'INKN' --업종 AND A.CDD_RGTY_RISK_SECT_CODE IN ('Y', 'H')) T2 WHERE T.AML_JOB_GUBN = T1.RISK_DTLS_CODE (+) AND T.INDST_RSK_DVD_CD = T2.RISK_DTLS_CODE (+) UNION ALL -- 고객등록이 안되고 CDD에만 존재하는 고객 SELECT /*+ FULL(A) PARALLEL(A 8) */ TO_CHAR(A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID) AS RNMCNO , TRIM(A.CDD_TAGT_CLNT_NO_CRYP) AS CS_NO /*, CASE A.TAGT_ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE WHEN 'BRGN' THEN '03' WHEN 'CRGN' THEN '05' WHEN 'DIRN' THEN '99' WHEN 'FICN' THEN '12' WHEN 'FRIN' THEN '08' WHEN 'FRRN' THEN '07' WHEN 'FSSN' THEN '99' WHEN 'PSPT' THEN '04' WHEN 'SSCN' THEN '01' WHEN 'TXID' THEN '09' ELSE '99' END */ , NVL((SELECT TRNSFRM_CD FROM SSQ.NIC95B WHERE CD = 'L200' AND CD_VL9 = A.TAGT_ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE ), '99') AS RNM_CNFR_CCD , '0' AS CS_ST_CD -- 2021.01.26 1.삭제에서 0.정상으로 변경 : 삭제일 경우 CTR 추출에서 제외됨 , A.CDD_FLFL_DATE AS CS_RGST_DT , NULL AS CS_MDFY_DT , NULL AS CS_DLT_DT , TO_SINGLE_BYTE(TRIM(A.TAGT_CLNT_NAME)) AS CS_NM , TRIM(A.CPNO_CRYP) AS CORP_RGST_NO , TO_SINGLE_BYTE(TRIM(A.TAGT_ENNM)) AS ENG_CS_NM , TRIM(Z2.CNTY_CODE) AS NTN_CD , CASE WHEN Z2.CNTY_CODE IS NOT NULL AND Z3.CNTY_CODE IS NOT NULL THEN CASE WHEN TRIM(Z2.CNTY_CODE) = TRIM(Z3.CNTY_CODE) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END ELSE NULL END AS RSDNC_F , TRIM(Z3.CNTY_CODE) AS RSDNC_PLC_NTN_CD , CASE WHEN A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE = '1' THEN '1' ELSE '2' END AS INDV_CORP_CCD , CASE TRIM(A.STND_INDY_CLSN_CODE) WHEN '99995' THEN '64201' WHEN '99996' THEN '91249' WHEN '99997' THEN '66199' WHEN '99998' THEN '64919' WHEN '99999' THEN '66199' WHEN 'ZZZZZ' THEN '94990' ELSE TRIM(A.STND_INDY_CLSN_CODE) END AS INDST_RSK_DVC_CD , TRIM(A.JOB_CODE) AS AML_JOB_GUBN , TRIM(A.HIGH_AMNT_ASST_YN) AS LG_AMT_ASTS_F , TRIM(B.EMAIL_ID_CRYP) AS EMAIL_ID , TRIM(B.EMAL_HOST_NAME_CRYP) AS EMAIL_HOST_NAME , 0 AS TL_ASTS_AMT , CASE WHEN A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE = '3' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS NPRFT_GROUP_F , A.RGBR_CODE AS CS_EXCTN_BRN_CD , A.RGBR_CODE AS CS_MANAG_BRN_CD , CASE A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE WHEN '1' THEN '01' WHEN '2' THEN '03' /* 영리법인 -> 법인 */ WHEN '3' THEN '04' /* 비영리법인 -> 비영리법인 */ ELSE '*' END AS CS_TYP_CD , NULL AS INTERVIEW_CCD , CASE TRIM(Z2.CNTY_CODE) WHEN 'KR' THEN 'A' WHEN NULL THEN '*' ELSE 'B' END AS NTV_FGNR_CCD , NULL AS DL_CHNNL_CD , A.PRCE_DATE_TIME AS HNDL_DY_TM , A.PCPR_ID AS L_HNDL_P_ENO , SYSDATE AS AML_CRT_DT , 'BATCH' AS AML_HNDL_P_ENO , A.PEP_YN AS PEP_YN , CASE WHEN A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE = '1' THEN TRIM(A.BRDT) ELSE TRIM(A.ETDT) END AS BRTDY , CASE WHEN A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE = '1' /* 개인고객만 직업코드를 분류 */ THEN CASE TRIM(A.JOB_CODE) WHEN '110' THEN '01' /* 일반기업체 -> 직장인 */ WHEN '120' THEN '01' /* 공무원 -> 직장인 */ WHEN '130' THEN '01' /* 교육계 -> 직장인 */ WHEN '140' THEN '01' /* 금융계 -> 직장인 */ WHEN '150' THEN '01' /* 언론계 -> 직장인 */ WHEN '160' THEN '01' /* 공기업 -> 직장인 */ WHEN '170' THEN '01' /* 전문직 -> 직장인 */ WHEN '190' THEN '01' /* 기타 -> 직장인 */ WHEN '210' THEN '02' /* 제조업 -> 개인사업자 */ WHEN '220' THEN '02' /* 도소매업 -> 개인사업자 */ WHEN '230' THEN '02' /* 건설업 -> 개인사업자 */ WHEN '240' THEN '02' /* 숙박및음식업 -> 개인사업자 */ WHEN '250' THEN '02' /* 부동산 -> 개인사업자 */ WHEN '260' THEN '02' /* 사행성사업 -> 개인사업자 */ WHEN '270' THEN '02' /* 예술품판매업 -> 개인사업자 */ WHEN '280' THEN '02' /* 귀금속판매업 -> 개인사업자 */ WHEN '290' THEN '02' /* 기타 -> 개인사업자 */ WHEN '310' THEN '02' /* 변호사 -> 개인사업자 */ WHEN '320' THEN '02' /* 의사 -> 개인사업자 */ WHEN '330' THEN '02' /* 공인회계사 -> 개인사업자 */ WHEN '340' THEN '02' /* 세무사 -> 개인사업자 */ WHEN '350' THEN '02' /* 법무사 -> 개인사업자 */ WHEN '360' THEN '02' /* 관세사 -> 개인사업자 */ WHEN '390' THEN '02' /* 기타 -> 개인사업자 */ WHEN '410' THEN '01' /* 환전업 -> 직장인 */ WHEN '420' THEN '01' /* 전당포 -> 직장인 */ WHEN '430' THEN '01' /* 대부업 -> 직장인 */ WHEN '440' THEN '01' /* 투자자문업 -> 직장인 */ WHEN '450' THEN '01' /* 가상통화취급업 -> 직장인 */ WHEN '490' THEN '01' /* 기타금융업-기타 -> 직장인 */ WHEN '910' THEN '03' /* 정년퇴직자 -> 무직 */ WHEN '920' THEN '03' /* 주부 -> 무직 */ WHEN '930' THEN '03' /* 학생 -> 무직 */ WHEN '940' THEN '03' /* 정치인 -> 무직 */ WHEN '950' THEN '03' /* 무직 -> 무직 */ WHEN '990' THEN '03' /* 기타 -> 무직 */ WHEN '000' THEN '99' /* 미제공 -> 파악할 수 없음 */ ELSE '99' /* 파악할 수 없음 */ END ELSE ' ' END AS STR_JOB_GUBN , TRIM(Z2.CNTY_CODE) AS CDD_NTN_CD , ' ' AS OFSF_YN , CASE WHEN T1.RISK_DTLS_CODE IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' WHEN T2.RISK_DTLS_CODE IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS HR_JOB_YN FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD A , ( SELECT /*+ FULL(B) PARALLEL(B 4) */ B.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , MAX(C.EMAL_ID_CRYP) KEEP(DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY B.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID, B.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_TAGT_CODE, B.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_SECT_CODE, B.CDD_FLFL_SQNO DESC) AS EMAIL_ID_CRYP , MAX(C.EMAL_HOST_NAME_CRYP ) KEEP(DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY B.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID, B.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_TAGT_CODE, B.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_SECT_CODE, B.CDD_FLFL_SQNO DESC) AS EMAL_HOST_NAME_CRYP FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_CNTT_ADDR_IF B , SID.IDO_A_UUE_EMAIL_ADDRESS C WHERE B.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_SECT_CODE = 'EML' AND B.CNTT_ADDR_ID = C.CNTT_ADDR_ID AND B.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_TAGT_CODE IN ('12','13','14','21','22') GROUP BY B.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID ) B , SID.IDO_A_UUE_COUNTRY Z2 , SID.IDO_A_UUE_COUNTRY Z3 , (SELECT A.RISK_DTLS_CODE FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_RISK_INDR_MN A WHERE A.RISK_LARG_CLSN_CODE = 'CLNT' --고객 AND A.RISK_MDUM_CLSN_CODE = 'JOB' --직업 AND A.CDD_RGTY_RISK_SECT_CODE IN ('Y', 'H')) T1 , (SELECT A.RISK_DTLS_CODE FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_RISK_INDR_MN A WHERE A.RISK_LARG_CLSN_CODE = 'CLNT' --고객 AND A.RISK_MDUM_CLSN_CODE = 'INKN' --업종 AND A.CDD_RGTY_RISK_SECT_CODE IN ('Y', 'H')) T2 WHERE 1=1 AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = B.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID (+) AND A.NTNY_ID = Z2.CNTY_ID (+) AND A.RSDT_CNTY_ID = Z3.CNTY_ID (+) AND TRIM(A.JOB_CODE) = T1.RISK_DTLS_CODE (+) AND TRIM(A.STND_INDY_CLSN_CODE) = T1.RISK_DTLS_CODE (+) AND TRIM(A.STND_INDY_CLSN_CODE) = T2.RISK_DTLS_CODE (+) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_ADDN_IFMN WHERE CLNT_ENTY_ID = A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID) AND A.CDD_FLFL_DATE IS NOT NULL AND TO_SINGLE_BYTE(TRIM(A.TAGT_CLNT_NAME)) IS NOT NULL AND A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE IN ('H', 'M', 'L')

INSERT /*+ APPEND */ INTO SSQ.NIC03B SELECT /*+ FULL(X) PARALLEL(X 4) */ B.ENTY_ID AS RNMCNO /* 고객엔티티ID */ , CASE WHEN TRIM(C.CDD_FLFL_DATE) IS NOT NULL THEN CASE WHEN E1.CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_DATE IS NOT NULL THEN CASE WHEN TO_DATE(TRIM(C.CDD_FLFL_DATE),'YYYYMMDD') >= TO_DATE(E1.CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_DATE,'YYYYMMDD') AND TRIM(C.ETDT) IS NOT NULL THEN TRIM(C.ETDT) ELSE NVL(TRIM(E.ETDT),TRIM(C.ETDT)) END ELSE CASE WHEN TO_DATE(TRIM(C.CDD_FLFL_DATE),'YYYYMMDD') >= NVL(TO_DATE(TRIM(X.RGSN_DATE),'YYYYMMDD'), X.PRCE_DATE_TIME) AND TRIM(C.ETDT) IS NOT NULL THEN TRIM(C.ETDT) ELSE NVL(TRIM(E.ETDT),TRIM(C.ETDT)) END END ELSE TRIM(E.ETDT) END AS FNDTN_DT /* 설립일자 */ , C.ESTT_PRPS_NAME AS CORP_FNDTN_OBJ_NM /* 법인설립목적명 */ , CASE WHEN B.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE = 'BRGN' /* 엔티티유형이 사업자등록번호일경우 */ THEN B.ENTY_ALIS_CRYP ELSE NULL END AS BSMN_RNO /* 사업자등록번호 */ , C1.URL_ADRS AS HMPG_ADDR /* 홈페이지주소 */ , D.INSN_SCL_SECT_CODE AS ENTP_SCL_CCD /* 기업규모구분코드 */ , CASE WHEN SUBSTR(C.STND_INDY_CLSN_CODE,1,2) = '64' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS FOGN_F /* 금융기관여부 */ , CASE WHEN C.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE = '3' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS NPRFT_GROUP_F /* 비영리단체여부 */ , CASE WHEN D.INSN_LSTG_MRKT_CODE IN ('1','2','4') THEN 'Y' /* 1:거래소 2:코스닥 3:비상장 4:기타제3시장 */ ELSE 'N' END AS LSTNG_F /* 상장여부 */ , D.INSN_LSTG_MRKT_NAME AS LSTNG_INFO /* 상장정보 */ , D.INSN_TOTL_ASST_AMNT AS TL_ASTS_AMT /* 총자산금액 */ , D.INSN_LSTG_MRKT_CODE AS AML_CRP_LTG_DIT_CD /* 법인상장종류코드 */ , X.PRCE_DATE_TIME AS HNDL_DY_TM /* 처리일시 */ , X.PCPR_ID AS L_HNDL_P_ENO /* 계정계처리자사번 */ , SYSDATE AS AML_CRT_DT /* AML생성일자 */ , 'BATCH' AS AML_HNDL_P_ENO /* AML처리자사번 */ , C.RPST_1_NAME AS RPRST_P_NM1 /* 대표자1이름 */ , Z1.CNTY_CODE AS RPRST_P_NTNLT1 /* 대표자1국적코드 */ , C.RPST_1_BRDT AS RPRST_P_BRDY1 /* 대표자1생년월일 */ , C.RPST_2_NAME AS RPRST_P_NM2 /* 대표자2이름 */ , Z2.CNTY_CODE AS RPRST_P_NTNLT2 /* 대표자2국적코드 */ , C.RPST_2_BRDT AS RPRST_P_BRDY2 /* 대표자2생년월일 */ , C.RPST_3_NAME AS RPRST_P_NM3 /* 대표자3이름 */ , Z3.CNTY_CODE AS RPRST_P_NTNLT3 /* 대표자3국적코드 */ , C.RPST_3_BRDT AS RPRST_P_BRDY3 /* 대표자3생년월일 */ , D.INSN_TRDG_PRPS_CODE AS INSN_TRDG_PRPS_CODE /* 법인거래목적코드 */ , D.INSN_TRDG_PRPS_NAME AS INSN_TRDG_PRPS_NAME /* 법인거래목적명 */ , D.INSN_FUNS_ORIG_CODE AS INSN_FUNS_ORIG_CODE /* 법인자금원천코드 */ , D.INSN_FUNS_ORIG_NAME AS INSN_FUNS_ORIG_NAME /* 법인자금원천명 */ , D.INSN_FRCT_TRDG_CNT_CODE AS INSN_FRCT_TRDG_CNT_CODE /* 법인예상거래횟수코드 */ , D.INSN_FRCT_TRDG_SCL_CODE AS INSN_FRCT_TRDG_SCL_CODE /* 법인예상거래규모코드 */ , D.INSN_EMPY_CONT AS EMPY_CONT /* 종업원수 */ , D.INSN_MJOR_PRDT_NAME AS MJOR_PRDT_SRVC_NAME /* 주요상품및서비스명 */ FROM SID.IDO_A_UUE_LEGAL_ENTY X /* IDO_A_Entity_LegalEntity */ LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_BYBS_CLNT_CLSN X1 /* 폐쇄이관 관련정보 */ ON X.ENTY_ID = X1.ENTY_ID AND X1.VLD_YN = 'Y' AND X1.BYBS_CLNT_CLSN_TYPE_CODE = 'MV' LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_INDIVIDUAL Y ON X.ENTY_ID = Y.ENTY_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_INSTITUTION E ON X.ENTY_ID = E.ENTY_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT /*+ FULL(F) PARALLEL(F 4) */ F.CLNT_ENTY_ID , MAX(F.CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_DATE) KEEP (DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY F.CLNT_ENTY_ID, F.CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_DATE DESC) AS CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_DATE , MAX(TRIM(CLNT_IFMN_AFCH_CTNT)) KEEP (DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY F.CLNT_ENTY_ID, F.CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_DATE DESC) AS CLNT_IFMN_AFCH_CTNT FROM SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_ACNT_INF_CHG F WHERE F.CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_ITEM_CODE IN ('A3') -- 설립일 AND TRIM(CLNT_IFMN_AFCH_CTNT) IS NOT NULL GROUP BY F.CLNT_ENTY_ID ) E1 ON X.ENTY_ID = E1.CLNT_ENTY_ID , SID.IDO_A_UUF_CLNT_BSC S1 /* NDVL_INSN_TYPE_CODE */ , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_ADDN_IFMN A LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD C /* CDD수행내역 */ ON A.CLNT_ENTY_ID = C.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_MAH_EDD_FLFL_DTLD D /* EDD수행내역 */ ON C.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = D.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_COUNTRY Z1 ON C.RPST_1_NTNY_ID = Z1.CNTY_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_COUNTRY Z2 ON C.RPST_2_NTNY_ID = Z2.CNTY_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_COUNTRY Z3 ON C.RPST_3_NTNY_ID = Z3.CNTY_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT /*+ FULL(A) PARALLEL(A 4) */ A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , B.URL_ADRS FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_CNTT_ADDR_IF A , SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD A1 /* 2019.07.08 KJS : 법인 홈페이지(이메일)주소 CDD차수에 따른 중복제거 */ , (SELECT * FROM SID.IDO_A_UUE_URL WHERE UPPER(URL_ADRS) LIKE 'HTTP%' ) B WHERE A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = A1.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO = A1.CDD_FLFL_SQNO AND A.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_TAGT_CODE='23' AND A.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_SECT_CODE='URL' AND A.CNTT_ADDR_ID = B.CNTT_ADDR_ID(+) GROUP BY A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID, B.URL_ADRS) C1 ON A.CLNT_ENTY_ID = C1.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , SID.IDO_A_UUE_CLIENT_ENTY_ALIAS B WHERE X.ENTY_ID = A.CLNT_ENTY_ID AND A.CLNT_ENTY_ID = B.ENTY_ID AND A.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE = B.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE AND X1.BYBS_CLNT_CLSN_TYPE_CODE IS NULL /* 폐쇄이관 2단계고객은 제외 */ AND (S1.NDVL_INSN_TYPE_CODE <> 'IN' OR (S1.NDVL_INSN_TYPE_CODE = 'IN' AND CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE = '3'))
AND X.ENTY_ID = S1.ENTY_ID
UNION ALL SELECT /*+ FULL(A) PARALLEL(A 4) */ A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AS RNMCNO , TRIM(A.ETDT) AS FNDTN_DT , TRIM(A.ESTT_PRPS_NAME) AS CORP_FNDTN_OBJ_NM , CASE WHEN A.RLNM_CNFM_TKN_CODE = '07' THEN A.CDD_TAGT_CLNT_NO_CRYP ELSE NULL END AS BSMN_RNO , CASE WHEN TRIM(C.URL_ADRS) IS NOT NULL THEN TRIM(C.URL_ADRS) ELSE NULL END AS HMPG_ADDR , TRIM(B.INSN_SCL_SECT_CODE) AS ENTP_SCL_CCD , CASE WHEN SUBSTR(A.STND_INDY_CLSN_CODE,1,2) = '64' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS FOGN_F , CASE WHEN A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE = '3' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS NPRFT_GROUP_F , CASE WHEN B.INSN_LSTG_MRKT_CODE IN ('1','2','4') THEN 'Y' /* 1:거래소 2:코스닥 3:비상장 4:기타제3시장 */ ELSE 'N' END AS LSTNG_F , B.INSN_LSTG_MRKT_NAME AS LSTNG_INFO , B.INSN_TOTL_ASST_AMNT AS TL_ASTS_AMT , B.INSN_LSTG_MRKT_CODE AS AML_CRP_LTG_DIT_CD , A.PRCE_DATE_TIME AS HNDL_DY_TM , A.PCPR_ID AS L_HNDL_P_ENO , SYSDATE AS AML_CRT_DT , 'BATCH' AS AML_HNDL_P_ENO , A.RPST_1_NAME AS RPRST_P_NM1 , Z1.CNTY_CODE AS RPRST_P_NTNLT1 , A.RPST_1_BRDT AS RPRST_P_BRDY1 , A.RPST_2_NAME AS RPRST_P_NM2 , Z2.CNTY_CODE AS RPRST_P_NTNLT2 , A.RPST_2_BRDT AS RPRST_P_BRDY2 , A.RPST_3_NAME AS RPRST_P_NM3 , Z3.CNTY_CODE AS RPRST_P_NTNLT3 , A.RPST_3_BRDT AS RPRST_P_BRDY3 , B.INSN_TRDG_PRPS_CODE AS INSN_TRDG_PRPS_CODE , B.INSN_TRDG_PRPS_NAME AS INSN_TRDG_PRPS_NAME , B.INSN_FUNS_ORIG_CODE AS INSN_FUNS_ORIG_CODE , B.INSN_FUNS_ORIG_NAME AS INSN_FUNS_ORIG_NAME , B.INSN_FRCT_TRDG_CNT_CODE AS INSN_FRCT_TRDG_CNT_CODE , B.INSN_FRCT_TRDG_SCL_CODE AS INSN_FRCT_TRDG_SCL_CODE , B.INSN_EMPY_CONT AS EMPY_CONT , B.INSN_MJOR_PRDT_NAME AS MJOR_PRDT_SRVC_NAME FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD A , SID.IDO_A_MAH_EDD_FLFL_DTLD B , ( SELECT /*+ FULL(A) PARALLEL(A 4) */ A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , B.URL_ADRS FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_CNTT_ADDR_IF A , SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD A1 /* 2019.07.08 KJS : 법인 홈페이지(이메일)주소 CDD차수에 따른 중복제거 */ , (SELECT * FROM SID.IDO_A_UUE_URL WHERE UPPER(URL_ADRS) LIKE 'HTTP%' ) B WHERE A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = A1.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO = A1.CDD_FLFL_SQNO AND A.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_TAGT_CODE='23' AND A.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_SECT_CODE='URL' AND A.CNTT_ADDR_ID = B.CNTT_ADDR_ID(+) GROUP BY A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID, B.URL_ADRS) C , SID.IDO_A_UUE_COUNTRY Z1 , SID.IDO_A_UUE_COUNTRY Z2 , SID.IDO_A_UUE_COUNTRY Z3 WHERE 1=1 AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = B.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID (+) AND A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO = B.CDD_FLFL_SQNO (+) AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = C.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID (+) AND A.RPST_1_NTNY_ID = Z1.CNTY_ID (+) AND A.RPST_2_NTNY_ID = Z2.CNTY_ID (+) AND A.RPST_3_NTNY_ID = Z3.CNTY_ID (+) AND A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE IN ('2','3') AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_ADDN_IFMN WHERE CLNT_ENTY_ID = A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID)

INSERT /*+ APPEND */ INTO SSQ.NIC04B WITH T2 AS (SELECT /*+ FULL(O) PARALLEL(O 4) */ O.RNMCNO , O.CNTC_TYP_CCD , MAX(O.CNTY_NATI_CRYP) KEEP(DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY O.RNMCNO, O.CNTC_TYP_CCD) AS CNTY_NATI_CRYP , MAX(O.CNTY_AREA_CRYP) KEEP(DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY O.RNMCNO, O.CNTC_TYP_CCD) AS CNTY_AREA_CRYP , MAX(O.CNTY_ECNO_CRYP) KEEP(DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY O.RNMCNO, O.CNTC_TYP_CCD) AS CNTY_ECNO_CRYP , MAX(O.CNTY_NO_CRYP) KEEP(DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY O.RNMCNO, O.CNTC_TYP_CCD) AS CNTY_NO_CRYP , MAX(O.CDD_FLFL_DATE) KEEP(DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY O.RNMCNO, O.CNTC_TYP_CCD) AS CDD_FLFL_DATE FROM ( SELECT A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AS RNMCNO , CASE WHEN B.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_TAGT_CODE IN ('12','14') THEN '1' ELSE '2' END AS CNTC_TYP_CCD , B.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_TAGT_CODE , B.CDD_FLFL_SQNO , TRIM(A.CDD_FLFL_DATE) AS CDD_FLFL_DATE , B.CNTT_ADDR_ID , C.CNTY_PHON_CODE_CRYP AS CNTY_NATI_CRYP , C.AREA_CODE_CRYP AS CNTY_AREA_CRYP , C.PHON_ECNO_CRYP AS CNTY_ECNO_CRYP , C.PHON_NO_CRYP AS CNTY_NO_CRYP , B.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_SECT_CODE FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD A , SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_CNTT_ADDR_IF B , SID.IDO_A_UUE_PHONE C WHERE A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = B.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND B.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_SECT_CODE = 'TEL' AND B.CNTT_ADDR_ID = C.CNTT_ADDR_ID AND TRIM(A.CDD_FLFL_DATE) IS NOT NULL AND A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE = '1' -- 12.개인CDD-자택, 13.개인CDD-직장, 14.개인CDD-실제거소 --, 21.법인CDD-사업장, 22.법인CDD-본점 AND B.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_TAGT_CODE IN ('12','13','14') UNION ALL SELECT A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AS RNMCNO , '3' AS CNTC_TYP_CCD , B.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_TAGT_CODE , B.CDD_FLFL_SQNO , TRIM(A.CDD_FLFL_DATE) AS CDD_FLFL_DATE , B.CNTT_ADDR_ID , C.CNTY_PHON_CODE_CRYP AS CNTY_NATI_CRYP , C.MOBL_PHON_IDNF_NO_CRYP AS CNTY_AREA_CRYP , C.MOBL_PHON_ECNO_CRYP AS CNTY_ECNO_CRYP , C.MOBL_PHON_NO_CRYP AS CNTY_NO_CRYP , B.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_SECT_CODE FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD A , SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_CNTT_ADDR_IF B , SID.IDO_A_UUE_MOBILE C WHERE A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = B.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND B.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_SECT_CODE = 'MOB' AND B.CNTT_ADDR_ID = C.CNTT_ADDR_ID AND TRIM(A.CDD_FLFL_DATE) IS NOT NULL AND A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE = '1' -- 12.개인CDD-자택, 13.개인CDD-직장, 14.개인CDD-실제거소 --, 21.법인CDD-사업장, 22.법인CDD-본점 AND B.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_TAGT_CODE IN ('12','13','14') ) O GROUP BY RNMCNO, CNTC_TYP_CCD UNION ALL SELECT /*+ FULL(P) PARALLEL(P 4) */ P.RNMCNO , P.CNTC_TYP_CCD , MAX(P.AA||P.EE||P.II) KEEP(DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY P.RNMCNO ) AS CNTY_NATI_CRYP , MAX(P.BB||P.FF||P.JJ) KEEP(DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY P.RNMCNO ) AS CNTY_AREA_CRYP , MAX(P.CC||P.GG||P.KK) KEEP(DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY P.RNMCNO ) AS CNTY_ECNO_CRYP , MAX(P.DD||P.HH||P.LL) KEEP(DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY P.RNMCNO ) AS CNTY_NO_CRYP , MAX(P.CDD_FLFL_DATE) KEEP(DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY P.RNMCNO ) AS CDD_FLFL_DATE FROM ( SELECT CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AS RNMCNO , '1' AS CNTC_TYP_CCD , CASE WHEN TRIM(CNTY_PHON_CODE_CRYP)||TRIM(AREA_CODE_CRYP)||TRIM(PHON_ECNO_CRYP)||TRIM(PHON_NO_CRYP) IS NOT NULL THEN CASE WHEN CDD_CNTT_ADDR_SECT_CODE IN ('TEL') THEN CASE WHEN CDD_CNTT_ADDR_TAGT_CODE = '22' THEN CNTY_PHON_CODE_CRYP ELSE CASE WHEN CDD_CNTT_ADDR_TAGT_CODE = '21' THEN CNTY_PHON_CODE_CRYP ELSE NULL END END ELSE CASE WHEN CDD_CNTT_ADDR_TAGT_CODE = '22' THEN CNTY_PHON_CODE_CRYP ELSE CASE WHEN CDD_CNTT_ADDR_TAGT_CODE = '21' THEN CNTY_PHON_CODE_CRYP ELSE NULL END END END ELSE NULL END AS AA , CASE WHEN TRIM(CNTY_PHON_CODE_CRYP)||TRIM(AREA_CODE_CRYP)||TRIM(PHON_ECNO_CRYP)||TRIM(PHON_NO_CRYP) IS NOT NULL THEN CASE WHEN CDD_CNTT_ADDR_SECT_CODE IN ('TEL') THEN CASE WHEN CDD_CNTT_ADDR_TAGT_CODE = '22' THEN AREA_CODE_CRYP ELSE CASE WHEN CDD_CNTT_ADDR_TAGT_CODE = '21' THEN AREA_CODE_CRYP ELSE NULL END END ELSE CASE WHEN CDD_CNTT_ADDR_TAGT_CODE = '22' THEN AREA_CODE_CRYP ELSE CASE WHEN CDD_CNTT_ADDR_TAGT_CODE = '21' THEN AREA_CODE_CRYP ELSE NULL END END END ELSE NULL END AS BB , CASE WHEN TRIM(CNTY_PHON_CODE_CRYP)||TRIM(AREA_CODE_CRYP)||TRIM(PHON_ECNO_CRYP)||TRIM(PHON_NO_CRYP) IS NOT NULL THEN CASE WHEN CDD_CNTT_ADDR_SECT_CODE IN ('TEL') THEN CASE WHEN CDD_CNTT_ADDR_TAGT_CODE = '22' THEN PHON_ECNO_CRYP ELSE CASE WHEN CDD_CNTT_ADDR_TAGT_CODE = '21' THEN PHON_ECNO_CRYP ELSE NULL END END ELSE CASE WHEN CDD_CNTT_ADDR_TAGT_CODE = '22' THEN PHON_ECNO_CRYP ELSE CASE WHEN CDD_CNTT_ADDR_TAGT_CODE = '21' THEN PHON_ECNO_CRYP ELSE NULL END END END ELSE NULL END AS CC , CASE WHEN TRIM(CNTY_PHON_CODE_CRYP)||TRIM(AREA_CODE_CRYP)||TRIM(PHON_ECNO_CRYP)||TRIM(PHON_NO_CRYP) IS NOT NULL THEN CASE WHEN CDD_CNTT_ADDR_SECT_CODE IN ('TEL') THEN CASE WHEN CDD_CNTT_ADDR_TAGT_CODE = '22' THEN PHON_NO_CRYP ELSE CASE WHEN CDD_CNTT_ADDR_TAGT_CODE = '21' THEN PHON_NO_CRYP ELSE NULL END END ELSE CASE WHEN CDD_CNTT_ADDR_TAGT_CODE = '22' THEN PHON_NO_CRYP ELSE CASE WHEN CDD_CNTT_ADDR_TAGT_CODE = '21' THEN PHON_NO_CRYP ELSE NULL END END END ELSE NULL END AS DD , NULL AS EE , NULL AS FF , NULL AS GG , NULL AS HH , NULL AS II , NULL AS JJ , NULL AS KK , NULL AS LL , CDD_FLFL_DATE FROM (SELECT A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , B.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_TAGT_CODE , B.CDD_FLFL_SQNO , TRIM(A.CDD_FLFL_DATE) AS CDD_FLFL_DATE , B.CNTT_ADDR_ID , C.CNTY_PHON_CODE_CRYP , C.AREA_CODE_CRYP , C.PHON_ECNO_CRYP , C.PHON_NO_CRYP , B.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_SECT_CODE FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD A , SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_CNTT_ADDR_IF B , SID.IDO_A_UUE_PHONE C WHERE A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = B.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND B.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_SECT_CODE = 'TEL' AND B.CNTT_ADDR_ID = C.CNTT_ADDR_ID AND TRIM(A.CDD_FLFL_DATE) IS NOT NULL AND A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE <> '1' -- 12.개인CDD-자택, 13.개인CDD-직장, 14.개인CDD-실제거소 --, 21.법인CDD-사업장, 22.법인CDD-본점 AND B.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_TAGT_CODE IN ('21','22') UNION ALL SELECT A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , B.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_TAGT_CODE , B.CDD_FLFL_SQNO , TRIM(A.CDD_FLFL_DATE) AS CDD_FLFL_DATE , B.CNTT_ADDR_ID , C.CNTY_PHON_CODE_CRYP , C.MOBL_PHON_IDNF_NO_CRYP , C.MOBL_PHON_ECNO_CRYP , C.MOBL_PHON_NO_CRYP , B.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_SECT_CODE FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD A , SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_CNTT_ADDR_IF B , SID.IDO_A_UUE_MOBILE C WHERE A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = B.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND B.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_SECT_CODE = 'MOB' AND B.CNTT_ADDR_ID = C.CNTT_ADDR_ID AND TRIM(A.CDD_FLFL_DATE) IS NOT NULL AND A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE <> '1' -- 12.개인CDD-자택, 13.개인CDD-직장, 14.개인CDD-실제거소 --, 21.법인CDD-사업장, 22.법인CDD-본점 AND B.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_TAGT_CODE IN ('21','22') ) UNION ALL SELECT CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AS RNMCNO , '2' AS CNTC_TYP_CCD , NULL AS AA , NULL AS BB , NULL AS CC , NULL AS DD , CASE WHEN TRIM(CNTY_PHON_CODE_CRYP)||TRIM(AREA_CODE_CRYP)||TRIM(PHON_ECNO_CRYP)||TRIM(PHON_NO_CRYP) IS NOT NULL THEN CASE WHEN CDD_CNTT_ADDR_SECT_CODE IN ('TEL') THEN CASE WHEN CDD_CNTT_ADDR_TAGT_CODE = '21' THEN CNTY_PHON_CODE_CRYP ELSE NULL END ELSE CASE WHEN CDD_CNTT_ADDR_TAGT_CODE = '21' THEN CNTY_PHON_CODE_CRYP ELSE CASE WHEN CDD_CNTT_ADDR_TAGT_CODE = '22' THEN CNTY_PHON_CODE_CRYP ELSE NULL END END END ELSE NULL END AS EE , CASE WHEN TRIM(CNTY_PHON_CODE_CRYP)||TRIM(AREA_CODE_CRYP)||TRIM(PHON_ECNO_CRYP)||TRIM(PHON_NO_CRYP) IS NOT NULL THEN CASE WHEN CDD_CNTT_ADDR_SECT_CODE IN ('TEL') THEN CASE WHEN CDD_CNTT_ADDR_TAGT_CODE = '21' THEN AREA_CODE_CRYP ELSE NULL END ELSE CASE WHEN CDD_CNTT_ADDR_TAGT_CODE = '21' THEN AREA_CODE_CRYP ELSE CASE WHEN CDD_CNTT_ADDR_TAGT_CODE = '22' THEN AREA_CODE_CRYP ELSE NULL END END END ELSE NULL END AS FF , CASE WHEN TRIM(CNTY_PHON_CODE_CRYP)||TRIM(AREA_CODE_CRYP)||TRIM(PHON_ECNO_CRYP)||TRIM(PHON_NO_CRYP) IS NOT NULL THEN CASE WHEN CDD_CNTT_ADDR_SECT_CODE IN ('TEL') THEN CASE WHEN CDD_CNTT_ADDR_TAGT_CODE = '21' THEN PHON_ECNO_CRYP ELSE NULL END ELSE CASE WHEN CDD_CNTT_ADDR_TAGT_CODE = '21' THEN PHON_ECNO_CRYP ELSE CASE WHEN CDD_CNTT_ADDR_TAGT_CODE = '22' THEN PHON_ECNO_CRYP ELSE NULL END END END ELSE NULL END AS GG , CASE WHEN TRIM(CNTY_PHON_CODE_CRYP)||TRIM(AREA_CODE_CRYP)||TRIM(PHON_ECNO_CRYP)||TRIM(PHON_NO_CRYP) IS NOT NULL THEN CASE WHEN CDD_CNTT_ADDR_SECT_CODE IN ('TEL') THEN CASE WHEN CDD_CNTT_ADDR_TAGT_CODE = '21' THEN PHON_NO_CRYP ELSE NULL END ELSE CASE WHEN CDD_CNTT_ADDR_TAGT_CODE = '21' THEN PHON_NO_CRYP ELSE CASE WHEN CDD_CNTT_ADDR_TAGT_CODE = '22' THEN PHON_NO_CRYP ELSE NULL END END END ELSE NULL END AS HH , NULL AS II , NULL AS JJ , NULL AS KK , NULL AS LL , CDD_FLFL_DATE FROM (SELECT A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , B.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_TAGT_CODE , B.CDD_FLFL_SQNO , TRIM(A.CDD_FLFL_DATE) AS CDD_FLFL_DATE , B.CNTT_ADDR_ID , C.CNTY_PHON_CODE_CRYP , C.AREA_CODE_CRYP , C.PHON_ECNO_CRYP , C.PHON_NO_CRYP , B.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_SECT_CODE FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD A , SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_CNTT_ADDR_IF B , SID.IDO_A_UUE_PHONE C WHERE A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = B.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND B.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_SECT_CODE = 'TEL' AND B.CNTT_ADDR_ID = C.CNTT_ADDR_ID AND TRIM(A.CDD_FLFL_DATE) IS NOT NULL AND A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE <> '1' -- 12.개인CDD-자택, 13.개인CDD-직장, 14.개인CDD-실제거소 --, 21.법인CDD-사업장, 22.법인CDD-본점 AND B.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_TAGT_CODE IN ('21','22') UNION ALL SELECT A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , B.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_TAGT_CODE , B.CDD_FLFL_SQNO , TRIM(A.CDD_FLFL_DATE) AS CDD_FLFL_DATE , B.CNTT_ADDR_ID , C.CNTY_PHON_CODE_CRYP , C.MOBL_PHON_IDNF_NO_CRYP , C.MOBL_PHON_ECNO_CRYP , C.MOBL_PHON_NO_CRYP , B.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_SECT_CODE FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD A , SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_CNTT_ADDR_IF B , SID.IDO_A_UUE_MOBILE C WHERE A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = B.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND B.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_SECT_CODE = 'MOB' AND B.CNTT_ADDR_ID = C.CNTT_ADDR_ID AND TRIM(A.CDD_FLFL_DATE) IS NOT NULL AND A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE <> '1' -- 12.개인CDD-자택, 13.개인CDD-직장, 14.개인CDD-실제거소 --, 21.법인CDD-사업장, 22.법인CDD-본점 AND B.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_TAGT_CODE IN ('21','22') ) UNION ALL SELECT CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AS RNMCNO , '3' AS CNTC_TYP_CCD , NULL AS AA , NULL AS BB , NULL AS CC , NULL AS DD , NULL AS EE , NULL AS FF , NULL AS GG , NULL AS HH , CASE WHEN TRIM(CNTY_PHON_CODE_CRYP)||TRIM(AREA_CODE_CRYP)||TRIM(PHON_ECNO_CRYP)||TRIM(PHON_NO_CRYP) IS NOT NULL THEN CASE WHEN CDD_CNTT_ADDR_SECT_CODE IN ('MOB') THEN CASE WHEN CDD_CNTT_ADDR_TAGT_CODE = '21' THEN CNTY_PHON_CODE_CRYP ELSE CASE WHEN CDD_CNTT_ADDR_TAGT_CODE = '22' THEN CNTY_PHON_CODE_CRYP ELSE NULL END END ELSE NULL END ELSE NULL END AS II , CASE WHEN TRIM(CNTY_PHON_CODE_CRYP)||TRIM(AREA_CODE_CRYP)||TRIM(PHON_ECNO_CRYP)||TRIM(PHON_NO_CRYP) IS NOT NULL THEN CASE WHEN CDD_CNTT_ADDR_SECT_CODE IN ('MOB') THEN CASE WHEN CDD_CNTT_ADDR_TAGT_CODE = '21' THEN AREA_CODE_CRYP ELSE CASE WHEN CDD_CNTT_ADDR_TAGT_CODE = '22' THEN AREA_CODE_CRYP ELSE NULL END END ELSE NULL END ELSE NULL END AS JJ , CASE WHEN TRIM(CNTY_PHON_CODE_CRYP)||TRIM(AREA_CODE_CRYP)||TRIM(PHON_ECNO_CRYP)||TRIM(PHON_NO_CRYP) IS NOT NULL THEN CASE WHEN CDD_CNTT_ADDR_SECT_CODE IN ('MOB') THEN CASE WHEN CDD_CNTT_ADDR_TAGT_CODE = '22' THEN PHON_ECNO_CRYP ELSE CASE WHEN CDD_CNTT_ADDR_TAGT_CODE = '21' THEN PHON_ECNO_CRYP ELSE NULL END END ELSE NULL END ELSE NULL END AS KK , CASE WHEN TRIM(CNTY_PHON_CODE_CRYP)||TRIM(AREA_CODE_CRYP)||TRIM(PHON_ECNO_CRYP)||TRIM(PHON_NO_CRYP) IS NOT NULL THEN CASE WHEN CDD_CNTT_ADDR_SECT_CODE IN ('MOB') THEN CASE WHEN CDD_CNTT_ADDR_TAGT_CODE = '21' THEN PHON_NO_CRYP ELSE CASE WHEN CDD_CNTT_ADDR_TAGT_CODE = '22' THEN PHON_NO_CRYP ELSE NULL END END ELSE NULL END ELSE NULL END AS LL , CDD_FLFL_DATE FROM (SELECT A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , B.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_TAGT_CODE , B.CDD_FLFL_SQNO , TRIM(A.CDD_FLFL_DATE) AS CDD_FLFL_DATE , B.CNTT_ADDR_ID , C.CNTY_PHON_CODE_CRYP , C.MOBL_PHON_IDNF_NO_CRYP AS AREA_CODE_CRYP , C.MOBL_PHON_ECNO_CRYP AS PHON_ECNO_CRYP , C.MOBL_PHON_NO_CRYP AS PHON_NO_CRYP , B.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_SECT_CODE FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD A , SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_CNTT_ADDR_IF B , SID.IDO_A_UUE_MOBILE C WHERE A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = B.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND B.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_SECT_CODE = 'MOB' AND B.CNTT_ADDR_ID = C.CNTT_ADDR_ID AND TRIM(A.CDD_FLFL_DATE) IS NOT NULL AND A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE <> '1' -- 12.개인CDD-자택, 13.개인CDD-직장, 14.개인CDD-실제거소 --, 21.법인CDD-사업장, 22.법인CDD-본점 AND B.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_TAGT_CODE IN ('21','22') ) ) P GROUP BY P.RNMCNO, P.CNTC_TYP_CCD ) SELECT RNMCNO , CNTC_TYP_CCD , MAX(CNTY_NATI_CRYP) KEEP(DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY RNMCNO, CNTC_TYP_CCD) AS CNTY_NATI_CRYP , MAX(CNTY_AREA_CRYP) KEEP(DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY RNMCNO, CNTC_TYP_CCD) AS CNTY_ECNO_CRYP , MAX(CNTY_ECNO_CRYP) KEEP(DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY RNMCNO, CNTC_TYP_CCD) AS CNTY_ECNO_CRYP , MAX(CNTY_NO_CRYP) KEEP(DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY RNMCNO, CNTC_TYP_CCD) AS CNTY_NO_CRYP , SYSDATE AS AML_CRT_DT , 'BATCH' AS AML_HNDL_P_ENO FROM (SELECT /*+ FULL(T1) PARALLEL(T1 8) */ T1.RNMCNO , CASE WHEN T2.CDD_FLFL_DATE IS NOT NULL THEN CASE WHEN T1.NDVL_INSN_TYPE_CODE = 'IN' THEN CASE WHEN T3.CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_DATE IS NOT NULL AND TO_DATE(T2.CDD_FLFL_DATE,'YYYYMMDD') >= TO_DATE(T3.CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_DATE,'YYYYMMDD') AND TRIM(T2.CNTC_TYP_CCD) IS NOT NULL THEN T2.CNTC_TYP_CCD WHEN T4.CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_DATE IS NOT NULL AND TO_DATE(T2.CDD_FLFL_DATE,'YYYYMMDD') >= TO_DATE(T4.CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_DATE,'YYYYMMDD') AND TRIM(T2.CNTC_TYP_CCD) IS NOT NULL THEN T2.CNTC_TYP_CCD WHEN T5.CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_DATE IS NOT NULL AND TO_DATE(T2.CDD_FLFL_DATE,'YYYYMMDD') >= TO_DATE(T5.CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_DATE,'YYYYMMDD') -- 20240620 SHJ 모바일데이터 최신내역으로 반영 AND TRIM(T2.CNTC_TYP_CCD) IS NOT NULL THEN T2.CNTC_TYP_CCD ELSE T1.CNTC_TYP_CCD END WHEN T1.NDVL_INSN_TYPE_CODE <> 'IN' THEN CASE WHEN T4.CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_DATE IS NOT NULL THEN CASE WHEN TO_DATE(T4.CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_DATE,'YYYYMMDD') > TO_DATE(T2.CDD_FLFL_DATE,'YYYYMMDD') THEN T1.CNTC_TYP_CCD ELSE T2.CNTC_TYP_CCD END WHEN T5.CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_DATE IS NOT NULL THEN CASE WHEN TO_DATE(T5.CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_DATE,'YYYYMMDD') > TO_DATE(T2.CDD_FLFL_DATE,'YYYYMMDD') THEN T1.CNTC_TYP_CCD ELSE T2.CNTC_TYP_CCD END ELSE NVL(TRIM(T2.CNTC_TYP_CCD),T1.CNTC_TYP_CCD) END ELSE T1.CNTC_TYP_CCD END ELSE T1.CNTC_TYP_CCD END AS CNTC_TYP_CCD , CASE WHEN T2.CDD_FLFL_DATE IS NOT NULL THEN CASE WHEN T1.NDVL_INSN_TYPE_CODE = 'IN' THEN CASE WHEN T3.CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_DATE IS NOT NULL AND TO_DATE(T2.CDD_FLFL_DATE,'YYYYMMDD') >= TO_DATE(T3.CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_DATE,'YYYYMMDD') AND TRIM(T2.CNTY_NATI_CRYP) IS NOT NULL THEN T2.CNTY_NATI_CRYP WHEN T4.CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_DATE IS NOT NULL AND TO_DATE(T2.CDD_FLFL_DATE,'YYYYMMDD') >= TO_DATE(T4.CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_DATE,'YYYYMMDD') AND TRIM(T2.CNTY_NATI_CRYP) IS NOT NULL THEN T2.CNTY_NATI_CRYP WHEN T5.CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_DATE IS NOT NULL AND TO_DATE(T2.CDD_FLFL_DATE,'YYYYMMDD') >= TO_DATE(T5.CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_DATE,'YYYYMMDD') AND TRIM(T2.CNTY_NATI_CRYP) IS NOT NULL THEN T2.CNTY_NATI_CRYP
ELSE T1.CNTY_NATI_CRYP END WHEN T1.NDVL_INSN_TYPE_CODE <> 'IN' THEN CASE WHEN T4.CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_DATE IS NOT NULL THEN CASE WHEN TO_DATE(T4.CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_DATE,'YYYYMMDD') > TO_DATE(T2.CDD_FLFL_DATE,'YYYYMMDD') THEN T1.CNTY_NATI_CRYP ELSE T2.CNTY_NATI_CRYP END WHEN T5.CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_DATE IS NOT NULL THEN CASE WHEN TO_DATE(T5.CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_DATE,'YYYYMMDD') > TO_DATE(T2.CDD_FLFL_DATE,'YYYYMMDD') THEN T1.CNTY_NATI_CRYP ELSE T2.CNTY_NATI_CRYP END ELSE NVL(TRIM(T2.CNTY_NATI_CRYP),T1.CNTY_NATI_CRYP) END ELSE T1.CNTY_NO_CRYP END ELSE T1.CNTY_NATI_CRYP END AS CNTY_NATI_CRYP , CASE WHEN T2.CDD_FLFL_DATE IS NOT NULL THEN CASE WHEN T1.NDVL_INSN_TYPE_CODE = 'IN' THEN CASE WHEN T3.CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_DATE IS NOT NULL AND TO_DATE(T2.CDD_FLFL_DATE,'YYYYMMDD') >= TO_DATE(T3.CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_DATE,'YYYYMMDD') AND TRIM(T2.CNTY_AREA_CRYP) IS NOT NULL THEN T2.CNTY_AREA_CRYP WHEN T4.CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_DATE IS NOT NULL AND TO_DATE(T2.CDD_FLFL_DATE,'YYYYMMDD') >= TO_DATE(T4.CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_DATE,'YYYYMMDD') AND TRIM(T2.CNTY_AREA_CRYP) IS NOT NULL THEN T2.CNTY_AREA_CRYP WHEN T5.CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_DATE IS NOT NULL AND TO_DATE(T2.CDD_FLFL_DATE,'YYYYMMDD') >= TO_DATE(T5.CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_DATE,'YYYYMMDD') AND TRIM(T2.CNTY_AREA_CRYP) IS NOT NULL THEN T2.CNTY_AREA_CRYP
ELSE T1.CNTY_AREA_CRYP END WHEN T1.NDVL_INSN_TYPE_CODE <> 'IN' THEN CASE WHEN T4.CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_DATE IS NOT NULL THEN CASE WHEN TO_DATE(T4.CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_DATE,'YYYYMMDD') > TO_DATE(T2.CDD_FLFL_DATE,'YYYYMMDD') THEN T1.CNTY_AREA_CRYP ELSE T2.CNTY_AREA_CRYP END WHEN T5.CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_DATE IS NOT NULL THEN CASE WHEN TO_DATE(T5.CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_DATE,'YYYYMMDD') > TO_DATE(T2.CDD_FLFL_DATE,'YYYYMMDD') THEN T1.CNTY_AREA_CRYP ELSE T2.CNTY_AREA_CRYP END ELSE NVL(TRIM(T2.CNTY_AREA_CRYP),T1.CNTY_AREA_CRYP) END ELSE T1.CNTY_NO_CRYP END ELSE T1.CNTY_AREA_CRYP END AS CNTY_AREA_CRYP , CASE WHEN T2.CDD_FLFL_DATE IS NOT NULL THEN CASE WHEN T1.NDVL_INSN_TYPE_CODE = 'IN' THEN CASE WHEN T3.CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_DATE IS NOT NULL AND TO_DATE(T2.CDD_FLFL_DATE,'YYYYMMDD') >= TO_DATE(T3.CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_DATE,'YYYYMMDD') AND TRIM(T2.CNTY_ECNO_CRYP) IS NOT NULL THEN T2.CNTY_ECNO_CRYP WHEN T4.CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_DATE IS NOT NULL AND TO_DATE(T2.CDD_FLFL_DATE,'YYYYMMDD') >= TO_DATE(T4.CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_DATE,'YYYYMMDD') AND TRIM(T2.CNTY_ECNO_CRYP) IS NOT NULL THEN T2.CNTY_ECNO_CRYP WHEN T5.CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_DATE IS NOT NULL AND TO_DATE(T2.CDD_FLFL_DATE,'YYYYMMDD') >= TO_DATE(T5.CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_DATE,'YYYYMMDD') AND TRIM(T2.CNTY_ECNO_CRYP) IS NOT NULL THEN T2.CNTY_ECNO_CRYP ELSE T1.CNTY_ECNO_CRYP END WHEN T1.NDVL_INSN_TYPE_CODE <> 'IN' THEN CASE WHEN T4.CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_DATE IS NOT NULL THEN CASE WHEN TO_DATE(T4.CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_DATE,'YYYYMMDD') > TO_DATE(T2.CDD_FLFL_DATE,'YYYYMMDD') THEN T1.CNTY_ECNO_CRYP ELSE T2.CNTY_ECNO_CRYP END WHEN NVL(TRIM(T2.CNTY_ECNO_CRYP),T1.CNTY_ECNO_CRYP) END ELSE T1.CNTY_NO_CRYP END ELSE T1.CNTY_ECNO_CRYP END AS CNTY_ECNO_CRYP , CASE WHEN T2.CDD_FLFL_DATE IS NOT NULL THEN CASE WHEN T1.NDVL_INSN_TYPE_CODE = 'IN' THEN CASE WHEN T3.CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_DATE IS NOT NULL AND TO_DATE(T2.CDD_FLFL_DATE,'YYYYMMDD') >= TO_DATE(T3.CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_DATE,'YYYYMMDD') AND TRIM(T2.CNTY_NO_CRYP) IS NOT NULL THEN T2.CNTY_NO_CRYP WHEN T4.CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_DATE IS NOT NULL AND TO_DATE(T2.CDD_FLFL_DATE,'YYYYMMDD') >= TO_DATE(T4.CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_DATE,'YYYYMMDD') AND TRIM(T2.CNTY_NO_CRYP) IS NOT NULL THEN T2.CNTY_NO_CRYP ELSE T1.CNTY_NO_CRYP END WHEN T1.NDVL_INSN_TYPE_CODE <> 'IN' THEN CASE WHEN T4.CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_DATE IS NOT NULL THEN CASE WHEN TO_DATE(T4.CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_DATE,'YYYYMMDD') > TO_DATE(T2.CDD_FLFL_DATE,'YYYYMMDD') THEN T1.CNTY_NO_CRYP ELSE T2.CNTY_NO_CRYP END WHEN T5.CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_DATE IS NOT NULL THEN CASE WHEN TO_DATE(T5.CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_DATE,'YYYYMMDD') > TO_DATE(T2.CDD_FLFL_DATE,'YYYYMMDD') THEN T1.CNTY_NO_CRYP ELSE T2.CNTY_NO_CRYP END ELSE NVL(TRIM(T2.CNTY_NO_CRYP),T1.CNTY_NO_CRYP) END ELSE T1.CNTY_NO_CRYP END ELSE T1.CNTY_NO_CRYP END AS CNTY_NO_CRYP FROM (SELECT /*+ LEADING(A) FULL(A) PARALLEL(A 8) */ B.ENTY_ID AS RNMCNO /* 고객엔티티ID */ , CASE WHEN D1.ENCT_TYPE_CODE IN ('PS','HQ') THEN '1' ELSE '2' END AS CNTC_TYP_CCD /* 연락유형코드 */ , D2.CNTY_PHON_CODE_CRYP AS CNTY_NATI_CRYP /* 국가전화번호암호문 */ , D2.AREA_CODE_CRYP AS CNTY_AREA_CRYP /* 전화식별번호암호문 */ , D2.PHON_ECNO_CRYP AS CNTY_ECNO_CRYP /* 전화국번호암호문 */ , D2.PHON_NO_CRYP AS CNTY_NO_CRYP /* 전화번호암호문 */ , NVL(TRIM(X.RGSN_DATE), TO_CHAR(X.PRCE_DATE_TIME,'YYYYMMDD')) AS RGSN_DATE , S1.NDVL_INSN_TYPE_CODE AS NDVL_INSN_TYPE_CODE FROM SID.IDO_A_UUE_LEGAL_ENTY X , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_ADDN_IFMN A , SID.IDO_A_UUF_CLNT_BSC S1 /* NDVL_INSN_TYPE_CODE */ , SID.IDO_A_UUE_CLIENT_ENTY_ALIAS B , SID.IDO_A_UUE_ENTY_CONTACT D1 , SID.IDO_A_UUE_PHONE D2 WHERE X.ENTY_ID = A.CLNT_ENTY_ID AND A.CLNT_ENTY_ID = B.ENTY_ID AND A.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE = B.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE AND B.ENTY_ID = D1.ENTY_ID AND D1.CNTT_ADDR_ID = D2.CNTT_ADDR_ID AND D1.CNTT_ADDR_BSWR_TYPE_CODE = 'CLNT' /* 연락처업무유형코드('CLNT':고객) */ -- AND D1.ENCT_TYPE_CODE IN ('PS','OF') /* 엔티티연락처유형코드['PS':개인(자택), 'OF':직장, 'HQ':본사] */ AND S1.NDVL_INSN_TYPE_CODE = 'IN' AND D1.CNTT_ADDR_TYPE_CODE = 'TEL' /* 연락처유형코드('TEL':전화번호) */ AND A.CLNT_ENTY_ID = S1.ENTY_ID UNION ALL SELECT /*+ LEADING(A) FULL(A) PARALLEL(A 8) */ B.ENTY_ID AS RNMCNO /* 고객엔티티ID */ , '3' AS CNTC_TYP_CCD , D2.CNTY_PHON_CODE_CRYP AS CNTY_NATI_CRYP /* 국가전화번호암호문 */ , D2.MOBL_PHON_IDNF_NO_CRYP AS CNTY_AREA_CRYP /* 전화식별번호암호문 */ , D2.MOBL_PHON_ECNO_CRYP AS CNTY_ECNO_CRYP /* 전화국번호암호문 */ , D2.MOBL_PHON_NO_CRYP AS CNTY_NO_CRYP /* 전화번호암호문 */ , NVL(TRIM(X.RGSN_DATE), TO_CHAR(X.PRCE_DATE_TIME,'YYYYMMDD')) AS RGSN_DATE , S1.NDVL_INSN_TYPE_CODE AS NDVL_INSN_TYPE_CODE FROM SID.IDO_A_UUE_LEGAL_ENTY X , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_ADDN_IFMN A , SID.IDO_A_UUF_CLNT_BSC S1 /* NDVL_INSN_TYPE_CODE */ , SID.IDO_A_UUE_CLIENT_ENTY_ALIAS B , SID.IDO_A_UUE_ENTY_CONTACT D1 , SID.IDO_A_UUE_MOBILE D2 WHERE X.ENTY_ID = A.CLNT_ENTY_ID AND A.CLNT_ENTY_ID = B.ENTY_ID AND A.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE = B.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE AND B.ENTY_ID = D1.ENTY_ID AND D1.CNTT_ADDR_ID = D2.CNTT_ADDR_ID AND D1.CNTT_ADDR_BSWR_TYPE_CODE = 'CLNT' /* 연락처업무유형코드('CLNT':고객) */ AND D1.CNTT_ADDR_TYPE_CODE = 'MOB' /* 연락처유형코드('MOB':휴대전화) */ AND S1.NDVL_INSN_TYPE_CODE = 'IN' AND A.CLNT_ENTY_ID = S1.ENTY_ID UNION ALL SELECT RNMCNO , CNTC_TYP_CCD , MAX(AA||EE||II) KEEP(DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY RNMCNO) AS CNTY_NATI_CRYP , MAX(BB||FF||JJ) KEEP(DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY RNMCNO) AS CNTY_AREA_CRYP , MAX(CC||GG||KK) KEEP(DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY RNMCNO) AS CNTY_ECNO_CRYP , MAX(DD||HH||LL) KEEP(DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY RNMCNO) AS CNTY_NO_CRYP , RGSN_DATE , NDVL_INSN_TYPE_CODE FROM (SELECT /*+ LEADING(A) FULL(A) PARALLEL(A 8) */ ENTY_ID AS RNMCNO /* 고객엔티티ID */ , '1' AS CNTC_TYP_CCD , CASE WHEN TRIM(CNTY_NATI_CRYP)||TRIM(CNTY_AREA_CRYP)||TRIM(CNTY_ECNO_CRYP)||TRIM(CNTY_NO_CRYP) IS NOT NULL THEN CASE WHEN ENCT_TYPE_CODE = 'OF' THEN CNTY_NATI_CRYP ELSE CASE WHEN ENCT_TYPE_CODE = 'PS' THEN CNTY_NATI_CRYP ELSE CASE WHEN ENCT_TYPE_CODE = 'MB' THEN CNTY_NATI_CRYP ELSE NULL END END END END AS AA , CASE WHEN TRIM(CNTY_NATI_CRYP)||TRIM(CNTY_AREA_CRYP)||TRIM(CNTY_ECNO_CRYP)||TRIM(CNTY_NO_CRYP) IS NOT NULL THEN CASE WHEN ENCT_TYPE_CODE = 'OF' THEN CNTY_AREA_CRYP ELSE CASE WHEN ENCT_TYPE_CODE = 'PS' THEN CNTY_AREA_CRYP ELSE CASE WHEN ENCT_TYPE_CODE = 'MB' THEN CNTY_AREA_CRYP ELSE NULL END END END END AS BB , CASE WHEN TRIM(CNTY_NATI_CRYP)||TRIM(CNTY_AREA_CRYP)||TRIM(CNTY_ECNO_CRYP)||TRIM(CNTY_NO_CRYP) IS NOT NULL THEN CASE WHEN ENCT_TYPE_CODE = 'OF' THEN CNTY_ECNO_CRYP ELSE CASE WHEN ENCT_TYPE_CODE = 'PS' THEN CNTY_ECNO_CRYP ELSE CASE WHEN ENCT_TYPE_CODE = 'MB' THEN CNTY_ECNO_CRYP ELSE NULL END END END END AS CC , CASE WHEN TRIM(CNTY_NATI_CRYP)||TRIM(CNTY_AREA_CRYP)||TRIM(CNTY_ECNO_CRYP)||TRIM(CNTY_NO_CRYP) IS NOT NULL THEN CASE WHEN ENCT_TYPE_CODE = 'OF' THEN CNTY_NO_CRYP ELSE CASE WHEN ENCT_TYPE_CODE = 'PS' THEN CNTY_NO_CRYP ELSE CASE WHEN ENCT_TYPE_CODE = 'MB' THEN CNTY_NO_CRYP ELSE NULL END END END END AS DD , NULL AS EE , NULL AS FF , NULL AS GG , NULL AS HH , NULL AS II , NULL AS JJ , NULL AS KK , NULL AS LL , RGSN_DATE , NDVL_INSN_TYPE_CODE FROM ( SELECT /*+ LEADING(A) FULL(A) PARALLEL(8) */ B.ENTY_ID /* 고객엔티티ID */ , D1.ENCT_TYPE_CODE , D2.CNTY_PHON_CODE_CRYP AS CNTY_NATI_CRYP /* 국가전화번호암호문 */ , D2.AREA_CODE_CRYP AS CNTY_AREA_CRYP /* 전화식별번호암호문 */ , D2.PHON_ECNO_CRYP AS CNTY_ECNO_CRYP /* 전화국번호암호문 */ , D2.PHON_NO_CRYP AS CNTY_NO_CRYP /* 전화번호암호문 */ , NVL(TRIM(X.RGSN_DATE), TO_CHAR(X.PRCE_DATE_TIME,'YYYYMMDD')) AS RGSN_DATE , S1.NDVL_INSN_TYPE_CODE AS NDVL_INSN_TYPE_CODE FROM SID.IDO_A_UUE_LEGAL_ENTY X , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_ADDN_IFMN A , SID.IDO_A_UUF_CLNT_BSC S1 /* NDVL_INSN_TYPE_CODE */ , SID.IDO_A_UUE_CLIENT_ENTY_ALIAS B , SID.IDO_A_UUE_ENTY_CONTACT D1 , SID.IDO_A_UUE_PHONE D2 WHERE X.ENTY_ID = A.CLNT_ENTY_ID AND A.CLNT_ENTY_ID = B.ENTY_ID AND A.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE = B.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE AND B.ENTY_ID = D1.ENTY_ID AND D1.CNTT_ADDR_ID = D2.CNTT_ADDR_ID AND D1.CNTT_ADDR_BSWR_TYPE_CODE = 'CLNT' /* 연락처업무유형코드('CLNT':고객) */ AND S1.NDVL_INSN_TYPE_CODE <> 'IN' -- AND D1.ENCT_TYPE_CODE IN ('PS','OF') /* 엔티티연락처유형코드['PS':개인(자택), 'OF':직장, 'HQ':본사] */ AND D1.CNTT_ADDR_TYPE_CODE = 'TEL' /* 연락처유형코드('TEL':전화번호) */ AND A.CLNT_ENTY_ID = S1.ENTY_ID UNION ALL SELECT /*+ LEADING(A) FULL(A) PARALLEL(8) */ B.ENTY_ID AS RNMCNO /* 고객엔티티ID */ , 'MB' AS ENCT_TYPE_CODE , D2.CNTY_PHON_CODE_CRYP AS CNTY_NATI_CRYP /* 국가전화번호암호문 */ , D2.MOBL_PHON_IDNF_NO_CRYP AS CNTY_AREA_CRYP /* 전화식별번호암호문 */ , D2.MOBL_PHON_ECNO_CRYP AS CNTY_ECNO_CRYP /* 전화국번호암호문 */ , D2.MOBL_PHON_NO_CRYP AS CNTY_NO_CRYP /* 전화번호암호문 */ , NVL(TRIM(X.RGSN_DATE), TO_CHAR(X.PRCE_DATE_TIME,'YYYYMMDD')) AS RGSN_DATE , S1.NDVL_INSN_TYPE_CODE AS NDVL_INSN_TYPE_CODE FROM SID.IDO_A_UUE_LEGAL_ENTY X , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_ADDN_IFMN A , SID.IDO_A_UUF_CLNT_BSC S1 /* NDVL_INSN_TYPE_CODE */ , SID.IDO_A_UUE_CLIENT_ENTY_ALIAS B , SID.IDO_A_UUE_ENTY_CONTACT D1 , SID.IDO_A_UUE_MOBILE D2 WHERE X.ENTY_ID = A.CLNT_ENTY_ID AND A.CLNT_ENTY_ID = B.ENTY_ID AND A.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE = B.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE AND B.ENTY_ID = D1.ENTY_ID AND D1.CNTT_ADDR_ID = D2.CNTT_ADDR_ID AND D1.CNTT_ADDR_BSWR_TYPE_CODE = 'CLNT' /* 연락처업무유형코드('CLNT':고객) */ AND D1.CNTT_ADDR_TYPE_CODE = 'MOB' /* 연락처유형코드('MOB':휴대전화) */ AND S1.NDVL_INSN_TYPE_CODE <> 'IN' AND A.CLNT_ENTY_ID = S1.ENTY_ID ) UNION ALL SELECT ENTY_ID , '2' AS CNTC_TYP_CD , NULL AS AA , NULL AS BB , NULL AS CC , NULL AS DD , CASE WHEN TRIM(CNTY_NATI_CRYP)||TRIM(CNTY_AREA_CRYP)||TRIM(CNTY_ECNO_CRYP)||TRIM(CNTY_NO_CRYP) IS NOT NULL THEN CASE WHEN ENCT_TYPE_CODE = 'OF' THEN CNTY_NATI_CRYP ELSE CASE WHEN ENCT_TYPE_CODE = 'PS' THEN CNTY_NATI_CRYP ELSE CASE WHEN ENCT_TYPE_CODE = 'MB' THEN CNTY_NATI_CRYP ELSE NULL END END END END AS EE , CASE WHEN TRIM(CNTY_NATI_CRYP)||TRIM(CNTY_AREA_CRYP)||TRIM(CNTY_ECNO_CRYP)||TRIM(CNTY_NO_CRYP) IS NOT NULL THEN CASE WHEN ENCT_TYPE_CODE = 'OF' THEN CNTY_AREA_CRYP ELSE CASE WHEN ENCT_TYPE_CODE = 'PS' THEN CNTY_AREA_CRYP ELSE CASE WHEN ENCT_TYPE_CODE = 'MB' THEN CNTY_AREA_CRYP ELSE NULL END END END END AS FF , CASE WHEN TRIM(CNTY_NATI_CRYP)||TRIM(CNTY_AREA_CRYP)||TRIM(CNTY_ECNO_CRYP)||TRIM(CNTY_NO_CRYP) IS NOT NULL THEN CASE WHEN ENCT_TYPE_CODE = 'OF' THEN CNTY_ECNO_CRYP ELSE CASE WHEN ENCT_TYPE_CODE = 'PS' THEN CNTY_ECNO_CRYP ELSE CASE WHEN ENCT_TYPE_CODE = 'MB' THEN CNTY_ECNO_CRYP ELSE NULL END END END END AS GG , CASE WHEN TRIM(CNTY_NATI_CRYP)||TRIM(CNTY_AREA_CRYP)||TRIM(CNTY_ECNO_CRYP)||TRIM(CNTY_NO_CRYP) IS NOT NULL THEN CASE WHEN ENCT_TYPE_CODE = 'OF' THEN CNTY_NO_CRYP ELSE CASE WHEN ENCT_TYPE_CODE = 'PS' THEN CNTY_NO_CRYP ELSE CASE WHEN ENCT_TYPE_CODE = 'MB' THEN CNTY_NO_CRYP ELSE NULL END END END END AS HH , NULL AS II , NULL AS JJ , NULL AS KK , NULL AS LL , RGSN_DATE , NDVL_INSN_TYPE_CODE FROM ( SELECT /*+ LEADING(A) USE_HASH(X A B) FULL(A) PARALLEL(4) */ B.ENTY_ID /* 고객엔티티ID */ , D1.ENCT_TYPE_CODE , D2.CNTY_PHON_CODE_CRYP AS CNTY_NATI_CRYP /* 국가전화번호암호문 */ , D2.AREA_CODE_CRYP AS CNTY_AREA_CRYP /* 전화식별번호암호문 */ , D2.PHON_ECNO_CRYP AS CNTY_ECNO_CRYP /* 전화국번호암호문 */ , D2.PHON_NO_CRYP AS CNTY_NO_CRYP /* 전화번호암호문 */ , NVL(TRIM(X.RGSN_DATE), TO_CHAR(X.PRCE_DATE_TIME,'YYYYMMDD')) AS RGSN_DATE , S1.NDVL_INSN_TYPE_CODE AS NDVL_INSN_TYPE_CODE FROM SID.IDO_A_UUE_LEGAL_ENTY X , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_ADDN_IFMN A , SID.IDO_A_UUF_CLNT_BSC S1 /* NDVL_INSN_TYPE_CODE */ , SID.IDO_A_UUE_CLIENT_ENTY_ALIAS B , SID.IDO_A_UUE_ENTY_CONTACT D1 , SID.IDO_A_UUE_PHONE D2 WHERE X.ENTY_ID = A.CLNT_ENTY_ID AND A.CLNT_ENTY_ID = B.ENTY_ID AND A.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE = B.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE AND B.ENTY_ID = D1.ENTY_ID AND D1.CNTT_ADDR_ID = D2.CNTT_ADDR_ID AND D1.CNTT_ADDR_BSWR_TYPE_CODE = 'CLNT' /* 연락처업무유형코드('CLNT':고객) */ AND S1.NDVL_INSN_TYPE_CODE <> 'IN' -- AND D1.ENCT_TYPE_CODE IN ('PS','OF') /* 엔티티연락처유형코드['PS':개인(자택), 'OF':직장, 'HQ':본사] */ AND D1.CNTT_ADDR_TYPE_CODE = 'TEL' /* 연락처유형코드('TEL':전화번호) */ AND A.CLNT_ENTY_ID = S1.ENTY_ID UNION ALL SELECT /*+ LEADING(A) USE_HASH(X A B) FULL(A) PARALLEL(4) */ B.ENTY_ID AS RNMCNO /* 고객엔티티ID */ , 'MB' AS ENCT_TYPE_CODE , D2.CNTY_PHON_CODE_CRYP AS CNTY_NATI_CRYP /* 국가전화번호암호문 */ , D2.MOBL_PHON_IDNF_NO_CRYP AS CNTY_AREA_CRYP /* 전화식별번호암호문 */ , D2.MOBL_PHON_ECNO_CRYP AS CNTY_ECNO_CRYP /* 전화국번호암호문 */ , D2.MOBL_PHON_NO_CRYP AS CNTY_NO_CRYP /* 전화번호암호문 */ , NVL(TRIM(X.RGSN_DATE), TO_CHAR(X.PRCE_DATE_TIME,'YYYYMMDD')) AS RGSN_DATE , S1.NDVL_INSN_TYPE_CODE AS NDVL_INSN_TYPE_CODE FROM SID.IDO_A_UUE_LEGAL_ENTY X , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_ADDN_IFMN A , SID.IDO_A_UUF_CLNT_BSC S1 /* NDVL_INSN_TYPE_CODE */ , SID.IDO_A_UUE_CLIENT_ENTY_ALIAS B , SID.IDO_A_UUE_ENTY_CONTACT D1 , SID.IDO_A_UUE_MOBILE D2 WHERE X.ENTY_ID = A.CLNT_ENTY_ID AND A.CLNT_ENTY_ID = B.ENTY_ID AND A.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE = B.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE AND B.ENTY_ID = D1.ENTY_ID AND D1.CNTT_ADDR_ID = D2.CNTT_ADDR_ID AND D1.CNTT_ADDR_BSWR_TYPE_CODE = 'CLNT' /* 연락처업무유형코드('CLNT':고객) */ AND D1.CNTT_ADDR_TYPE_CODE = 'MOB' /* 연락처유형코드('MOB':휴대전화) */ AND S1.NDVL_INSN_TYPE_CODE <> 'IN' AND A.CLNT_ENTY_ID = S1.ENTY_ID ) UNION ALL SELECT RNMCNO , '3' AS CNTC_TYP_CD , NULL AS AA , NULL AS BB , NULL AS CC , NULL AS DD , NULL AS EE , NULL AS FF , NULL AS GG , NULL AS HH , CNTY_NATI_CRYP AS II , CNTY_AREA_CRYP AS JJ , CNTY_ECNO_CRYP AS KK , CNTY_NO_CRYP AS LL , RGSN_DATE , NDVL_INSN_TYPE_CODE FROM ( SELECT /*+ LEADING(A) USE_HASH(X A B) FULL(A) PARALLEL(4) */ B.ENTY_ID AS RNMCNO /* 고객엔티티ID */ , 'MB' AS ENCT_TYPE_CODE , D2.CNTY_PHON_CODE_CRYP AS CNTY_NATI_CRYP /* 국가전화번호암호문 */ , D2.MOBL_PHON_IDNF_NO_CRYP AS CNTY_AREA_CRYP /* 전화식별번호암호문 */ , D2.MOBL_PHON_ECNO_CRYP AS CNTY_ECNO_CRYP /* 전화국번호암호문 */ , D2.MOBL_PHON_NO_CRYP AS CNTY_NO_CRYP /* 전화번호암호문 */ , NVL(TRIM(X.RGSN_DATE), TO_CHAR(X.PRCE_DATE_TIME,'YYYYMMDD')) AS RGSN_DATE , S1.NDVL_INSN_TYPE_CODE AS NDVL_INSN_TYPE_CODE FROM SID.IDO_A_UUE_LEGAL_ENTY X , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_ADDN_IFMN A , SID.IDO_A_UUF_CLNT_BSC S1 /* NDVL_INSN_TYPE_CODE */ , SID.IDO_A_UUE_CLIENT_ENTY_ALIAS B , SID.IDO_A_UUE_ENTY_CONTACT D1 , SID.IDO_A_UUE_MOBILE D2 WHERE X.ENTY_ID = A.CLNT_ENTY_ID AND A.CLNT_ENTY_ID = B.ENTY_ID AND A.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE = B.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE AND B.ENTY_ID = D1.ENTY_ID AND D1.CNTT_ADDR_ID = D2.CNTT_ADDR_ID AND D1.CNTT_ADDR_BSWR_TYPE_CODE = 'CLNT' /* 연락처업무유형코드('CLNT':고객) */ AND D1.CNTT_ADDR_TYPE_CODE = 'MOB' /* 연락처유형코드('MOB':휴대전화) */ AND S1.NDVL_INSN_TYPE_CODE <> 'IN' AND A.CLNT_ENTY_ID = S1.ENTY_ID ) ) GROUP BY RNMCNO , CNTC_TYP_CCD, RGSN_DATE, NDVL_INSN_TYPE_CODE ) T1, T2 , (SELECT /*+ FULL(F) PARALLEL(F 4) */ F.CLNT_ENTY_ID , '1' AS CNTC_TYP_CCD , MAX(F.CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_DATE) KEEP (DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY F.CLNT_ENTY_ID, F.CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_DATE DESC) AS CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_DATE , MAX(TRIM(CLNT_IFMN_AFCH_CTNT)) KEEP (DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY F.CLNT_ENTY_ID, F.CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_DATE DESC) AS CLNT_IFMN_AFCH_CTNT FROM SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_ACNT_INF_CHG F WHERE F.CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_ITEM_CODE IN ('26') -- 전화번호(자택) AND TRIM(CLNT_IFMN_AFCH_CTNT) IS NOT NULL GROUP BY F.CLNT_ENTY_ID ) T3 , (SELECT /*+ FULL(F) PARALLEL(F 4) */ F.CLNT_ENTY_ID , '2' AS CNTC_TYP_CCD , MAX(F.CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_DATE) KEEP (DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY F.CLNT_ENTY_ID, F.CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_DATE DESC) AS CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_DATE , MAX(TRIM(CLNT_IFMN_AFCH_CTNT)) KEEP (DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY F.CLNT_ENTY_ID, F.CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_DATE DESC) AS CLNT_IFMN_AFCH_CTNT FROM SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_ACNT_INF_CHG F WHERE F.CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_ITEM_CODE IN ('27') -- 전화번호(직장) AND TRIM(CLNT_IFMN_AFCH_CTNT) IS NOT NULL GROUP BY F.CLNT_ENTY_ID ) T4 , (SELECT /*+ FULL(F) PARALLEL(F 4) */ F.CLNT_ENTY_ID , '3' AS CNTC_TYP_CCD , MAX(F.CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_DATE) KEEP (DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY F.CLNT_ENTY_ID, F.CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_DATE DESC) AS CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_DATE , MAX(TRIM(CLNT_IFMN_AFCH_CTNT)) KEEP (DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY F.CLNT_ENTY_ID, F.CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_DATE DESC) AS CLNT_IFMN_AFCH_CTNT FROM SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_ACNT_INF_CHG F WHERE F.CLNT_IFMN_CHAN_ITEM_CODE IN ('06') -- 휴대전화번호 AND TRIM(CLNT_IFMN_AFCH_CTNT) IS NOT NULL GROUP BY F.CLNT_ENTY_ID ) T5 WHERE T1.RNMCNO = T2.RNMCNO (+) AND T1.RNMCNO = T3.CLNT_ENTY_ID (+) AND T1.CNTC_TYP_CCD = T3.CNTC_TYP_CCD (+) AND T1.RNMCNO = T4.CLNT_ENTY_ID (+) AND T1.CNTC_TYP_CCD = T4.CNTC_TYP_CCD (+) AND T1.RNMCNO = T5.CLNT_ENTY_ID (+) AND T1.CNTC_TYP_CCD = T5.CNTC_TYP_CCD (+) ) GROUP BY RNMCNO , CNTC_TYP_CCD UNION ALL SELECT D.RNMCNO , D.CNTC_TYP_CCD , D.CNTY_NATI_CRYP , D.CNTY_AREA_CRYP , D.CNTY_ECNO_CRYP , D.CNTY_NO_CRYP , SYSDATE AS AML_CRT_DT , 'BATCH' AS AML_HNDL_P_ENO FROM T2 D WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_ADDN_IFMN A WHERE A.CLNT_ENTY_ID = D.RNMCNO)

MERGE INTO SSQ.NIC17B A USING ( SELECT M.ACNT_ID AS GNL_AC_NO /* 1 계좌번호 */ , CASE WHEN M.ACNT_STAS_TYPE_CODE = 'AC' THEN '1' ELSE '2' END AS AC_ST_CCD /* 2 계좌상태구분코드 */ , M.ACNT_OWNR_ID AS RNMCNO /* 3 고객엔티티ID */ , NVL(TRIM(M2.ACNT_OPNG_DATE),M.OPNG_DATE) AS AC_OPN_DT /* 4 계좌개설일자 */ , A1.NDVL_TRDG_PRPS_CODE AS AC_RE_OBJ_CCD /* 5 계좌개설목적코드 */ , NVL(TRIM(B23.DTBR_CODE),B21.DTBR_CODE) AS OPN_BRN_CD /* 8 개설지점코드 : 2019.05.24 개설지점 없는 경우 관리지점으로 입력 */ , M.CLSG_DATE AS CLSD_DT /* 9 폐쇄일자 */ , SYSDATE AS AML_CRT_DT /* 10 AML생성일자 */ , 'BATCH' AS AML_HNDL_P_ENO /* 11 AML처리자사번 */ , M.ACNT_TYPE_CODE AS AC_TY_CD /* 12 계좌유형코드 */ , B21.DTBR_CODE AS MNGG_BRN_CD /* 13 관리지점코드 */ , B22.DTBR_CODE AS PRFT_BRN_CD /* 14 실적지점코드 */ , TRIM(M.ACNT_NO_CRYP) AS ACNT_NO /* 15 계좌번호암호문 */ FROM SID.IDO_A_UUA_ACNT M /* IDO_A_Account_Account */ , SID.IDO_A_MAA_ACNT_OPNG M2 , SID.IDO_A_MAH_EDD_FLFL_DTLD A1 /* EDD원장 */ , SID.IDO_A_UUE_SAMSUNG_DPRT B21 /* 관리지점코드 추출용 */ , SID.IDO_A_UUE_SAMSUNG_DPRT B22 /* 실적지점코드 추출용 */ , SID.IDO_A_UUE_SAMSUNG_DPRT B23 /* 개설지점코드 추출용 */
, SID.IDO_A_UUN_OPNG_DTLS M3 , SID.IDO_A_UUD_ORGZ_BSC C
WHERE 1 = 1 AND TO_CHAR(M.PRCE_DATE_TIME,'YYYYMMDD') > ( SELECT Prev_Bsns_Date FROM SID.Ido_A_Uue_Insn_Calendar WHERE ENTY_ID = 1 AND TAGT_DATE = #{yyyymmdd}) AND TO_CHAR(M.PRCE_DATE_TIME,'YYYYMMDD') <= ( SELECT TAGT_DATE FROM SID.Ido_A_Uue_Insn_Calendar WHERE ENTY_ID = 1 AND HDAY_YN = 'N' AND TAGT_DATE = #{yyyymmdd})
AND M.ACNT_ID = M3.ACNT_ID AND M.ACNT_OWNR_ID = A1.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID(+) AND M.ACNT_ID = M2.ACNT_ID AND M.MNGG_BRNH_ENTY_ENTY_ID = B21.ENTY_ID(+) /* 관리점 */ AND M.PRFT_CNTR_ENTY_ENTY_ID = B22.ENTY_ID(+) /* 실적점 */
AND M3.OPNG_BRNH_CODE = C.NEW_ORGZ_CODE(+) /* 개설점 */ AND C.ENTY_ID = B23.ENTY_ID(+)
AND M.ACNT_TYPE_CODE IN ('GNAC', 'FOAC', 'FPAC', 'SVAC')
) B ON ( A.GNL_AC_NO = B.GNL_AC_NO ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET A.AC_ST_CCD = B.AC_ST_CCD /* 2 계좌상태구분코드 */ , A.RNMCNO = B.RNMCNO /* 3 고객엔티티ID */ , A.AC_OPN_DT = B.AC_OPN_DT /* 4 계좌개설일자 */ , A.AC_RE_OBJ_CCD = B.AC_RE_OBJ_CCD /* 5 계좌개설목적코드 */ , A.OPN_BRN_CD = B.OPN_BRN_CD /* 8 개설지점코드 */ , A.CLSD_DT = B.CLSD_DT /* 9 폐쇄일자 */ , A.AML_CRT_DT = B.AML_CRT_DT /* 10 AML생성일자 */ , A.AML_HNDL_P_ENO = B.AML_HNDL_P_ENO /* 11 AML처리자사번 */ , A.AC_TY_CD = B.AC_TY_CD /* 12 계좌유형코드 */ , A.MNGG_BRN_CD = B.MNGG_BRN_CD /* 13 관리지점코드 */ , A.PRFT_BRN_CD = B.PRFT_BRN_CD /* 14 실적지점코드 */ , A.ACNT_NO = B.ACNT_NO /* 15 계좌번호암호문 */ WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( GNL_AC_NO , AC_ST_CCD /* 20201111 구자성 추가 */ , RNMCNO , AC_OPN_DT , AC_RE_OBJ_CCD , OPN_BRN_CD , CLSD_DT , AML_CRT_DT , AML_HNDL_P_ENO , AC_TY_CD , MNGG_BRN_CD , PRFT_BRN_CD , ACNT_NO ) VALUES ( B.GNL_AC_NO , B.AC_ST_CCD , B.RNMCNO , B.AC_OPN_DT , B.AC_RE_OBJ_CCD , B.OPN_BRN_CD , B.CLSD_DT , B.AML_CRT_DT , B.AML_HNDL_P_ENO , B.AC_TY_CD , B.MNGG_BRN_CD , B.PRFT_BRN_CD , B.ACNT_NO )
mapper.update: UPDATE /*+ FULL(T) PARALLEL(T 8) */ SSQ.NIC17B T SET FNL_DL_DT1 = FNL_DL_DT , FNL_DL_DT2 = FNL_DL_DT1 , FNL_DL_DT3 = FNL_DL_DT2 , FNL_DL_DT4 = FNL_DL_DT3 , FNL_DL_DT5 = FNL_DL_DT4 , FNL_DL_DT6 = FNL_DL_DT5 WHERE 1 = 1
mapper.insert:
MERGE INTO SSQ.NIC17B A USING ( SELECT /*+ FULL(A) PARALLEL(A 8) */ A.ACNT_ID AS GNL_AC_NO , MAX(NVL(C.TRDG_DATE,A.TRDG_DATE)) KEEP (DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY A.TRDG_DATE DESC, A.TRDG_NO DESC) AS FNL_DL_DT , MAX(A.TRDG_NO) KEEP (DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY A.TRDG_DATE DESC, A.TRDG_NO DESC) AS FNL_DL_SQ FROM SID.IDO_A_MBA_TRDG A , ( SELECT ACNT_ID, TRDG_DATE, TRDG_NO FROM SID.IDO_A_MBA_TRDG_ADTL -- 2020.11.18 KJS 정상적으로 추출대상을 가져오도록 변경 -- WHERE PCPP_IP LIKE 'md%' WHERE PCPR_IP NOT LIKE 'md%' -- 제외거래 AND TRDG_DATE > ( SELECT Prev_Bsns_Date FROM SID.Ido_A_Uue_Insn_Calendar WHERE ENTY_ID = 1 AND TAGT_DATE = #{yyyymmdd}) AND TRDG_DATE <= ( SELECT TAGT_DATE FROM SID.Ido_A_Uue_Insn_Calendar WHERE ENTY_ID = 1 AND HDAY_YN = 'N' AND TAGT_DATE = #{yyyymmdd}) ) BM , ( SELECT /*+ FULL(T) PARALLEL(T 8) */ T.ACNT_ID AS GNL_AC_NO , MAX(T.TRDG_DATE) TRDG_DATE FROM SID.IDO_A_MBA_TRDG T WHERE 1 = 1 AND T.TRDG_DATE > ( SELECT Prev_Bsns_Date FROM SID.Ido_A_Uue_Insn_Calendar WHERE ENTY_ID = 1 AND TAGT_DATE = #{yyyymmdd}) AND T.TRDG_DATE <= ( SELECT TAGT_DATE FROM SID.Ido_A_Uue_Insn_Calendar WHERE ENTY_ID = 1 AND HDAY_YN = 'N' AND TAGT_DATE = #{yyyymmdd}) AND T.CANC_YN <> 'Y' AND T.TRDG_CODE NOT IN('301180' ,'301189' ,'301420' ,'301430' ,'301439' ,'301440' ,'301449' ,'301450' ,'301459' ,'301460','301469' ,'301890' ,'301899' ,'301900' ,'301909' ,'301910' ,'301919' ,'301920' ,'301929' ,'302230' ,'302239','302240' ,'302249' ,'303910' ,'303919' ,'A99010' ,'Q00400' ,'Q00800' ,'T00030' ,'U00080' ,'U00200' ,'U00500') AND T.ACNT_TRDG_KIND_CODE <> '14' -- 주석거래(관리점변경, 통장기장 등) AND T.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE NOT LIKE 'B%' -- 배치거래 제외 AND EXISTS (SELECT /*+ FULL(TC) PARALLEL(TC 4) */ 1 FROM SID.IDO_A_UWB_TRD_CD TC WHERE TC.TRDG_CODE = T.TRDG_CODE AND TC.DTLS_TRDG_NAME NOT LIKE '%대차%' ) GROUP BY T.ACNT_ID) C WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.CANC_YN <> 'Y' AND A.ACNT_TRDG_KIND_CODE <> '14' /* 주석거래(관리점변경,통장기장등) 제외 */ AND SUBSTR(A.TRDG_CODE,1,1) BETWEEN '1' AND '6' /* 매수매도입금출금입고출고 거래만추출 7: 질권설정부분제외 */ AND A.ACNT_ID = BM.ACNT_ID(+) /* 제외거래가 아닌거래만 추출 */ AND A.TRDG_DATE = BM.TRDG_DATE(+) /* 제외거래가 아닌거래만 추출 */ AND A.TRDG_NO = BM.TRDG_NO(+) /* 제외거래가 아닌거래만 추출 */ AND BM.ACNT_ID IS NOT NULL /* 제외거래가 아닌거래만 추출 */ AND A.ACNT_ID = C.GNL_AC_NO(+) GROUP BY A.ACNT_ID
) B ON ( A.GNL_AC_NO = B.GNL_AC_NO) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET A.FNL_DL_DT = B.FNL_DL_DT , A.FNL_DL_SQ = B.FNL_DL_SQ
mapper.delete: DELETE /*+ FULL(A) PARALLEL(8) */ SSQ.NIC18B A WHERE 1 = 1
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO SSQ.NIC18B SELECT /*+ FULL(A) PARALLEL(8) */ B.ACNT_ID AS GNL_AC_NO /* 1 계좌번호ID */ , X2.TAGT_CLNT_NAME AS PRXY_NM /* 2 대리인명 */ , Y6.PST_NO AS PRXY_PST_NO /* 3 대리인우편번호 */ , A1.ENTY_ID AS PRXY_RNMCNO /* 4 대리인엔티티ID */ /*, CASE X2.TAGT_ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE WHEN 'BRGN' THEN '03' WHEN 'CRGN' THEN '05' WHEN 'DIRN' THEN '99' WHEN 'FICN' THEN '12' WHEN 'FRIN' THEN '08' WHEN 'FRRN' THEN '07' WHEN 'FSSN' THEN '99' WHEN 'PSPT' THEN '04' WHEN 'SSCN' THEN '01' WHEN 'TXID' THEN '09' END */ , NVL((SELECT TRNSFRM_CD FROM SSQ.NIC95B WHERE CD = 'L200' AND CD_VL9 = X2.TAGT_ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE ), '99') AS PRXY_RNM_NO_CCD /* 5 대리인실명번호구분코드 */ , CASE A.SELF_RLTP_CODE WHEN '01' THEN '1' /* 배우자 */ WHEN '02' THEN '2' /* 부모 */ WHEN '03' THEN '3' /* 자녀 */ WHEN '04' THEN '4' /* 형제자매 */ WHEN '05' THEN '5' /* 친척 */ WHEN '06' THEN '6' /* 상사 */ WHEN '07' THEN '7' /* 동료(친구) */ WHEN '08' THEN '9' /* 알수없음 */ ELSE CASE WHEN A.ACNT_AGNT_KIND_CODE = '2' THEN '3' ELSE '9' END /* 법정대리인일 경우 자녀로, 이외의 경우 알수없음 */ END AS PRXY_RLTNS_CD /* 6 대리인관계코드 */ , Z1.CNTY_CODE AS NTN_CD /* 7 국가코드 */ , B.OPNG_DATE AS RQST_DT /* 8 신청일자 */ , B.CLSG_DATE AS CC_DT /* 9 해지일자 */ , SYSDATE AS AML_CRT_DT /* 10 AML생성일자 */ , 'BATCH' AS AML_HNDL_P_ENO /* 11 AML처리자사번 */
, Y6.BSC_ADDR AS PRXY_BSC_ADRS_CRYP /* 12 대리인기본주소 */ , Y6.DNG_FLWG_ADDR AS PRXY_DTLS_ADRS_CRYP /* 13 대리인상세주소 */
, Y2.CNTY_NATI_CRYP AS PRXY_CNTY_NATI_CRYP /* 14 대리인국가번호암호문 */ , Y2.CNTY_AREA_CRYP AS PRXY_CNTY_AREA_CRYP /* 15 대리인지역번호암호문 */ , Y2.CNTY_ECNO_CRYP AS PRXY_CNTY_ECNO_CRYP /* 16 대리인국번암호문 */ , Y2.CNTY_NO_CRYP AS PRXY_CNTY_NO_CRYP /* 17 대리인번호암호문 */
, Y4.CNTY_PHON_CODE_CRYP AS PRXY_FAX_CNTY_NATI_CRYP /* 18 대리인FAX국가번호암호문 */ , Y4.AREA_CODE_CRYP AS PRXY_FAX_CNTY_AREA_CRYP /* 19 대리인FAX지역번호암호문 */ , Y4.FAX_ECNO_CRYP AS PRXY_FAX_CNTY_ECNO_CRYP /* 20 대리인FAX국번암호문 */ , Y4.FAX_NO_CRYP AS PRXY_FAX_CNTY_NO_CRYP /* 21 대리인FAX번호암호문 */
, CASE A.SELF_RLTP_CODE WHEN '01' THEN '03' /* 배우자 */ WHEN '02' THEN '02' /* 부모 */ WHEN '03' THEN '04' /* 자녀 */ WHEN '04' THEN '05' /* 형제자매 */ WHEN '05' THEN '07' /* 친척 */ WHEN '06' THEN '12' /* 상사 */ WHEN '07' THEN '08' /* 동료(친구) */ WHEN '08' THEN '99' /* 알수없음 */ ELSE CASE WHEN A.ACNT_AGNT_KIND_CODE = '2' THEN '04' ELSE '99' END /* 법정대리인인 경우 자녀로, 이외의 경우 기타 */ END AS PRXY_RLTNS_KFU_CD /* 22 대리인관계KOFIU코드 */ FROM SID.IDO_A_UUN_AFPR_DTLS A /* IDO_A_계좌정보_고객계좌상세 */ , SID.IDO_A_UUF_BZPR_BSC A1 , SID.IDO_A_UUA_ACNT B /* IDO_A_Account_Account */ , SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD X2 /* CDD원장 */ , SID.IDO_A_UUE_COUNTRY Z1 /* 소속국가 */
, (SELECT R.* FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY RNMCNO ORDER BY ORDERBY ASC ) AS RNK_NO , Q.* FROM ( SELECT P.* , CASE WHEN P.CNTC_TYP_CD = '3' THEN 1 WHEN P.CNTC_TYP_CD = '1' THEN 2 WHEN P.CNTC_TYP_CD = '2' THEN 3 END ORDERBY FROM SSQ.NIC04B P WHERE 1 = 1 ) Q ) R WHERE R.RNK_NO = 1 ) Y2
, SID.IDO_A_UUE_ENTY_CONTACT Y3 /* EntityContact */ , SID.IDO_A_UUE_FAX Y4 /* FAX */
, (SELECT R.* FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY RNMCNO ORDER BY ORDERBY ASC ) AS RNK_NO , Q.* FROM ( SELECT P.* , CASE WHEN P.ADDR_TYP_CD = '1' THEN 1 WHEN P.ADDR_TYP_CD = '2' THEN 2 END ORDERBY FROM SSQ.NIC05B P WHERE 1 = 1 ) Q ) R WHERE R.RNK_NO = 1 ) Y6
, (SELECT R.* FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ACNT_ID ORDER BY PRCE_DATE_TIME DESC ) AS RNK_NO , Q.* FROM ( SELECT T.* FROM SID.IDO_A_UUN_AFPR_DTLS T WHERE 1 = 1 AND T.ACNT_BZPR_ROLE_TYPE_CODE = '01' /* 개설대리인 */ AND TRIM(T.BZPR_NO) IS NOT NULL ) Q ) R WHERE R.RNK_NO = 1 ) A2 /* 2021.02.16 중복제거를 위해 : 나중에 개설대리인 중복건이 없어지면 빼도 됨 */
WHERE A.ACNT_AGNT_KIND_CODE > '0' /* 1:임의 2:법정 3:상임 4:자문사 5:법정후견인 */ AND A1.ENTY_ID > 0 AND A.ACNT_BZPR_ROLE_TYPE_CODE = '01' /* 개설대리인 */ AND A.BZPR_NO = A1.BZPR_NO AND TRIM(X2.TAGT_CLNT_NAME) IS NOT NULL
AND A2.ACNT_ID = A.ACNT_ID AND A2.BZPR_NO = A1.BZPR_NO
AND A.ACNT_ID = B.ACNT_ID AND A1.ENTY_ID = X2.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID(+) AND X2.NTNY_ID = Z1.CNTY_ID(+)
AND A1.ENTY_ID = Y2.RNMCNO(+) /* 전화 : 휴대폰>자택>직장 순 */
AND X2.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = Y3.ENTY_ID(+) AND Y3.CNTT_ADDR_BSWR_TYPE_CODE (+)= 'CLNT' /* 연락처업무유형코드('CLNT':고객) */ AND Y3.ENCT_TYPE_CODE (+)= 'PS' /* 엔티티연락처유형코드['PS':개인(자택), 'OF':직장] */ AND Y3.CNTT_ADDR_TYPE_CODE (+)= 'FAX' /* 연락처유형코드('FAX':FAX번호) */ AND Y3.CNTT_ADDR_ID = Y4.CNTT_ADDR_ID(+)
AND A1.ENTY_ID = Y6.RNMCNO(+) /* 주소 : 자택>직장 순 */

INSERT INTO SSQ.NIC27B SELECT DISTINCT CDD_ORIG_ENTY_ID , 'N' , SYSDATE , 0 FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD WHERE 1 = 1 AND CRFL_FLTG_RSLT_CODE = '3' /* 요주의필터링결과코드 가 검토대상 */ AND CRFL_FLTG_NSPN_RSLT_CODE = '1' /* 요주의필터링점검결과코드가 거래승인 */
mapper.delete: DELETE /*+ FULL(A) PARALLEL(8) */ SSQ.NIC32B A WHERE BAS_YYMM = TRIM(SUBSTR(#{yyyymmdd},1,6))
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SSQ.NIC32B SELECT /*+ FULL(A) PARALLEL(8) */ SUBSTR(A.DL_DT,1,6) , A.RNMCNO , SUM(CASE WHEN A.DL_TYP_CD = '01' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) /* 당월입금거래건수 */ , SUM(CASE WHEN A.DL_TYP_CD = '01' THEN A.DL_AMT ELSE 0 END) /* 당월입금거래금액 */ , SUM(CASE WHEN A.DL_TYP_CD = '02' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) /* 당월출금거래건수 */ , SUM(CASE WHEN A.DL_TYP_CD = '02' THEN A.DL_AMT ELSE 0 END) /* 당월출금거래금액 */ , SUM(CASE WHEN A.TRDG_CODE IN ('301770','301750') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) /* 당월당보대출거래건수 */ , SUM(CASE WHEN A.TRDG_CODE IN ('301770','301750') THEN A.DL_AMT ELSE 0 END) /* 당월당보대출거래금액 */ , SUM(CASE WHEN A.DL_TYP_CD = '12' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) /* 당월입고횟수 */ , SUM(CASE WHEN A.DL_TYP_CD = '13' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) /* 당월출고횟수 */ , SUM(CASE WHEN B.GNL_AC_NO IS NOT NULL AND A.DL_TYP_CD = '01' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) /* 당월연관계좌입금횟수 */ , SUM(CASE WHEN B.GNL_AC_NO IS NOT NULL AND A.DL_TYP_CD = '01' THEN A.DL_AMT ELSE 0 END) /* 당월연관계좌입금금액 */ , SUM(CASE WHEN B.GNL_AC_NO IS NOT NULL AND A.DL_TYP_CD = '02' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) /* 당월연관계좌출금횟수 */ , SUM(CASE WHEN B.GNL_AC_NO IS NOT NULL AND A.DL_TYP_CD = '02' THEN A.DL_AMT ELSE 0 END) /* 당월연관계좌출금금액 */ , SUM(CASE WHEN A.DL_TYP_CD = '01' AND substr(A.DL_CHNNL_CD,1,1) = 'A' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) /* 당월현금입금(객장입금거래) 횟수 */ , SUM(CASE WHEN A.DL_TYP_CD = '01' AND substr(A.DL_CHNNL_CD,1,1) = 'A' THEN A.DL_AMT ELSE 0 END) /* 당월현금입금(객장입금거래) 금액 */ , SUM(CASE WHEN A.DL_TYP_CD = '02' AND substr(A.DL_CHNNL_CD,1,1) = 'A' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) /* 당월현금출금(객장출금거래) 횟수 */ , SUM(CASE WHEN A.DL_TYP_CD = '02' AND substr(A.DL_CHNNL_CD,1,1) = 'A' THEN A.DL_AMT ELSE 0 END) /* 당월현금출금(객장출금거래) 금액 */ , COUNT(DISTINCT A.RLBK_CODE||A.RLTV_FNC_ACNT_NO_CRYP) /* 당월거래상대계좌수 */ , SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(A.GDS_NO,1,1) IN ('B', 'C') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) /* 당월선물옵션거래건수 */ , NVL(C.NEW_CARD_CNT,0) /* 당월신규카드발급건수 */ FROM SSQ.NIC61B A , ( SELECT DISTINCT ACNT_ID AS GNL_AC_NO FROM SSP.SPAD_MAIN_ACNT_RLTP_IFMN B --연관계좌정보 UNION SELECT DISTINCT RLTP_ACNT_ID AS GNL_AC_NO FROM SSP.SPAD_MAIN_ACNT_RLTP_IFMN B --연관계좌정보 ) B , ( SELECT /*+ FULL(T) PARALLEL(8) */ T.CLNT_ENTY_ID AS RNMCNO , COUNT(DISTINCT T.CRD_NO_CRYP) AS NEW_CARD_CNT FROM SID.IDO_A_MAE_CRD_ISNC_APPL T WHERE T.APPL_CANC_YN <> 'Y' AND T.ISNC_CNT = '1' AND T.ISNC_DATE LIKE TRIM(SUBSTR(#{yyyymmdd},1,6))||'%' GROUP BY T.CLNT_ENTY_ID ) C WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.DL_DT LIKE TRIM(SUBSTR(#{yyyymmdd},1,6))||'%' AND A.GNL_AC_NO = B.GNL_AC_NO(+) AND A.RNMCNO = C.RNMCNO (+) AND A.TRDG_CODE NOT IN ( '301180','301189','301420','301429','301430','301439','301440','301449','301450','301459','301460' /* 삼성증권에서 제공한 거래제외코드 */ ,'301469','301890','301899','301900','301909','301910','301919','301920','301929','302230','302239' /* 삼성증권에서 제공한 거래제외코드 */ ,'302240','302249','303910','303919','A99010','Q00400','Q00800','T00030','U00080','U00200','U00500') /* 삼성증권에서 제공한 거래제외코드 */ GROUP BY SUBSTR(A.DL_DT,1,6), A.RNMCNO, C.NEW_CARD_CNT

MERGE INTO SSQ.NIC35B A USING ( SELECT /*+ FULL(A) PARALLEL(8) */ A.RNMCNO AS RNMCNO /* 1 고객엔티티ID */ , D.CRFL_ORIG_SECT_CODE AS WC_LIST_CCD /* 2 WATCH목록구분코드 */ , D.FLFL_DATE AS WC_LIST_CD_RNWL_DT /* 3 WATCH목록코드갱신일자 */ , CASE WHEN B.CRFL_FLTG_NSPN_RSLT_CODE = '0' THEN NULL ELSE B.CRFL_FLTG_NSPN_RSLT_CODE END AS WL_TRD_CON_F /* 5 WL거래여부확정코드 */ , B.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE AS RSK_GRD_CD /* 8 최종위험등급코드 */ , B.FUNS_LNWS_LAST_PONT AS LST_RSK_EAL_SOR /* 9 최종위험평가점수(B+I) */ , NVL(B.FUNS_LNWS_LAST_PONT,0) AS RSK_GRD_MRK /* 10 고객위험등급점수(B+I) */ , B.EDD_TAGT_YN AS CS_EDD_MNG_F /* 12 EDD대상여부 */ , TO_CHAR(C.PRCE_DATE_TIME,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS CS_EDD_MK_DT /* 13 고객EDD승인일 */ , TO_CHAR(C.PRCE_DATE_TIME,'YYYYMMDD') AS CS_EDD_REG_DT /* 25 EDD등록일자 */ , NVL(TRIM(B.NEW_RISK_VLTN_DATE), B.CDD_FLFL_DATE) AS I_CHECK_DAT /* 27 I모델평가일자 */
/* , CASE WHEN NVL(B.NEW_RISK_VLTN_PONT, 0) = 0 THEN NVL(B.FUNS_LNWS_SSPN_DGRE_PONT,0) ELSE NVL(B.NEW_RISK_VLTN_PONT, 0) END AS I_RSK_GRD_MRK */ /* 28 I모델점수 */ , NVL(B.FUNS_LNWS_SSPN_DGRE_PONT,0) AS I_RSK_GRD_MRK /* 28 I모델점수 : 2020.06.04 구자성 수정 */
, NVL(TRIM(B.NEW_RISK_RTNG_CODE), B.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE) AS I_RSK_GRD_CD /* 29 I모델등급 */ , B.CDD_FLFL_DATE AS CS_CDD_REG_DT /* 33 CDD등록일자 */ , B.CDD_RE_FLFL_XPCN_DATE AS CS_REQ_DT /* 34 재수행도래일자 */ , CASE WHEN E.RNMCNO IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS STR_AND_CTR_EXTRCT_F /* 15 STR및CTR추출여부 */ , NVL(F.CTR_CNT,0) AS CTR_RPR_TNO /* 16 CTR보고횟수 */ , NVL(G.STR_CNT,0) AS STR_RPR_TNO /* 17 STR보고횟수 */ , SYSDATE AS HNDL_DY_TM /* 18 처리일시 */ , 999999 AS HNDL_P_ENO /* 19 처리자사번 */ , B.CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE AS CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE /* 35 CDD등록사유코드 */
, CASE WHEN B.CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE = '99' AND TRIM(B.CDD_RGSN_RESN_NAME) IS NULL THEN '기타' WHEN B.CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE = '99' AND TRIM(B.CDD_RGSN_RESN_NAME) IS NOT NULL THEN '기타(' || TRIM(B.CDD_RGSN_RESN_NAME) || ')' ELSE NVL((SELECT T.CMN_CDVL_NAME FROM SID.IDO_A_UWB_COM_CD_DTL T WHERE T.CMN_CODE_ID = '06757' AND T.CMN_CDVL = B.CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE AND ROWNUM = 1), '') END AS CDD_RGSN_RESN_NAME /* 36 CDD등록사유명 */ FROM SSQ.NIC01B A LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD B ON A.RNMCNO = B.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_MAH_EDD_FLFL_DTLD C ON A.RNMCNO = C.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT T1.* FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CRFL_FLTG_FLFL_DT T1 , (SELECT CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID, MAX(FLFL_DATE ||'_'||FLFL_SEQ_NO) AS MAX_DATE_SEQ FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CRFL_FLTG_FLFL_DT GROUP BY CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID) T2 WHERE T1.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = T2.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND T1.FLFL_DATE = SUBSTR(T2.MAX_DATE_SEQ, 1, 8) AND T1.FLFL_SEQ_NO =
