SUBSTR(T2.MAX_DATE_SEQ, 10) ) D ON A.RNMCNO = D.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT DL_P_RNMCNO AS RNMCNO FROM SSQ.NIC66B WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD IN ('STR','KYC','CTR') ) E /* STR및CTR추출여부 */ ON A.RNMCNO = E.RNMCNO LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT DL_P_RNMCNO AS RNMCNO , COUNT(*) AS CTR_CNT FROM SSQ.NIC66B WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD IN ('CTR') --AND CTR_FWRD_TP_CODE = '1' -- 전송성공' AND RPR_PRGRS_CCD = '99' GROUP BY DL_P_RNMCNO ) F /* CTR보고 */ ON A.RNMCNO = F.RNMCNO LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT DL_P_RNMCNO AS RNMCNO , COUNT(*) AS STR_CNT FROM SSQ.NIC66B WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD IN ('STR','KYC') -- 'STR' AND RPR_PRGRS_CCD = '99' GROUP BY DL_P_RNMCNO ) G /* STR보고 */ ON A.RNMCNO = G.RNMCNO ) B ON (A.RNMCNO = B.RNMCNO) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET A.WC_LIST_CCD = B.WC_LIST_CCD , A.WC_LIST_CD_RNWL_DT = B.WC_LIST_CD_RNWL_DT , A.WL_TRD_CON_F = B.WL_TRD_CON_F , A.RSK_GRD_CD = B.RSK_GRD_CD , A.LST_RSK_EAL_SOR = B.LST_RSK_EAL_SOR , A.RSK_GRD_MRK = B.RSK_GRD_MRK , A.CS_EDD_MNG_F = B.CS_EDD_MNG_F , A.CS_EDD_MK_DT = B.CS_EDD_MK_DT , A.CS_EDD_REG_DT = B.CS_EDD_REG_DT , A.I_CHECK_DAT = B.I_CHECK_DAT , A.I_RSK_GRD_MRK = B.I_RSK_GRD_MRK , A.I_RSK_GRD_CD = B.I_RSK_GRD_CD , A.CS_CDD_REG_DT = B.CS_CDD_REG_DT , A.CS_REQ_DT = B.CS_REQ_DT , A.STR_AND_CTR_EXTRCT_F = B.STR_AND_CTR_EXTRCT_F , A.CTR_RPR_TNO = B.CTR_RPR_TNO , A.STR_RPR_TNO = B.STR_RPR_TNO , A.HNDL_DY_TM = B.HNDL_DY_TM , A.HNDL_P_ENO = B.HNDL_P_ENO , A.CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE = B.CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE , A.CDD_RGSN_RESN_NAME = B.CDD_RGSN_RESN_NAME WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( RNMCNO , WC_LIST_CCD , WC_LIST_CD_RNWL_DT , WL_TRD_CON_F , RSK_GRD_CD , LST_RSK_EAL_SOR , RSK_GRD_MRK , CS_EDD_MNG_F , CS_EDD_MK_DT , CS_EDD_REG_DT , I_CHECK_DAT , I_RSK_GRD_MRK , I_RSK_GRD_CD , CS_CDD_REG_DT , CS_REQ_DT , STR_AND_CTR_EXTRCT_F , CTR_RPR_TNO , STR_RPR_TNO , HNDL_DY_TM , HNDL_P_ENO , CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE , CDD_RGSN_RESN_NAME ) VALUES ( B.RNMCNO , B.WC_LIST_CCD , B.WC_LIST_CD_RNWL_DT , B.WL_TRD_CON_F , B.RSK_GRD_CD , B.LST_RSK_EAL_SOR , B.RSK_GRD_MRK , B.CS_EDD_MNG_F , B.CS_EDD_MK_DT , B.CS_EDD_REG_DT , B.I_CHECK_DAT , B.I_RSK_GRD_MRK , B.I_RSK_GRD_CD , B.CS_CDD_REG_DT , B.CS_REQ_DT , B.STR_AND_CTR_EXTRCT_F , B.CTR_RPR_TNO , B.STR_RPR_TNO , B.HNDL_DY_TM , B.HNDL_P_ENO , B.CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE , B.CDD_RGSN_RESN_NAME )

INSERT INTO SSQ.NIC40B SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{yyyymmdd},'YYYYMMDD'), - 1), 'YYYYMM') , T.CLNT_ENTY_ID , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') , ROUND(T.ASST_VLTN_ACML_AMNT) AS ASST_VLTN_ACML_AMNT , 0 , SYSDATE , ' ' , ' ' , ' ' , 'N' , 'BATCH' FROM ( SELECT CLNT_ENTY_ID , SUM(ASST_VLTN_ACML_AMNT)/(SELECT TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(LAST_DAY(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{yyyymmdd},'YYYYMMDD'), - 1)), 'DD')) FROM DUAL) AS ASST_VLTN_ACML_AMNT FROM SID.IDA_SETL_STD_BAL_M WHERE STNR_YYMM = TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{yyyymmdd},'YYYYMMDD'), - 1), 'YYYYMM') GROUP BY CLNT_ENTY_ID ) T , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_ADDN_IFMN S , SID.IDO_A_UUF_CLNT_BSC S1 /* NDVL_INSN_TYPE_CODE */ WHERE 1 = 1 AND T.CLNT_ENTY_ID = S.CLNT_ENTY_ID AND S1.NDVL_INSN_TYPE_CODE = 'IN' AND T.ASST_VLTN_ACML_AMNT >= 1000000000 AND S.CLNT_ENTY_ID = S1.ENTY_ID

MERGE INTO SSQ.NIC41B S USING ( WITH DPRT_LIST AS ( SELECT A.DTBR_CODE AS L1_CODE , A.DTBR_NAME AS LI_NAME , B.DTBR_CODE AS L2_CODE , B.DTBR_NAME AS L2_NAME , C.DTBR_CODE AS L3_CODE , C.DTBR_NAME AS L3_NAME , D.DTBR_CODE AS L4_CODE , D.DTBR_NAME AS L4_NAME , E.DTBR_CODE AS L5_CODE , E.DTBR_NAME AS L5_NAME , F.DTBR_CODE AS L6_CODE , F.DTBR_NAME AS L6_NAME , G.DTBR_CODE AS L7_CODE , G.DTBR_NAME AS L7_NAME , H.DTBR_CODE AS L8_CODE , H.DTBR_NAME AS L8_NAME , I.DTBR_CODE AS L9_CODE , I.DTBR_NAME AS L9_NAME FROM SID.IDO_A_UUE_SAMSUNG_DPRT A , SID.IDO_A_UUE_SAMSUNG_DPRT B , SID.IDO_A_UUE_SAMSUNG_DPRT C , SID.IDO_A_UUE_SAMSUNG_DPRT D , SID.IDO_A_UUE_SAMSUNG_DPRT E , SID.IDO_A_UUE_SAMSUNG_DPRT F , SID.IDO_A_UUE_SAMSUNG_DPRT G , SID.IDO_A_UUE_SAMSUNG_DPRT H , SID.IDO_A_UUE_SAMSUNG_DPRT I WHERE A.DTBR_CODE = B.UPPR_DTBR_CODE(+) AND B.DTBR_CODE = C.UPPR_DTBR_CODE(+) AND C.DTBR_CODE = D.UPPR_DTBR_CODE(+) AND D.DTBR_CODE = E.UPPR_DTBR_CODE(+) AND E.DTBR_CODE = F.UPPR_DTBR_CODE(+) AND F.DTBR_CODE = G.UPPR_DTBR_CODE(+) AND G.DTBR_CODE = H.UPPR_DTBR_CODE(+) AND H.DTBR_CODE = I.UPPR_DTBR_CODE(+) AND A.DTBR_CODE = '30000' ) SELECT A.DTBR_CODE AS DPRT_CD /* 01 조직코드 */ , TRIM(A.DTBR_NAME) AS DPRT_NM /* 02 조직명 */ , A.UPPR_DTBR_CODE AS HG_RNK_DPRT_CD /* 03 실제상위조직코드 */ , CASE WHEN SUBSTRB(A.DTBR_CODE,1,1) = '1' THEN 'B' ELSE 'M' END AS MOFC_BRN_CCD /* 04 부서구분코드(B:지점,M:관리) */ , C.PSTL_CODE AS DPRT_POST_NO /* 05 부점우편번호 */ , B.CNTY_PHON_CODE_CRYP AS CNTY_NATI_CRYP /* 06 연락처국가번호암호문 */ , B.AREA_CODE_CRYP AS CNTY_AREA_CRYP /* 07 연락처지역번호암호문 */ , B.PHON_ECNO_CRYP AS CNTY_ECNO_CRYP /* 08 연락처국번암호문 */ , B.PHON_NO_CRYP AS CNTY_NO_CRYP /* 09 연락처번호암호문 */ , DECODE(A.CLSG_YN,'Y','N','Y') AS USE_CCD /* 10 사용여부(Y, N) */ , A.OPNG_DATE AS HNDL_DY_TM /* 11 개설일자 */ , A.KFB_LINK_BNCD AS KFB_DPRT_CD /* 12 은행연합회코드 */ , TRIM(A.TRNS_DPRT_CODE) AS TRNS_DPRT_CODE /* 13 이관부서코드 */ , X.DISPLAY_DEPTH AS DISPLAY_DEPTH /* 14 레벨 */ , A.PRCE_DATE_TIME AS AML_CRT_DT /* 15 AML생성일자 */ , A.PCPR_ID AS AML_HNDL_P_ENO /* 16 AML처리자사번 */ , CASE WHEN REGEXP_INSTR(RTRIM(A.DTBR_CODE), '[^0-9]') = 0 THEN /* 지점코드가 모두 숫자로만 돼 있으면 부여 */ '240' || SUBSTR(A.DTBR_CODE, 2, 3) || TO_CHAR(10 - CASE WHEN MOD(14+TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(A.DTBR_CODE,2,1))*1 + TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(A.DTBR_CODE,3,1))*3 + TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(A.DTBR_CODE,4,1))*7, 10) = 0 THEN 10 ELSE MOD(14+TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(A.DTBR_CODE,2,1))*1 + TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(A.DTBR_CODE,3,1))*3 + TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(A.DTBR_CODE,4,1))*7, 10) END) ELSE '' END AS KFTC_BRHN_CODE /* 17 금융결제원지점코드 */ /* 18 KoFIU등록여부 */ FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT L1_CODE AS DPRT_CD , LI_NAME AS DPRT_NM , NULL AS HG_RNK_DPRT_CD , 1 AS DISPLAY_DEPTH , 'N' AS FLAG FROM DPRT_LIST WHERE L1_CODE IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT L2_CODE AS DPRT_CD , L2_NAME AS DPRT_NM , L1_CODE AS HG_RNK_DPRT_CD , 2 AS DISPLAY_DEPTH , CASE WHEN SUBSTR(L2_CODE,1,1) = '1' THEN CASE WHEN SUBSTR(L2_CODE,5,1) = '0' THEN CASE WHEN L2_CODE = '10000' THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END ELSE 'N' END ELSE 'N' END AS FLAG FROM DPRT_LIST WHERE L2_CODE IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT L3_CODE AS DPRT_CD , L3_NAME AS DPRT_NM , L2_CODE AS HG_RNK_DPRT_CD , 3 AS DISPLAY_DEPTH , CASE WHEN SUBSTR(L3_CODE,1,1) = '1' THEN CASE WHEN SUBSTR(L3_CODE,5,1) = '0' THEN CASE WHEN L3_CODE = '10000' THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END ELSE 'N' END ELSE 'N' END AS FLAG FROM DPRT_LIST WHERE L3_CODE IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT L4_CODE AS DPRT_CD , L4_NAME AS DPRT_NM , L3_CODE AS HG_RNK_DPRT_CD , 4 AS DISPLAY_DEPTH , CASE WHEN SUBSTR(L4_CODE,1,1) = '1' THEN CASE WHEN SUBSTR(L4_CODE,5,1) = '0' THEN CASE WHEN L4_CODE = '10000' THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END ELSE 'N' END ELSE 'N' END AS FLAG FROM DPRT_LIST WHERE L4_CODE IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT L5_CODE AS DPRT_CD , L5_NAME AS DPRT_NM , L4_CODE AS HG_RNK_DPRT_CD , 5 AS DISPLAY_DEPTH , CASE WHEN SUBSTR(L5_CODE,1,1) = '1' THEN CASE WHEN SUBSTR(L5_CODE,5,1) = '0' THEN CASE WHEN L5_CODE = '10000' THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END ELSE 'N' END ELSE 'N' END AS FLAG FROM DPRT_LIST WHERE L5_CODE IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT L6_CODE AS DPRT_CD , L6_NAME AS DPRT_NM , L5_CODE AS HG_RNK_DPRT_CD , 6 AS DISPLAY_DEPTH , CASE WHEN SUBSTR(L6_CODE,1,1) = '1' THEN CASE WHEN SUBSTR(L6_CODE,5,1) = '0' THEN CASE WHEN L6_CODE = '10000' THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END ELSE 'N' END ELSE 'N' END AS FLAG FROM DPRT_LIST WHERE L6_CODE IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT L7_CODE AS DPRT_CD , L7_NAME AS DPRT_NM , L6_CODE AS HG_RNK_DPRT_CD , 7 AS DISPLAY_DEPTH , CASE WHEN SUBSTR(L7_CODE,1,1) = '1' THEN CASE WHEN SUBSTR(L7_CODE,5,1) = '0' THEN CASE WHEN L7_CODE = '10000' THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END ELSE 'N' END ELSE 'N' END AS FLAG FROM DPRT_LIST WHERE L7_CODE IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT L8_CODE AS DPRT_CD , L8_NAME AS DPRT_NM , L7_CODE AS HG_RNK_DPRT_CD , 8 AS DISPLAY_DEPTH , CASE WHEN SUBSTR(L8_CODE,1,1) = '1' THEN CASE WHEN SUBSTR(L8_CODE,5,1) = '0' THEN CASE WHEN L8_CODE = '10000' THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END ELSE 'N' END ELSE 'N' END AS FLAG FROM DPRT_LIST WHERE L8_CODE IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT L9_CODE AS DPRT_CD , L9_NAME AS DPRT_NM , L8_CODE AS HG_RNK_DPRT_CD , 9 AS DISPLAY_DEPTH , CASE WHEN SUBSTR(L9_CODE,1,1) = '1' THEN CASE WHEN SUBSTR(L9_CODE,5,1) = '0' THEN CASE WHEN L9_CODE = '10000' THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END ELSE 'N' END ELSE 'N' END AS FLAG FROM DPRT_LIST WHERE L9_CODE IS NOT NULL ) X , SID.IDO_A_UUE_SAMSUNG_DPRT A LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT BA.ENTY_ID , BB.CNTY_PHON_CODE_CRYP , BB.AREA_CODE_CRYP , BB.PHON_ECNO_CRYP , BB.PHON_NO_CRYP FROM SID.IDO_A_UUE_ENTY_CONTACT BA , SID.IDO_A_UUE_PHONE BB WHERE BA.CNTT_ADDR_ID = BB.CNTT_ADDR_ID AND BA.CNTT_ADDR_BSWR_TYPE_CODE = 'ENTY' AND BA.CNTT_ADDR_TYPE_CODE = 'TEL' AND BA.ENCT_TYPE_CODE = 'OF' AND BA.CNTT_ADDR_ID = BB.CNTT_ADDR_ID ) B ON A.ENTY_ID = B.ENTY_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT CA.ENTY_ID , CB.PSTL_CODE FROM SID.IDO_A_UUE_ENTY_CONTACT CA , SID.IDO_A_UUE_ADDRESS CB WHERE CA.CNTT_ADDR_ID = CB.CNTT_ADDR_ID AND CA.CNTT_ADDR_BSWR_TYPE_CODE = 'ENTY' AND CA.CNTT_ADDR_TYPE_CODE = 'ADR' AND CA.ENCT_TYPE_CODE = 'OF' AND CA.CNTT_ADDR_ID = CB.CNTT_ADDR_ID AND CB.LANG_CODE = 'KO' ) C ON A.ENTY_ID = C.ENTY_ID WHERE X.FLAG = 'N' AND X.DPRT_CD = A.DTBR_CODE AND X.DPRT_CD NOT IN ('23070','21070') ) T ON (S.DPRT_CD = T.DPRT_CD) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET S.DPRT_NM = T.DPRT_NM /* 02 조직명 */ , S.HG_RNK_DPRT_CD = T.HG_RNK_DPRT_CD /* 03 실제상위조직코드 */ , S.MOFC_BRN_CCD = T.MOFC_BRN_CCD /* 04 부서구분코드(B:지점,M:관리) */ , S.DPRT_POST_NO = T.DPRT_POST_NO /* 05 부점우편번호 */ , S.CNTY_NATI_CRYP = T.CNTY_NATI_CRYP /* 06 연락처국가번호암호문 */ , S.CNTY_AREA_CRYP = T.CNTY_AREA_CRYP /* 07 연락처지역번호암호문 */ , S.CNTY_ECNO_CRYP = T.CNTY_ECNO_CRYP /* 08 연락처국번암호문 */ , S.CNTY_NO_CRYP = T.CNTY_NO_CRYP /* 09 연락처번호암호문 */ , S.USE_CCD = T.USE_CCD /* 10 사용여부(Y, N) */ , S.HNDL_DY_TM = T.HNDL_DY_TM /* 11 개설일자 */ , S.KFB_DPRT_CD = T.KFB_DPRT_CD /* 12 은행연합회코드 */ , S.TRNS_DPRT_CODE = T.TRNS_DPRT_CODE /* 13 이관부서코드 */ , S.DISPLAY_DEPTH = T.DISPLAY_DEPTH /* 14 레벨 */ , S.AML_CRT_DT = T.AML_CRT_DT /* 15 AML생성일자 */ , S.AML_HNDL_P_ENO = T.AML_HNDL_P_ENO /* 16 AML처리자사번 */ , S.KFTC_BRHN_CODE = T.KFTC_BRHN_CODE /* 17 금융결제원지점코드 */ /* 18 KoFIU등록여부 */ WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (DPRT_CD /* 01 조직코드 */ , DPRT_NM /* 02 조직명 */ , HG_RNK_DPRT_CD /* 03 실제상위조직코드 */ , MOFC_BRN_CCD /* 04 부서구분코드(B:지점,M:관리) */ , DPRT_POST_NO /* 05 부점우편번호 */ , CNTY_NATI_CRYP /* 06 연락처국가번호암호문 */ , CNTY_AREA_CRYP /* 07 연락처지역번호암호문 */ , CNTY_ECNO_CRYP /* 08 연락처국번암호문 */ , CNTY_NO_CRYP /* 09 연락처번호암호문 */ , USE_CCD /* 10 사용여부(Y, N) */ , HNDL_DY_TM /* 11 개설일자 */ , KFB_DPRT_CD /* 12 은행연합회코드 */ , TRNS_DPRT_CODE /* 13 이관부서코드 */ , DISPLAY_DEPTH /* 14 레벨 */ , AML_CRT_DT /* 15 AML생성일자 */ , AML_HNDL_P_ENO /* 16 AML처리자사번 */ , KFTC_BRHN_CODE /* 17 금융결제원지점코드 */ , KOFIU_RGSN_YN /* 18 KoFIU등록여부 */ ) VALUES (T.DPRT_CD /* 01 조직코드 */ , T.DPRT_NM /* 02 조직명 */ , T.HG_RNK_DPRT_CD /* 03 실제상위조직코드 */ , T.MOFC_BRN_CCD /* 04 부서구분코드(B:지점,M:관리) */ , T.DPRT_POST_NO /* 05 부점우편번호 */ , T.CNTY_NATI_CRYP /* 06 연락처국가번호암호문 */ , T.CNTY_AREA_CRYP /* 07 연락처지역번호암호문 */ , T.CNTY_ECNO_CRYP /* 08 연락처국번암호문 */ , T.CNTY_NO_CRYP /* 09 연락처번호암호문 */ , T.USE_CCD /* 10 사용여부(Y, N) */ , T.HNDL_DY_TM /* 11 개설일자 */ , T.KFB_DPRT_CD /* 12 은행연합회코드 */ , T.TRNS_DPRT_CODE /* 13 이관부서코드 */ , T.DISPLAY_DEPTH /* 14 레벨 */ , T.AML_CRT_DT /* 15 AML생성일자 */ , T.AML_HNDL_P_ENO /* 16 AML처리자사번 */ , T.KFTC_BRHN_CODE /* 17 금융결제원지점코드 */ , 'N' /* 18 KoFIU등록여부 */ )

MERGE INTO SSQ.NIC45B A USING ( SELECT STND_PRDT_CLSN_CODE AS GDS_NO /* 01 표준상품분류코드 */ , ' ' AS GDS_DIT_CD /* 02 KOFIU상품분류코드 */ , STND_PRDT_CLSN_CODE_NAME AS GDS_NM /* 03 표준상품분류코드명 */ , ' ' AS GDS_DIT_NM /* 04 KOFIU상품분류코드명 */ , 0 AS GDS_MRK /* 05 상품RA점수 */ , PRCE_DATE_TIME AS HNDL_DY_TM /* 06 처리일시 */ , 0 AS HNDL_P_ENO /* 07 처리자사번 */ , SYSDATE AS AML_CRT_DT /* 08 AML생성일자 */ , PCPR_ID AS AML_HNDL_P_ENO /* 09 AML처리자사번 */ , STND_PRDT_LARG_CLSN_CODE AS LEV1_CD /* 10 표준상품대분류코드 */ , STND_PRDT_MDUM_CLSN_CODE AS LEV2_CD /* 11 표준상품중분류코드 */ , STND_PRDT_LARG_CLSN_CODE_NAME AS LEV1_NM /* 12 표준상품대분류코드명 */ , STND_PRDT_MDUM_CLSN_CODE_NAME AS LEV2_NM /* 13 표준상품중분류코드명 */ /* 14 사용여부 */ FROM SID.IDO_A_IRA_STD_PD_CLSN_CD ) B ON ( A.STND_PRDT_CLSN_CODE = B.STND_PRDT_CLSN_CODE ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET A.GDS_NM = A.GDS_NM /* 03 표준상품분류코드명 */ , A.HNDL_DY_TM = A.HNDL_DY_TM /* 06 처리일시 */ , A.AML_CRT_DT = A.AML_CRT_DT /* 08 AML생성일자 */ , A.AML_HNDL_P_ENO = A.AML_HNDL_P_ENO /* 09 AML처리자사번 */ , A.LEV1_CD = A.LEV1_CD /* 10 표준상품대분류코드 */ , A.LEV2_CD = A.LEV2_CD /* 11 표준상품중분류코드 */ , A.LEV1_NM = A.LEV1_NM /* 12 표준상품대분류코드명 */ , A.LEV2_NM = A.LEV2_NM /* 13 표준상품중분류코드명 */ WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( GDS_NO /* 01 표준상품분류코드 */ , GDS_DIT_CD /* 02 KOFIU상품분류코드 */ , GDS_NM /* 03 표준상품분류코드명 */ , GDS_DIT_NM /* 04 KOFIU상품분류코드명 */ , GDS_MRK /* 05 상품RA점수 */ , HNDL_DY_TM /* 06 처리일시 */ , HNDL_P_ENO /* 07 처리자사번 */ , AML_CRT_DT /* 08 AML생성일자 */ , AML_HNDL_P_ENO /* 09 AML처리자사번 */ , LEV1_CD /* 10 표준상품대분류코드 */ , LEV2_CD /* 11 표준상품중분류코드 */ , LEV1_NM /* 12 표준상품대분류코드명 */ , LEV2_NM /* 13 표준상품중분류코드명 */ , USE_YN /* 14 사용여부 */ ) VALUES ( B.GDS_NO /* 01 표준상품분류코드 */ , ' ' /* 02 KOFIU상품분류코드 */ , B.GDS_NM /* 03 표준상품분류코드명 */ , ' ' /* 04 KOFIU상품분류코드명 */ , B.GDS_MRK /* 05 상품RA점수 */ , B.HNDL_DY_TM /* 06 처리일시 */ , B.HNDL_P_ENO /* 07 처리자사번 */ , B.AML_CRT_DT /* 08 AML생성일자 */ , B.AML_HNDL_P_ENO /* 09 AML처리자사번 */ , B.LEV1_CD /* 10 표준상품대분류코드 */ , B.LEV2_CD /* 11 표준상품중분류코드 */ , B.LEV1_NM /* 12 표준상품대분류코드명 */ , B.LEV2_NM /* 13 표준상품중분류코드명 */ , 'N' /* 14 사용여부 */ )
mapper.delete: DELETE /*+ INDEX(B NIC61B_IX1) */ SSQ.NIC61B B WHERE B.DL_DT > ( SELECT Prev_Bsns_Date FROM SID.Ido_A_Uue_Insn_Calendar WHERE ENTY_ID = 1 AND TAGT_DATE = #{yyyymmdd}) AND B.DL_DT <= ( SELECT TAGT_DATE FROM SID.Ido_A_Uue_Insn_Calendar WHERE ENTY_ID = 1 AND HDAY_YN = 'N' AND TAGT_DATE = #{yyyymmdd})
mapper.insert:
INSERT /*+ APPEND PARALLEL(IT 8) */ INTO SSQ.NIC61B IT SELECT /*+ FULL(B) FULL(BM) FULL(L) PARALLEL(8) */ A.ACNT_ID AS GNL_AC_NO /* 1 계좌번호ID */ , B.TRDG_NO AS DL_SQ /* 2 거래일련번호 */ , B.PRCE_DATE AS DL_DT /* 3 거래일자 */ , SUBSTR(TO_CHAR(B.PRCE_DATE_TIME,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),9,6) AS DL_TM /* 4 거래시간 */ , nvl(C.STND_PRDT_CLSN_CODE,'*') AS GDS_NO /* 5 표준상품분류코드 */ , A.ACNT_OWNR_ID AS RNMCNO /* 6 고객엔티티ID */ , NVL(B11.TRNSFRM_CD,'99') AS DL_CHNNL_CD /* 7 거래채널코드 처리안된ext는 하드코딩 필요(구vp님) */ , B4.DL_TYP_CD AS DL_TYP_CD /* 8 거래종류코드 */ , CASE WHEN (B4.DL_TYP_CD IN ('01','02') AND B.CHCK_RCMY_AMNT = 0) OR (B.TRDG_CODE IN ('302220' /* 체크카드입금 */ ,'302210' /* 체크카드입금 */ ,'302200' /* 체크카드입금 */ ,'402410' /* 체크카드출금 */ ,'402400' /* 체크카드출금 */ ,'402390' /* 체크카드출금 */ ,'404200' /* 체크카드출금 */ ,'404190' /* 체크카드출금 */ ,'404180' /* 체크카드출금 */ ) ) THEN '01' /* 거래종류코드가 01입금 02출금 이면서 수표금액 = 0인 거래를 현금거래로함*/ WHEN B4.DL_TYP_CD IN ('01','02') AND B.CHCK_RCMY_AMNT > 0 THEN '02' /* 거래종류코드가 01입금 02출금 이면서 수표금액 > 0인 거래를 수표거래로함*/ WHEN SUBSTR(TRIM(C.STND_PRDT_CLSN_CODE),1,1) = 'A' THEN '03' /* 표준상품분류코드가 A로 시작하는거래를 주식으로함 */ WHEN SUBSTR(TRIM(C.STND_PRDT_CLSN_CODE),1,1) = 'D' THEN '04' /* 표준상품분류코드가 D로 시작하는거래를 채권으로함 */ WHEN nvl(trim(B.crny_code),'KRW') <> 'KRW' AND TRIM(B.ISUS_PRDT_ID) IS NULL THEN '05' /* CRNY_CODE가 있고(KRW, SPACE 제외), ISUS_PRDT_ID가 없는 경우 외환거래로함 */ WHEN TRIM(C.STND_PRDT_CLSN_CODE) IS NOT NULL AND SUBSTR(TRIM(C.STND_PRDT_CLSN_CODE),1,1) NOT IN ('A','D') THEN '08' /* 기타유가증권 */ WHEN B1.TRDG_NAME LIKE '%이체%' OR B1.TRDG_NAME LIKE '%대체%' THEN '06' /* 대체 */ ELSE '99' /* 기타 */ END AS DL_WY_CD /* 9 거래수단코드 */ , CASE WHEN SUBSTR(B.TRDG_CODE, 1, 1) IN ('1', '2', '3', '4') /* 1:매수 2:매도 3:입금 4:출금 원화환산거래금액계산 */ THEN ROUND(CASE WHEN NVL(TRIM(B.CRNY_CODE),'KRW') = 'KRW' THEN B.BFTX_KRW_TRDG_AMNT ELSE B.BFTX_FRGN_CRNY_TRDG_AMNT * (I.DATA_VALU / I.BAS_SCLG_FCTR) END,0) WHEN SUBSTR(B.TRDG_CODE, 1, 1) IN ('5', '6') /* 5:입고 6:출고 원화환산거래금액계산 */ THEN CASE WHEN NVL(TRIM(CRNY_CODE),'KRW') = 'KRW' AND (C.RPRS_ISCD NOT LIKE 'KRP%' AND C.RPRS_ISCD NOT LIKE 'KR3%') THEN B.TRDG_PRCE_QNTY * B.TRDG_DLNG_UNIT_PRIC WHEN NVL(TRIM(CRNY_CODE),'KRW') = 'KRW' AND (C.RPRS_ISCD LIKE 'KRP%' OR C.RPRS_ISCD NOT LIKE 'KR3%') /* CP는 금액 산출 방식 변경(수량*단가 -> 단가) */ THEN B.TRDG_DLNG_UNIT_PRIC ELSE (B.TRDG_PRCE_QNTY * B.TRDG_DLNG_UNIT_PRIC) * (I.DATA_VALU / I.BAS_SCLG_FCTR) END ELSE 0 END AS DL_AMT /* 10 원화환산거래금액 */ , CASE WHEN SUBSTR(B.TRDG_CODE, 1, 1) IN ('3', '4') /* 3:입금 4:출금일경우만 금액 - 수표로 현금계산 */ THEN B.BFTX_KRW_TRDG_AMNT - B.CHCK_RCMY_AMNT ELSE 0 END AS CSH /* 11 현금 */ , B.CHCK_RCMY_AMNT AS CHCK_AMT /* 12 수표금액 */ , B.WTHD_BLNC_AMNT AS TFND_RA /* 13 거래후잔액 */ , nvl(trim(B.crny_code),'KRW') AS CRNCY_CD /* 14 통화코드 */ , CASE WHEN NVL(TRIM(B.CRNY_CODE),'KRW') = 'KRW' THEN 1 ELSE CASE WHEN B.STLM_ECRT <> 0 THEN B.STLM_ECRT ELSE (I.DATA_VALU / I.BAS_SCLG_FCTR) END END AS EXCH_R /* 15 환율 */ , CASE WHEN SUBSTR(B.TRDG_CODE, 1, 1) IN ('1', '2', '3', '4') /* 1:매수 2:매도 3:입금 4:출금 원화환산거래금액계산 */ THEN B.BFTX_FRGN_CRNY_TRDG_AMNT /* 외화금액 */ WHEN SUBSTR(B.TRDG_CODE, 1, 1) IN ('5', '6') AND NVL(TRIM(CRNY_CODE),'KRW') <> 'KRW' /* 5:입고 6:출고 이면서 통화코드가 원화가 아닐경우 */ THEN B.TRDG_PRCE_QNTY * B.TRDG_DNOM_AMNT ELSE 0 END AS FCRNCY_DL_AMT /* 16 외화거래금액 */ , NULL AS I_AMT_P_NM /* 17 무통입금자명 */ , NULL AS I_AMT_P_RNM_NO /* 18 무통입금자실명번호 */ , NULL AS I_AMT_P_RNM_NO_CCD /* 19 무통입금자실명번호구분코드 */ , NULL AS I_AMT_P_TEL_NO /* 20 무통입금자전화번호 */ , B23.DTBR_CODE AS HANDLNG_BRN_CD /* 21 취급지점코드 */ , B.PCPR_ID AS L_HNDL_P_ENO /* 22 계정계처리자사번 */ , SYSDATE AS AML_CRT_DT /* 23 AML생성일자 */ , 'BATCH' AS AML_HNDL_P_ENO /* 24 AML처리자사번 */ , NVL(D1.GDS_DIT_CD,'99') AS GDS_DIT_CD /* 25 KOFIU상품분류코드 */ , A.ACNT_NAME AS ACNT_NAME /* 26 계좌주명 */ , NULL AS CASH_TRDG_ACNT_YN /* 27 현금거래계좌여부 */ , B.TRDG_CODE AS TRDG_CODE /* 28 거래코드 */ , B1.DTLS_TRDG_NAME AS DTLS_TRDG_NAME /* 29 거래코드명 */ , B4.FUNS_SCRS_CODE AS FUNS_SCRS_CODE /* 30 자금증권코드 */ , CASE WHEN B.CANC_YN = 'Y' AND B.TRDG_CANC_RESN_CODE = '1' THEN '2' WHEN B.CANC_YN = 'Y' AND B.TRDG_CANC_RESN_CODE = '2' THEN '3' WHEN B.CANC_YN = 'Y' AND B.TRDG_CANC_RESN_CODE = '3' THEN '4' WHEN B.CANC_YN = 'N' OR RTRIM(B.CANC_YN) IS NULL THEN '1' ELSE '-1' END AS TRDG_RSLT_SECT_CODE /* 31 거래결과구분코드 */ , C.RPRS_ISCD AS STND_IS_CD /* 32 거래종목코드 */ , C.PRDT_NAME AS STND_IS_NM /* 33 거래종목명 */ , CASE WHEN SUBSTR(B.TRDG_CODE, 1, 1) IN ('1', '2', '5', '6') /* 1:매수 2:매도 */ THEN B.TRDG_DLNG_UNIT_PRIC ELSE 0 END AS DL_UPRC /* 34 거래매매단가 */ , CASE WHEN SUBSTR(B.TRDG_CODE, 1, 1) IN ('1', '2', '5', '6') /* 1:매수 2:매도 */ THEN B.TRDG_PRCE_QNTY ELSE 0 END AS DL_Q /* 35 거래처리수량 */ , CASE WHEN A1.ERNR_TYPE_CODE IN ('111', '112', '121', '122', '131', '141') THEN 'P' WHEN A1.ERNR_TYPE_CODE IN ('211', '222') THEN 'C' WHEN A1.ERNR_TYPE_CODE IN ('311', '321', '331') THEN 'G' WHEN A1.ERNR_TYPE_CODE IN ('411', '413', '999', '000') THEN 'E' END AS STR_ERNR_TYPE_CODE /* 36 STR소득자유형코드 */ , CASE WHEN NVL(R.TNFR_TRDG_CODE, L.TNFR_TRDG_CODE) IN ('101000','102000') THEN TO_NUMBER(b.TRDG_DATE || RPAD(b.ACNT_ID,20,'0')|| RPAD(b.TRDG_NO,5,'0')|| b.TRDG_CODE) ELSE -1 END AS AML_XTRL_RMTN_PRS_IDNF_NO /* 37 AML외부송금자식별번호 */ , CASE WHEN NVL(R.TNFR_TRDG_CODE, L.TNFR_TRDG_CODE) IN ('201000','204000','204900') THEN TO_NUMBER(b.TRDG_DATE || RPAD(b.ACNT_ID,20,'0')|| RPAD(b.TRDG_NO,5,'0')|| b.TRDG_CODE) ELSE -1 END AS AML_XTRL_RECN_IDNF_NO /* 38 AML외부수신자식별번호 */ , B.RLTV_ACNT_ID AS RLTV_ACNT_ID /* 39 상대계좌ID */ , B.PRCE_DATE AS TRDG_STMN_DATE /* 40 거래기재일자 */ , R.ASPR_RNNO_CRYP AS ASPR_RNNO_CRYP /* 41 의뢰인실명번호암호문 */
, CASE WHEN TRIM(B.OTCP_ACNT_NO_CRYP) IS NULL THEN TRIM(R.RLTV_FNC_ACNT_NO_CRYP) ELSE B.OTCP_ACNT_NO_CRYP END AS RLTV_FNC_ACNT_NO_CRYP /* 42 상대은행계좌번호암호문 : 2020.10.27 타사대체출고인 경우 감안 */
, CASE WHEN TRIM(B.OTCP_SBTT_CLNT_NAME) IS NULL THEN NVL(TRIM(TO_SINGLE_BYTE(R.RLTV_BANK_ACNT_NAME)), NVL(TRIM(TO_SINGLE_BYTE(R.RMRR_NAME)), NVL(TRIM(TO_SINGLE_BYTE(R.RMPR_NAME)), TRIM(TO_SINGLE_BYTE(R.RCMY_PSBO_DISP_CTNT))))) ELSE B.OTCP_SBTT_CLNT_NAME END AS RLTV_BANK_ACNT_NAME /* 43 상대은행계좌예금주명 : 2020.10.27 타사대체출고인 경우 감안 */
, R.RLBK_CODE AS RLBK_CODE /* 44 상대은행코드 */ , R1.BANK_NAME AS RLBK_NAME /* 45 상대은행명 */ , B4.TRTY_DTLS_CODE AS TRTY_DTLS_CODE /* 46 거래유형상세코드 */ , CASE SUBSTR(NVL(B.ORGL_PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE,B.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE),1,1) WHEN 'A' THEN CASE WHEN NVL(B.ORGL_PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE,B.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE) IN ('A01', 'A02', 'A03') THEN 'C01' /* 객장 */ WHEN NVL(B.ORGL_PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE,B.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE) IN ('A05', 'A06', 'A07', 'A08', 'A09', 'A10', 'A11', 'A12', 'A13', 'A14', 'A15') THEN 'C12' /* ODS */ WHEN NVL(B.ORGL_PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE,B.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE) IN ('A04') THEN 'C13' /* 자동화기기 */ ELSE '*' END WHEN 'B' THEN 'C02' WHEN 'C' THEN CASE WHEN NVL(B.ORGL_PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE,B.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE) IN ('C01') THEN 'C01' /* 객장 */ WHEN NVL(B.ORGL_PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE,B.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE) IN ('C02','C03') THEN 'C13' /* 자동화기기 */ ELSE 'C03' /* 뱅킹 */ END WHEN 'D' THEN 'C04' WHEN 'E' THEN 'C05' WHEN 'F' THEN 'C06' WHEN 'G' THEN 'C07' WHEN 'H' THEN 'C08' WHEN 'I' THEN 'C09' WHEN 'J' THEN 'C10' WHEN 'K' THEN 'C11' END AS CHNL_CLSN_CODE /* 47 채널대분류코드 */ , CASE A4.ACNT_TYPE_SMAL_CLSN_CODE WHEN 'AA01' THEN 'P01' /* 종합 -> 종합계좌-종합 */ WHEN 'AA02' THEN 'P02' /* 은행연계(종합) -> 종합계좌-은행연계(종합) */ WHEN 'AA03' THEN 'P03' /* 금현물 -> 종합계좌-금현물 */ WHEN 'AA04' THEN 'P11' /* 퇴직연금(IRP) -> 퇴직연금 */ WHEN 'AA05' THEN 'P04' /* 골든에그 -> 종합계좌-골든에그 */ WHEN 'AA06' THEN 'P05' /* 주식전용 -> 종합계좌-주식전용 */ WHEN 'AA07' THEN 'P06' /* 주식ETF적립식 -> 종합계좌-주식ETF적립식 */ WHEN 'AA08' THEN 'P07' /* 랩종합 -> 종합계좌-랩종합 */ WHEN 'AA09' THEN 'P08' /* 개인종합자산관리 -> 종합계좌-개인종합자산관리*/ WHEN 'AA10' THEN 'P11' /* 퇴직연금(DC) -> 퇴직연금 */ WHEN 'AB01' THEN 'P09' /* 선물옵션 -> 선물옵션계좌 */ WHEN 'AC01' THEN 'P12' /* 일반증권저축 -> 저축 */ WHEN 'AC02' THEN 'P12' /* 근로자저축 -> 저축 */ WHEN 'AC03' THEN 'P12' /* 근로자장기저축 -> 저축 */ WHEN 'AC04' THEN 'P12' /* 근로자주식저축 -> 저축 */ WHEN 'AC05' THEN 'P12' /* 근로자우대저축 -> 저축 */ WHEN 'AC06' THEN 'P12' /* 세금우대저축 -> 저축 */ WHEN 'AC07' THEN 'P12' /* 비과세종합저축 -> 저축 */ WHEN 'AC08' THEN 'P12' /* 해외주식투자전용집합투자증권저축 -> 저축 */ WHEN 'AD01' THEN 'P10' /* 투신 -> 투신계좌 */ WHEN 'AD02' THEN 'P12' /* 연금저축 -> 저축 */ WHEN 'BA01' THEN 'P13' /* 포트폴리오 -> 포트폴리오 */ ELSE '*' END AS ACNT_TYPE_CLSN_CODE /* 48 계좌유형분류코드 */ , SUBSTR(C.STND_PRDT_CLSN_CODE,1,1) AS PRDT_CLSN_CODE /* 49 금융상품분류코드 */ , CASE WHEN substr(B.trdg_code,1,1) in ('3','4') then 'S01' /* 계좌입출금 */ WHEN substr(B.trdg_code,1,1) in ('1','2') AND B.ln_type_dtls_code like '4%' THEN 'S02' /* 신용 */ ELSE NULL END AS SERV_CLSN_CODE /* 50 금융서비스분류코드 */ , B21.DTBR_CODE AS MNGG_BRN_CD /* 51 관리지점코드 */ , B22.DTBR_CODE AS PRFT_BRN_CD /* 52 실적지점코드 */ , B.ISUS_PRDT_ID AS ISUS_PRDT_ID /* 53 종목상품ID */ , CASE WHEN SUBSTR(B.TRDG_CODE, 1, 1) IN ('1', '2', '3', '4') /* 1:매수 2:매도 3:입금 4:출금 원화환산거래금액계산 */ THEN ROUND(CASE WHEN NVL(TRIM(B.CRNY_CODE),'KRW') = 'KRW' THEN B.BFTX_KRW_TRDG_AMNT ELSE B.BFTX_FRGN_CRNY_TRDG_AMNT * (I.DATA_VALU / I.BAS_SCLG_FCTR) END,0) WHEN SUBSTR(B.TRDG_CODE, 1, 1) IN ('5', '6') /* 5:입고 6:출고 원화환산거래금액계산 */ THEN CASE WHEN NVL(TRIM(CRNY_CODE),'KRW') = 'KRW' THEN B.TRDG_PRCE_QNTY * B.TRDG_DLNG_UNIT_PRIC ELSE (B.TRDG_PRCE_QNTY * B.TRDG_DLNG_UNIT_PRIC) * (I.DATA_VALU / I.BAS_SCLG_FCTR) END ELSE 0 END / I1.DATA_VALU AS USD_EXCH_AMT /* 54 달러환산금액 */ , B.KRW_STLM_AMNT AS ADJST_AMT /* 55 정산금액 : 20201112.구자성 0 --> B.KRW_STLM_AMNT 로 변경 */ , 0 AS SECBAL_EVAL_AMT /* 56 유가잔고 */ , B.WTHD_BLNC_AMNT AS DPS_AMT /* 57 예수금잔고 */ , 0 AS RCVBL_BAL_AMT /* 58 미수금잔고 */ , 0 AS MLOAN_SLOAN_AMT /* 59 융자대주금 */ , B.FRGN_CRNY_WTHD_BLNC_AMNT AS FRGN_DPS_AMT /* 60 외화예수금잔고금액 */ , CASE WHEN B52.INDV_CORP_CCD = '1' AND B54.INDV_CORP_CCD = '1' THEN '1' WHEN B52.INDV_CORP_CCD = '1' AND B54.INDV_CORP_CCD = '2' THEN '2' WHEN B52.INDV_CORP_CCD = '2' AND B54.INDV_CORP_CCD = '1' THEN '3' WHEN B52.INDV_CORP_CCD = '2' AND B54.INDV_CORP_CCD = '2' THEN '4' ELSE NULL END AS PECO_TRN_CD /* 61 개인법인거래구분코드 */ , CASE WHEN B6.CNTNT IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS BNCC_TRN_YN /* 62 방카슈량스거래여부 */ , CASE WHEN SUBSTR(B.LN_TYPE_DTLS_CODE,1,1) = '4' AND SUBSTR(B.TRDG_CODE,1,1) IN ('1','2') THEN 'Y' WHEN B.TRDG_CODE IN ('301770','301750') THEN 'Y' /* 매도담보대출, 예탁담보대출 */ ELSE 'N' END AS CRDT_TRN_YN /* 63 신용거래여부 */ , B.RCMY_PSBO_DISP_CTNT AS RCMY_PSBO_DISP_CTNT /* 64 입금통장표시내용 */ , B.WTDW_PSBO_DISP_CTNT AS WTDW_PSBO_DISP_CTNT /* 65 출금통장표시내용 */ FROM SID.IDO_A_UUA_ACNT A /* IDO_A_Account_Account */ , SID.IDO_A_UUA_CLIENT_ACNT A1 /* */
, SID.IDO_A_UUN_ACNT_BSC A3 /* IDO_A_마스터데이터_계좌기본 */ , SID.IDO_A_UUN_ACNT_TYPE_CL_DTLS A4 /* IDO_A_마스터데이터_계좌유형분류명세 */ , SID.IDO_A_MBA_TRDG B /* 거래 */ , SID.IDO_A_MBA_TRDG_ADTL BM /* 거래 상세 */ , SID.IDO_A_UWB_TRD_CD B1 /* 거래코드상세 */ , ( SELECT CD_Vl9 , TRNSFRM_CD FROM SSQ.NIC95B WHERE CD='M044' ) B11 /* 거래채널코드 변환 */ , SID.IDO_A_UUE_SAMSUNG_DPRT B21 /* 관리지점코드 추출용 */ , SID.IDO_A_UUE_SAMSUNG_DPRT B22 /* 실적지점코드 추출용 */ , SID.IDO_A_UUE_SAMSUNG_DPRT B23 /* 처리지점코드 추출용 */ , SSQ.NIC81B_1 B4 /* FSC 거래코드 */ , SSQ.NIC17B B51 , SSQ.NIC01B B52 , SSQ.NIC17B B53 , SSQ.NIC01B B54 , ( SELECT CNTNT FROM SSQ.NIC92B WHERE CD = 'S019' /* 방카슈랑스계좌 */ ) B6 , SID.IDO_A_UUP_PRODUCT C /* 상품 */
, SSQ.NIC45B D1 , ( SELECT G.BSNS_DATE , H.TAGT_CRNY_CODE , G.DATA_VALU , H.BAS_SCLG_FCTR /* 기초환산계수 */ FROM SID.IDO_A_UUM_MARKET_DATA G , SID.IDO_A_UUP_CURRENCY_PAIR H WHERE G.PRIC_TYPE_CODE = 'BKR' /* 가격유형코드(BKR.한국은행고시환율) */ AND G.DATA_VALU_TYPE_CODE = 'XCR' /* 데이터값유형코드(XCR.환율) */ AND G.DATA_SORC_ENTY_ID = 102001 /* 블룸버그 */ AND G.EOD_TYPE_CODE = 'SNP' /* EOD유형코드(EOD.EOD, SNP.스냅샷) */ AND G.PRDT_ID = H.PRDT_ID AND H.BAS_CRNY_CODE = 'KRW' AND G.BSNS_DATE > ( SELECT Prev_Bsns_Date FROM SID.Ido_A_Uue_Insn_Calendar WHERE ENTY_ID = 1 AND TAGT_DATE = #{yyyymmdd} ) ) I /* 일자별통화별 환율 */ , ( SELECT G.BSNS_DATE , H.TAGT_CRNY_CODE , G.DATA_VALU FROM SID.IDO_A_UUM_MARKET_DATA G , SID.IDO_A_UUP_CURRENCY_PAIR H WHERE G.PRIC_TYPE_CODE = 'BKR' /* 가격유형코드(BKR.한국은행고시환율) */ AND G.DATA_VALU_TYPE_CODE = 'XCR' /* 데이터값유형코드(XCR.환율) */ AND G.DATA_SORC_ENTY_ID = 102001 /* 블룸버그 */ AND G.EOD_TYPE_CODE = 'SNP' /* EOD유형코드(EOD.EOD, SNP.스냅샷) */ AND G.PRDT_ID = H.PRDT_ID AND H.BAS_CRNY_CODE = 'KRW' AND H.TAGT_CRNY_CODE = 'USD' AND G.BSNS_DATE > ( SELECT Prev_Bsns_Date FROM SID.Ido_A_Uue_Insn_Calendar WHERE ENTY_ID = 1 AND TAGT_DATE = #{yyyymmdd} ) ) I1 /* 일자별 원화미화환산환율 */ , ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY ACNT_ID, TRDG_DATE, TRDG_NO, TRDG_CODE ORDER BY LOG_SQNO DESC ) AS RNK_NO , A.* FROM SID.IDO_A_MBP_BNKN_TRDG_DTLD A WHERE 1 = 1 AND CANC_YN = 'N' AND BANK_PRCE_STAS_CODE = '1' /* 은행처리결과구분코드 */ AND TRDG_CODE NOT LIKE 'W%' AND TRDG_DATE > ( SELECT Prev_Bsns_Date FROM SID.Ido_A_Uue_Insn_Calendar WHERE ENTY_ID = 1 AND TAGT_DATE = #{yyyymmdd} ) ) WHERE RNK_NO = 1 ) R , SID.IDO_A_UUS_BANK R1 /* IDO_A_Entity_Bank */ , SID.IDO_A_MBP_BNKN_TRRC_LOG L /*IDO_A_이체_뱅킹송수신로그*/ WHERE 1 = 1 AND B.TRDG_DATE > ( SELECT Prev_Bsns_Date FROM SID.Ido_A_Uue_Insn_Calendar WHERE ENTY_ID = 1 AND TAGT_DATE = #{yyyymmdd} ) AND B.TRDG_DATE <= ( SELECT TAGT_DATE FROM SID.Ido_A_Uue_Insn_Calendar WHERE ENTY_ID = 1 AND HDAY_YN = 'N' AND TAGT_DATE = #{yyyymmdd}) AND A.ACNT_ID = B.ACNT_ID AND A.ACNT_ID = A1.ACNT_ID(+)
AND A.ACNT_ID = A3.ACNT_ID(+) AND A3.ACNT_TYPE_CLSN_CODE = A4.ACNT_TYPE_CLSN_CODE(+) AND B.CANC_YN <> 'Y' AND B.ACNT_TRDG_KIND_CODE <> '14' /* 주석거래(관리점변경,통장기장등) 제외 */ AND SUBSTR(B.TRDG_CODE,1,1) BETWEEN '1' AND '6' /* 매수매도입금출금입고출고 거래만추출 7: 질권설정부분제외 */ AND B.ACNT_ID = BM.ACNT_ID AND B.TRDG_DATE = BM.TRDG_DATE AND B.TRDG_NO = BM.TRDG_NO AND SUBSTR(BM.PCPR_IP,1,2) <> 'md' /* 거래제외 */ AND B.TRDG_CODE = B1.TRDG_CODE(+) AND NVL(B.ORGL_PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE,B.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE) = B11.CD_Vl9(+) AND B.MNGG_BRNH_ENTY_ENTY_ID = B21.ENTY_ID(+) /* 관리점엔티티ID */ AND B.PRFT_CNTR_ENTY_ENTY_ID = B22.ENTY_ID(+) /* 실적점엔티티ID */ AND B.PRBN_ENTY_ID = B23.ENTY_ID(+) /* 처리점엔티티ID */ AND B.TRDG_CODE = B4.TRDG_CODE(+) AND B.ACNT_ID = B51.GNL_AC_NO(+) AND B51.RNMCNO = b52.RNMCNO(+) AND B.RLTV_ACNT_ID = B53.GNL_AC_NO(+) AND B53.RNMCNO = B54.RNMCNO(+) AND B.RLTV_ACNT_ID = B6.CNTNT(+) AND B.ISUS_PRDT_ID = C.PRDT_ID(+) AND C.STND_PRDT_CLSN_CODE = D1.GDS_NO(+) AND B.TRDG_DATE = I.BSNS_DATE(+) AND B.CRNY_CODE = I.TAGT_CRNY_CODE(+) AND I.BSNS_DATE = I1.BSNS_DATE(+) AND B.ACNT_ID = R.ACNT_ID(+) AND B.PRCE_DATE = R.TRDG_DATE(+) AND B.TRDG_NO = R.TRDG_NO(+) AND B.TRDG_CODE = R.TRDG_CODE(+) AND R.RLBK_CODE = R1.BANK_CODE(+) AND R.TRDG_DATE = L.TRDG_DATE (+) AND R.OPRN_MNGN_INSN_CODE = L.OPRN_MNGN_INSN_CODE (+) AND R.TRRC_SECT_CODE = L.TRRC_SECT_CODE (+) AND R.BNKN_BSWR_SECT_CODE = L.BNKN_BSWR_SECT_CODE (+) AND R.LOG_SQNO = L.LOG_SQNO (+)
AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM SSQ.NIC61B M WHERE M.DL_DT = B.PRCE_DATE AND M.DL_SQ = B.TRDG_NO AND M.GNL_AC_NO = B.ACNT_ID )
mapper.delete: DELETE SSQ.Nic61b_CTR WHERE 1 =1 AND DL_DT > ( SELECT Prev_Bsns_Date FROM SID.Ido_A_Uue_Insn_Calendar WHERE ENTY_ID = 1 AND TAGT_DATE = #{yyyymmdd}) AND DL_DT <= ( SELECT TAGT_DATE FROM SID.Ido_A_Uue_Insn_Calendar WHERE ENTY_ID = 1 AND HDAY_YN = 'N' AND TAGT_DATE = #{yyyymmdd})
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO NIC61B_CTR (CS_NO, ASPR_CLNT_ENTY_ID, RNMCNO, ACNT_NO, GNL_AC_NO, DL_TYP_CD, TRDG_CODE, DL_CHNNL_CD, DL_WY_CD, CTR_DL_KND_CD ,CSH, HANDLNG_BRN_CD, RLTV_FNC_ACNT_NO_CRYP, RLBK_NAME, RLBK_CODE, RLTV_BANK_ACNT_NAME, DL_DT , CTR_AGNT_RLTP_CODE, AGNT_ENTY_ID, AGNT_RLTP_NAME , DL_TM, DL_AMT, DTLS_TRDG_NAME, HNDL_DY_TM, HNDL_P_ENO, DL_SQ) SELECT CASE WHEN A.ASPR_CLNT_RNNO_CRYP > ' ' THEN A.ASPR_CLNT_RNNO_CRYP ELSE NVL(E.ENTY_ALIS_CRYP, ' ') END /* E1 2017-05-18 추가 */ , NVL(E1.ENTY_ID,0) /* 의뢰인고객번호고객번호*/ , CASE WHEN A.ASPR_CLNT_RNNO_CRYP > ' ' AND NVL(E1.ENTY_ID,0) > 0 THEN E1.ENTY_ID ELSE B.ACNT_OWNR_ID END /* 고객ID 20190527 구자성 수정 */ /* , CASE WHEN A.ASPR_CLNT_RNNO_CRYP > ' ' THEN E1.ENTY_ID ELSE B.ACNT_OWNR_ID END 고객ID 20190522 구자성 수정 */ /* , B.ACNT_OWNR_ID 고객ID */ , B.ACNT_NO_CRYP /* 계좌번호 */ , A.ACNT_ID /* 계좌ID */ , '0'||A.RAPA_SECT_CODE /* 입출금구분코드 */ , A.TRDG_CODE /* 거래코드 */ , '01' /* 거래채널 */ , '01' /* 현금 */ , CASE WHEN TRIM(A.ASPR_CLNT_RNNO_CRYP) IS NOT NULL AND A.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE = 'A01' THEN '22' ELSE '12' END /* 비우면 에러남.. 매체필수 아니므로 22로 채움 */ , NVL(A.CASH_RCPS_AMNT , 0 ) /* 현금출납금액 */ , NVL(A1.DTBR_CODE , '') /* 처리점코드 */ ---, A.PRBN_ENTY_ID /* 처리점엔티티ID */ , CASE WHEN NVL(RTRIM(A.MEDI_ACKN_YN), 'Y') != 'Y' THEN B.ACNT_NO_CRYP ELSE ' ' END/* 수취인계좌번호 */ , CASE WHEN NVL(RTRIM(A.MEDI_ACKN_YN), 'Y') != 'Y' THEN '삼성증권' ELSE ' ' END /* 수취인금융기관명 */ , CASE WHEN NVL(RTRIM(A.MEDI_ACKN_YN), 'Y') != 'Y' THEN '240' ELSE ' ' END /* 비계좌(기타) + 영수*/ , CASE WHEN NVL(RTRIM(A.MEDI_ACKN_YN), 'Y') != 'Y' THEN SUBSTR(NVL(RTRIM(C.ENTY_NAME), ' '),1,60) ELSE ' ' END /* 수취인명 */ , TO_CHAR(A.PRCE_DATE_TIME, 'YYYYMMDD') /* 2017-05-18 추가 */ , NVL(A.CTR_AGNT_RLTP_CODE, '') , NVL(A.AGNT_ENTY_ID, 0) , NVL(A.CHPR_CNFM_CTNT, '') , TO_CHAR(A.PRCE_DATE_TIME, 'HH24MISS') -- , NVL(A.CASH_RCPS_AMNT , 0 ) -- , (SELECT DTLS_TRDG_NAME FROM SID.IDO_A_UWB_TRD_CD WHERE TRDG_CODE=A.TRDG_CODE) -- , A.PRCE_DATE_TIME , NVL(TRIM(A.PCPR_ID), 'BATCH') , A.TRDG_NO -- FROM SID.IDO_A_MBA_TRDG_RAPA A LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_SAMSUNG_DPRT A1 ON A.PRBN_ENTY_ID = A1.ENTY_ID /* E1 2017-05-18 추가 */ LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_CLIENT_ENTY_ALIAS E1 ON TRIM(A.ASPR_CLNT_RNNO_CRYP) = E1.ENTY_ALIS_CRYP /* 물리적 Key는 아니나 UK 보장 */ , SID.IDO_A_UUA_ACNT B , SID.IDO_A_UUE_ENTY_NAME C , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_ADDN_IFMN D LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_CLIENT_ENTY_ALIAS E ON D.CLNT_ENTY_ID = E.ENTY_ID AND D.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE = E.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE WHERE A.TRDG_DATE > ( SELECT Prev_Bsns_Date FROM SID.Ido_A_Uue_Insn_Calendar WHERE ENTY_ID = 1 AND TAGT_DATE = #{yyyymmdd}) AND A.TRDG_DATE <= ( SELECT TAGT_DATE FROM SID.Ido_A_Uue_Insn_Calendar WHERE ENTY_ID = 1 AND HDAY_YN = 'N' AND TAGT_DATE = #{yyyymmdd}) AND A.ACNT_ID = B.ACNT_ID AND B.ACNT_OWNR_ID = C.ENTY_ID AND B.ACNT_OWNR_ID = D.CLNT_ENTY_ID AND A.CANC_YN <> 'Y' AND A.RAPA_SECT_CODE = '1' /* 입출금구분코드 */ AND A.TRDG_CODE IN ('300060', '300050', '300020') /* 비저축현금입금, 입금, 현금입금(신탁)*/ AND A.RAPA_NO > 0 /* 입출금번호 */ AND NVL(A.CASH_RCPS_AMNT, 0) > 0 /* 현금출납금액 */ AND (A.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE IN ('A02', 'A03') /* 처리채널구분코드 */ OR ( A.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE NOT IN ('A02', 'A03') /* 처리채널구분코드 */ AND A.CASH_RCPS_AMNT > 1000000 ) ) /* 현금출납금액 */ AND C.ENTY_NAME_TYPE_CODE = 'NM' AND C.LANG_CODE = 'KO'
UNION ALL
SELECT CASE WHEN A.ASPR_CLNT_RNNO_CRYP > ' ' THEN A.ASPR_CLNT_RNNO_CRYP ELSE NVL(E.ENTY_ALIS_CRYP, ' ') END /* E1 2017-05-18 추가 */ , NVL(E1.ENTY_ID,0) /* 의뢰인고객번호고객번호*/ , B.ACNT_OWNR_ID /* 고객ID */ , B.ACNT_NO_CRYP /* 계좌번호 */ , A.ACNT_ID /* 계좌ID */ , '0'||A.RAPA_SECT_CODE /* 입출금구분코드 */ , A.TRDG_CODE , '01' /* 거래채널 */ , '01' /* 현금 */ , '11' , NVL(A.CASH_RCPS_AMNT , 0 ) /* 현금출납금액 */ , NVL(A1.DTBR_CODE , '') /* 처리점코드 */ ---, A.PRBN_ENTY_ID /* 처리점엔티티ID */ , '' , '' , '' , '' , TO_CHAR(A.PRCE_DATE_TIME, 'YYYYMMDD') /* 2017-05-18 추가 */ , NVL(A.CTR_AGNT_RLTP_CODE, '') , NVL(A.AGNT_ENTY_ID, 0) , NVL(A.CHPR_CNFM_CTNT, '') , TO_CHAR(A.PRCE_DATE_TIME, 'HH24MISS') -- , NVL(A.CASH_RCPS_AMNT , 0 ) -- , (SELECT DTLS_TRDG_NAME FROM SID.IDO_A_UWB_TRD_CD WHERE TRDG_CODE=A.TRDG_CODE) -- , A.PRCE_DATE_TIME , NVL(TRIM(A.PCPR_ID), 'BATCH') , A.TRDG_NO + 10000 -- FROM SID.IDO_A_MBA_TRDG_RAPA A LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_SAMSUNG_DPRT A1 ON A.PRBN_ENTY_ID = A1.ENTY_ID /* E1 2017-05-18 추가 */ LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_CLIENT_ENTY_ALIAS E1 ON A.ASPR_CLNT_RNNO_CRYP = E1.ENTY_ALIS_CRYP /* 물리적 Key는 아니나 UK 보장 */ , SID.IDO_A_UUA_ACNT B , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_ADDN_IFMN D LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_CLIENT_ENTY_ALIAS E ON D.CLNT_ENTY_ID = E.ENTY_ID AND D.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE = E.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE WHERE A.TRDG_DATE > ( SELECT Prev_Bsns_Date FROM SID.Ido_A_Uue_Insn_Calendar WHERE ENTY_ID = 1 AND TAGT_DATE = #{yyyymmdd}) AND A.TRDG_DATE <= ( SELECT TAGT_DATE FROM SID.Ido_A_Uue_Insn_Calendar WHERE ENTY_ID = 1 AND HDAY_YN = 'N' AND TAGT_DATE = #{yyyymmdd}) AND A.ACNT_ID = B.ACNT_ID AND B.ACNT_OWNR_ID = D.CLNT_ENTY_ID AND A.CANC_YN <> 'Y' AND A.RAPA_SECT_CODE = '2' /* 입출금구분코드 */ AND A.TRDG_CODE IN ('400210','400120','400070','400020','400280','400260','400240','400220', '400060','400050','400040','400030','400020') /* 출금, 폐쇄출금,출금(신탁),폐쇄출금(신탁),책임자출금(기타),책임자출금(압류),책임자출금(카드발급전) */ /* 책임자출금(폐쇄계좌),책임자출금(기타-신탁),책임자출금(압류-신탁),책임자출금(카드발급전-신탁) */ /* 책임자출금(폐쇄계좌-신탁),폐쇄출금(신탁) */ AND A.RAPA_NO > 0 AND NVL(A.CASH_RCPS_AMNT, 0) > 0 /* 현금출납금액 */
UNION ALL
/* CD기 출금 * 2014-06-12 * 거래코드 추가 * 401000(은행CD기매도출금) -> 거래발생x ( 2013년기준 ) 402700(VAN-CD기출금) -> 거래발생됨( 2013년기준 - 점외 CD기) : 이체거래코드 : 214000 402710(시간외VAN-CD기출금) -> 거래발생됨( 2013년기준 - 점외 CD기) : 이체거래코드 : 214000 402720(365VAN-CD기출금) -> 거래발생됨( 2013년기준 - 점외 CD기) : 이체거래코드 : 214000 402910(시간외증권CD기출금) -> 거래발생됨( 2013년기준 - 객장 CD기) : 이체거래코드 : 214000 403090(365증권CD기출금) -> 거래발생됨( 2013년기준 - 객장 CD기) : 이체거래코드 : 214000 403380(증권CD기현금출금(당사)(취급)) -> 거래발생x ( 2013년기준 ) 902580(증권CD기현금출금(타사)(취급)) -> 거래발생x ( 2013년기준 ) 403220(은행CD기현금출금(개설)) -> 거래발생됨( 2013년기준 - CD공동망 ) : 이체거래코드 : 201000 * 2017-05-18 * CD기 출금거래 : 당사ATM/VAN 출금, 삼성가상계좌ATM/VAN출금, 삼성페이ATM출금, 삼성페이은행CD기 출금 404640(CD기(삼성페이)출금) 404690(은행CD기(삼성페이)출금) * * CTR_CASH_AMNT -> CASH_TRDG_AMNT 수정 * */ SELECT CASE WHEN NVL(RTRIM(A.ASPR_RNNO_CRYP), '') = '' THEN (NVL(E.ENTY_ALIS_CRYP, '')) ELSE NVL(RTRIM(A.ASPR_RNNO_CRYP), '') END , /* 고객번호 */ 0, B.ACNT_OWNR_ID , /* 고객ID */ B.ACNT_NO_CRYP , /* 계좌번호 */ A.ACNT_ID , /* 증권사계좌번호 */ '02' , A.TRDG_CODE , '02' , /* 창구거래 */ '01' , /* 현금 */ '11' , NVL(A.CASH_TRDG_AMNT , 0) , /* CTR현금금액 */ NVL(F.DTBR_CODE , ' ') , /* 처리점코드 */ ---A.PRBN_ENTY_ID , /* 처리점ID */ NVL(A.RLTV_FNC_ACNT_NO_CRYP , ''), /* 은행계좌번호 */ NVL(C.BANK_NAME , ''), /* 은행코드명 */ NVL(C.BANK_CODE , ''), /* 은행코드 */ NVL(A.RMRR_NAME , ''), /* 입금의뢰인명 */ TO_CHAR(A.PRCE_DATE_TIME, 'YYYYMMDD') /* 2017-05-18 추가 */ , NVL(A.CTR_AGNT_RLTP_CODE, '') , NVL(A.AGNT_ENTY_ID, 0) , NVL(A.CHPR_CNFM_CTNT, '') , TO_CHAR(A.PRCE_DATE_TIME, 'HH24MISS') -- , NVL(A.CASH_TRDG_AMNT , 0) -- , (SELECT DTLS_TRDG_NAME FROM SID.IDO_A_UWB_TRD_CD WHERE TRDG_CODE=A.TRDG_CODE) -- , A.PRCE_DATE_TIME , NVL(TRIM(A.PCPR_ID), 'BATCH') , A.TRDG_NO + 20000 -- FROM SID.IDO_A_MBP_BNKN_TRDG_DTLD A LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_SAMSUNG_DPRT F ON A.PRBN_ENTY_ID = F.ENTY_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUA_ACNT B ON A.ACNT_ID = B.ACNT_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUS_BANK C ON A.RLTV_BANK_BNCD = C.BANK_CODE , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_ADDN_IFMN D LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_CLIENT_ENTY_ALIAS E ON D.CLNT_ENTY_ID = E.ENTY_ID AND D.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE = E.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE WHERE A.TRDG_DATE > ( SELECT Prev_Bsns_Date FROM SID.Ido_A_Uue_Insn_Calendar WHERE ENTY_ID = 1 AND TAGT_DATE = #{yyyymmdd}) AND A.TRDG_DATE <= ( SELECT TAGT_DATE FROM SID.Ido_A_Uue_Insn_Calendar WHERE ENTY_ID = 1 AND HDAY_YN = 'N' AND TAGT_DATE = #{yyyymmdd}) AND A.TRDG_CODE IN ('401010', '400950', '400930', '400850', '402550', '401000', '402700', '402710', '402720', '402910', '403090', '403380', '902580', '403220', /*은행CD기출금, CD기출금, 마감후은행CD기출금, 365은행CD기출금, VAN-CD기출금 추가 */ '404640', '404690', '407070') /*삼성페이 ATM-은행CD출금 , 무매체출금*/ AND NVL(A.CASH_TRDG_AMNT, 0) > 0 /* CTR현금금액 */ AND A.TRRC_SECT_CODE = '2' /* 송수신구분코드 */ /*AND A.TNFR_TRDG_CODE IN ('204000','205000') 이체업무구분코드(2014-06-12 의미없어 삭제함) */ AND A.CANC_YN = 'N' AND A.BANK_PRCE_STAS_CODE = '1' /* 은행처리결과구분코드 */ AND B.ACNT_OWNR_ID = D.CLNT_ENTY_ID
UNION ALL
/* CD기 입금 * 2014-06-12 * 302570(VAN-CD기입금) -> 거래발생X ( 2013년기준 ) 302580(시간외VAN-CD기입금) -> 거래발생X ( 2013년기준 ) 302850(증권CD기입금) -> 거래발생됨 ( 2013년기준 - 롯데ATM ) : 이체거래코드 : 111000 302860(시간외증권CD기입금) -> 거래발생됨 ( 2013년기준 - 롯데ATM ) : 이체거래코드 : 111000 302960(365증권CD기입금) -> 거래발생됨 ( 2013년기준 - 롯데ATM ) : 이체거래코드 : 111000 303100(증권CD기현금입금(취급)) -> 거래발생X ( 2013년기준 ) 303000(은행CD기현금입금) -> 거래발생됨 ( 2013년기준 - CD공동망) : 이체거래코드 : 103000 * 2017-05-18 * CD기 입금거래 : 당사ATM/VAN 입금, 삼성가상계좌ATM/VAN입금, 삼성페이ATM입금, 삼성페이은행CD기 입금 304250(CD기(삼성페이)입금) 304290(은행CD기(삼성페이)입금) * CTR_CASH_AMNT -> CASH_TRDG_AMNT 수정 * */ SELECT CASE WHEN NVL(RTRIM(A.ASPR_RNNO_CRYP), '') = '' THEN (NVL(E.ENTY_ALIS_CRYP, '')) ELSE NVL(RTRIM(A.ASPR_RNNO_CRYP), '') END , /* 고객번호 */ 0, B.ACNT_OWNR_ID , /* 고객ID */ B.ACNT_NO_CRYP , /* 계좌번호 */ A.ACNT_ID , /* 계좌ID */ '01' , A.TRDG_CODE , '02' , /* 창구거래 */ '01' , /* 현금 */ '12' , NVL(A.CASH_TRDG_AMNT, 0) , /* CTR현금금액 */ NVL(F.DTBR_CODE, ' ') , /* 처리점코드 */ ---A.PRBN_ENTY_ID , /* 처리점ID */ NVL(A.RLTV_FNC_ACNT_NO_CRYP , '') , /* 은행계좌번호 */ NVL(C.BANK_NAME , '') , /* 은행코드명 */ NVL(C.BANK_CODE , '') , /* 은행코드 */ NVL(A.RMRR_NAME , '') , /* 입금의뢰인명 */ TO_CHAR(A.PRCE_DATE_TIME, 'YYYYMMDD') /* 2017-05-18 추가 */ , NVL(A.CTR_AGNT_RLTP_CODE, '') , NVL(A.AGNT_ENTY_ID, 0) , NVL(A.CHPR_CNFM_CTNT, '') , TO_CHAR(A.PRCE_DATE_TIME, 'HH24MISS') -- , NVL(A.CASH_TRDG_AMNT, 0) -- , (SELECT DTLS_TRDG_NAME FROM SID.IDO_A_UWB_TRD_CD WHERE TRDG_CODE=A.TRDG_CODE) -- , A.PRCE_DATE_TIME , NVL(TRIM(A.PCPR_ID), 'BATCH') , A.LOG_SQNO + 30000 -- FROM SID.IDO_A_MBP_BNKN_TRDG_DTLD A LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_SAMSUNG_DPRT F ON A.PRBN_ENTY_ID = F.ENTY_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUA_ACNT B ON A.ACNT_ID = B.ACNT_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUS_BANK C ON A.RLTV_BANK_BNCD = C.BANK_CODE , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_ADDN_IFMN D LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_CLIENT_ENTY_ALIAS E ON D.CLNT_ENTY_ID = E.ENTY_ID AND D.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE = E.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE
WHERE A.TRDG_DATE > ( SELECT Prev_Bsns_Date FROM SID.Ido_A_Uue_Insn_Calendar WHERE ENTY_ID = 1 AND TAGT_DATE = #{yyyymmdd}) AND A.TRDG_DATE <= ( SELECT TAGT_DATE FROM SID.Ido_A_Uue_Insn_Calendar WHERE ENTY_ID = 1 AND HDAY_YN = 'N' AND TAGT_DATE = #{yyyymmdd}) AND A.TRDG_CODE IN ('300440', '302570', '302580', '302850', '302860', '302960', '303100', '303000',/* 은행 CD기 입금 */ '304250', '304290')/* 삼성페이 CD기 입금 */ /****************** 2008.06.13 이체입금 빼달라고 해서 변경 AND A.TRDG_CODE IN ('300440', '300500', '300380', '300320', '300310', '300280') 은행CD기입금, 은행이체입금, 마감후은행이체입금, 365은행이체입금, 은행이체입금(신탁), 마감후은행이체입금(신탁) ********************/ AND NVL(A.CASH_TRDG_AMNT, 0) > 0 AND A.TRRC_SECT_CODE ='2' /* 송수신구분코드 */ /*AND A.TNFR_TRDG_CODE IN ('101000','102000') 이체업무구분코드 2014-06-12 불필요하여 삭제 */ AND A.CANC_YN = 'N' AND A.BANK_PRCE_STAS_CODE = '1' /* 은행처리결과구분코드 */ AND B.ACNT_OWNR_ID = D.CLNT_ENTY_ID
UNION ALL
/* 송금 * 2014-06-12 송금정보에는 계좌id가 없어서 uua_acnt 조인조건 없앰 * ASPR_RNNO_CRYP -> RMPR_RNNO_CRYP 로 수정 * 2014-06-12 가상계좌창구입금 추가. * 2017-05-18 계좌주id 쿼리 수정 * 2017-06-01 의뢰인실명번호 가져오도록 수정.(안세혁) * 2018-02-08 송금내역 조회 시 SELECT 컬럼 변경. 의뢰인명 -> 수취인명.(안세혁) * */
/* SELECT A.RMPR_RNNO_CRYP , 고객번호*/ /* SELECT CASE WHEN A.RMPR_RNNO_CRYP <> ' ' THEN A.RMPR_RNNO_CRYP ELSE A.ASPR_RNNO_CRYP END * , E1.ENTY_ID */ SELECT A.ASPR_RNNO_CRYP , E1.ENTY_ID , 0 , ' ' /* 계좌번호 */ , A.ACNT_ID /* 계좌ID */ , '01' , A.TRDG_CODE , '01' /* 창구거래 */ , '01' /* 현금 */ , '22' , NVL(A.CASH_TRDG_AMNT, 0) /* 현금거래금액 */ , NVL(F.DTBR_CODE, ' ') /* 처리점코드 */ ---, A.PRBN_ENTY_ID /* 처리점ID */ , NVL(A.RLTV_FNC_ACNT_NO_CRYP , '') /* 은행계좌번호 */ , NVL(B.BANK_NAME , '') /* 은행코드명 */ , NVL(B.BANK_CODE , '') /* 은행코드 */ /*, NVL(A.RMRR_NAME , '')*/ /* 입금의뢰인명 */ , NVL(A.RLTV_BANK_ACNT_NAME , '') /* 상대은행계좌명 */ , TO_CHAR(A.PRCE_DATE_TIME, 'YYYYMMDD') , NVL(A.CTR_AGNT_RLTP_CODE, '') , NVL(A.AGNT_ENTY_ID, 0) , NVL(A.CHPR_CNFM_CTNT, '') , TO_CHAR(A.PRCE_DATE_TIME, 'HH24MISS') -- , NVL(A.CASH_TRDG_AMNT, 0) -- , (SELECT DTLS_TRDG_NAME FROM SID.IDO_A_UWB_TRD_CD WHERE TRDG_CODE=A.TRDG_CODE) -- , A.PRCE_DATE_TIME , NVL(TRIM(A.PCPR_ID), 'BATCH') , A.TRDG_NO + 40000 -- FROM SID.IDO_A_MBP_BNKN_TRDG_DTLD A LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_CLIENT_ENTY_ALIAS E1 ON A.ASPR_RNNO_CRYP = E1.ENTY_ALIS_CRYP LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_SAMSUNG_DPRT F ON A.PRBN_ENTY_ID = F.ENTY_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUS_BANK B ON A.RLBK_CODE = B.BANK_CODE WHERE A.TRDG_DATE > ( SELECT Prev_Bsns_Date FROM SID.Ido_A_Uue_Insn_Calendar WHERE ENTY_ID = 1 AND TAGT_DATE = #{yyyymmdd}) AND A.TRDG_DATE <= ( SELECT TAGT_DATE FROM SID.Ido_A_Uue_Insn_Calendar WHERE ENTY_ID = 1 AND HDAY_YN = 'N' AND TAGT_DATE = #{yyyymmdd}) AND A.TRDG_CODE IN ('902270','902530', '903310','903340')/* 은행송금, 가상계좌입금(2014-06-12 902530 추가) */ AND NVL(A.CASH_TRDG_AMNT, 0) > 1000000 /* 현금거래금액 */ AND A.TRRC_SECT_CODE = '1' /* 송수신구분코드 */ /*AND A.TNFR_TRDG_CODE = '202000' 이체업무구분코드 2014-06-12 삭제*/ AND A.CANC_YN ='N' AND A.BANK_PRCE_STAS_CODE ='1' /* 은행처리결과구분코드 */
UNION ALL
SELECT CASE WHEN NVL(A.ASKN_CLNT_ENTY_ID, 0) > 0 then (SELECT MAX(AA.ENTY_ALIS_CRYP) KEEP (DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY AA.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE) FROM SID.IDO_A_UUE_CLIENT_ENTY_ALIAS AA , SID.IDO_A_UUE_LEGAL_ENTY BB WHERE AA.ENTY_ID = BB.ENTY_ID AND AA.ENTY_ID = NVL(A.ASKN_CLNT_ENTY_ID, 0)) ELSE NVL(D.ENTY_ALIS_CRYP, '') END , /* 의뢰인고객번호 */ A.ASKN_CLNT_ENTY_ID, B.ACNT_OWNR_ID , /* 고객ID */ B.ACNT_NO_CRYP , /* 계좌번호 */ B.ACNT_ID , /* 계좌ID */ '01' , CASE WHEN A.SBSN_SECT_CODE = 'LOS' THEN '900190' /* 청약구분코드: 실권주현금청약 */ WHEN A.SBSN_SECT_CODE = 'BND' THEN '900170' /* 청약구분코드: 사채현금청약 */ ELSE ' ' END , '01' , /* 창구거래 */ '01' , /* 현금 */ '99' , NVL(A.SBSN_CASH_AMNT, 0) , /* 현금금액 */ NVL(F.DTBR_CODE, ' ') , /* 처리점코드 */ ---A.PRBN_ENTY_ID , /* 처리점ID */ '' , '' , '' , '' , TO_CHAR(A.PRCE_DATE_TIME, 'YYYYMMDD') /* 2017-05-18 추가 */ , NVL(A.CTR_AGNT_RLTP_CODE, '') , NVL(A.AGNT_ENTY_ID, 0) , NVL(SUBSTR(TRIM(A.AGNT_RLTP_NAME),1,30), '') , TO_CHAR(A.PRCE_DATE_TIME, 'HH24MISS') -- , NVL(A.SBSN_CASH_AMNT, 0) -- , (SELECT DTLS_TRDG_NAME FROM SID.IDO_A_UWB_TRD_CD WHERE TRDG_CODE =DECODE(A.SBSN_SECT_CODE,'LOS','900190','BND','900170')) -- , A.PRCE_DATE_TIME , NVL(TRIM(A.PCPR_ID), 'BATCH') , A.SBSN_TRDG_NO + 50000 -- FROM SID.IDO_A_MDI_ETC_SBSN A LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_SAMSUNG_DPRT F ON A.PRBN_ENTY_ID = F.ENTY_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUA_ACNT B ON A.ACNT_ID = B.ACNT_ID , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_ADDN_IFMN C LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_CLIENT_ENTY_ALIAS D ON C.CLNT_ENTY_ID = D.ENTY_ID AND C.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE = D.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE WHERE A.PRCE_DATE > ( SELECT Prev_Bsns_Date FROM SID.Ido_A_Uue_Insn_Calendar WHERE ENTY_ID = 1 AND TAGT_DATE = #{yyyymmdd}) AND A.PRCE_DATE <= ( SELECT TAGT_DATE FROM SID.Ido_A_Uue_Insn_Calendar WHERE ENTY_ID = 1 AND HDAY_YN = 'N' AND TAGT_DATE = #{yyyymmdd}) AND A.SBSN_CANC_YN = 'N' /* 청약취소여부 */ AND A.CLNT_ENTY_ID = C.CLNT_ENTY_ID AND NVL(A.SBSN_FUNS_SECT_CODE, '') = 'CSH' /* 청약자금구분코드 */ AND A.SBSN_SECT_CODE IN ('LOS', 'BND') /* 청약구분코드 이거 7번은 먼지 꼭 확인할것 (실권주랑 채권청약)*/ AND A.SBSN_PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE = 'A01' AND A.LAST_TRDG_YN = 'Y' /* 최종거래여부 */ AND NVL(A.SBSN_CASH_AMNT, 0) >= 1000000 /* 현금금액 */
UNION ALL
SELECT CASE WHEN NVL(A.ASKN_CLNT_ENTY_ID, 0) > 0 then (SELECT MAX(AA.ENTY_ALIS_CRYP) KEEP (DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY AA.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE) FROM SID.IDO_A_UUE_CLIENT_ENTY_ALIAS AA , SID.IDO_A_UUE_LEGAL_ENTY BB WHERE AA.ENTY_ID = BB.ENTY_ID AND AA.ENTY_ID = NVL(A.ASKN_CLNT_ENTY_ID, 0)) ELSE NVL(D.ENTY_ALIS_CRYP, '') END , /* 의뢰인고객번호 */ A.ASKN_CLNT_ENTY_ID, B.ACNT_OWNR_ID , /* 고객ID */ B.ACNT_NO_CRYP , /* 계좌번호 */ B.ACNT_ID , /* 계좌ID */ '01' , '900210' , /* 공모주현금청약 */ '01' , /* 창구거래 */ '01' , /* 현금 */ '99' , NVL(A.SBSN_CASH_AMNT, 0) , /* 현금금액 */ NVL(F.DTBR_CODE, ' ') , /* 처리점코드 */ ---A.PRBN_ENTY_ID , /* 처리점ID */ '' , '' , '' , '' , TO_CHAR(A.PRCE_DATE_TIME, 'YYYYMMDD') /* 2017-05-18 추가 */ , NVL(A.CTR_AGNT_RLTP_CODE, '') , NVL(A.AGNT_ENTY_ID, 0) , NVL(SUBSTR(TRIM(A.AGNT_RLTP_NAME),1,30), '') , TO_CHAR(A.PRCE_DATE_TIME, 'HH24MISS') -- , NVL(A.SBSN_CASH_AMNT, 0) -- , (SELECT DTLS_TRDG_NAME FROM SID.IDO_A_UWB_TRD_CD WHERE TRDG_CODE='900210') -- , A.PRCE_DATE_TIME , NVL(TRIM(A.PCPR_ID), 'BATCH') , A.SBSN_TRDG_NO + 60000 -- FROM SID.IDO_A_MDA_POS_SBSN A LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_SAMSUNG_DPRT F ON A.PRBN_ENTY_ID = F.ENTY_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUA_ACNT B ON A.ACNT_ID = B.ACNT_ID , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_ADDN_IFMN C LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_CLIENT_ENTY_ALIAS D ON C.CLNT_ENTY_ID = D.ENTY_ID AND C.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE = D.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE WHERE A.PRCE_DATE > ( SELECT Prev_Bsns_Date FROM SID.Ido_A_Uue_Insn_Calendar WHERE ENTY_ID = 1 AND TAGT_DATE = #{yyyymmdd}) AND A.PRCE_DATE <= ( SELECT TAGT_DATE FROM SID.Ido_A_Uue_Insn_Calendar WHERE ENTY_ID = 1 AND HDAY_YN = 'N' AND TAGT_DATE = #{yyyymmdd}) AND A.CLNT_ENTY_ID = C.CLNT_ENTY_ID AND A.CANC_YN = 'N' /* 취소여부 */ AND NVL(A.SBSN_FUNS_SECT_CODE, '') = 'CSH' /* 청약자금구분코드 */ AND A.SBSN_PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE = 'A01' AND A.LAST_TRDG_YN = 'Y' /* 최종거래여부 */ AND NVL(A.SBSN_CASH_AMNT, 0) >= 1000000 /* 현금금액 */
UNION ALL
SELECT CASE WHEN NVL(A.ASKN_CLNT_ENTY_ID, 0) > 0 then (SELECT MAX(AA.ENTY_ALIS_CRYP) KEEP (DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY AA.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE) FROM SID.IDO_A_UUE_CLIENT_ENTY_ALIAS AA , SID.IDO_A_UUE_LEGAL_ENTY BB WHERE AA.ENTY_ID = BB.ENTY_ID AND AA.ENTY_ID = NVL(A.ASKN_CLNT_ENTY_ID, 0)) ELSE NVL(D.ENTY_ALIS_CRYP, '') END , /* 의뢰인고객번호 */ A.ASKN_CLNT_ENTY_ID, B.ACNT_OWNR_ID, B.ACNT_NO_CRYP , /* 계좌번호 */ B.ACNT_ID , /* 계좌ID */ '01' , '900720' , /* 유상현금청약 */ '01' , /* 창구거래 */ '01' , /* 현금 */ '99' , NVL(A.SBSN_CASH_AMNT, 0) , /* 현금금액 */ NVL(F.DTBR_CODE, ' ') , /* 처리점코드 */ ---A.PRBN_ENTY_ID , /* 처리점ID */ '' , '' , '' , '' , TO_CHAR(A.PRCE_DATE_TIME, 'YYYYMMDD') /* 2017-05-18 추가 */ , NVL(A.CTR_AGNT_RLTP_CODE, '') , NVL(A.AGNT_ENTY_ID, 0) , NVL(SUBSTR(TRIM(A.AGNT_RLTP_NAME),1,30), '') , TO_CHAR(A.PRCE_DATE_TIME, 'HH24MISS') -- , NVL(A.SBSN_CASH_AMNT, 0) -- , (SELECT DTLS_TRDG_NAME FROM SID.IDO_A_UWB_TRD_CD WHERE TRDG_CODE='900720') -- , A.PRCE_DATE_TIME , NVL(TRIM(A.PCPR_ID), 'BATCH') , A.SBSN_NO + 70000 -- 2021.01.15 TRDG_NO -> SBSN_NO FROM SID.IDO_A_MDM_DMSC_SBSN A LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_SAMSUNG_DPRT F ON A.PRBN_ENTY_ID = F.ENTY_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUA_ACNT B ON A.ACNT_ID = B.ACNT_ID , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_ADDN_IFMN C LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_CLIENT_ENTY_ALIAS D ON C.CLNT_ENTY_ID = D.ENTY_ID AND C.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE = D.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE WHERE A.SBSN_DATE > ( SELECT Prev_Bsns_Date FROM SID.Ido_A_Uue_Insn_Calendar WHERE ENTY_ID = 1 AND TAGT_DATE = #{yyyymmdd}) AND A.SBSN_DATE <= ( SELECT TAGT_DATE FROM SID.Ido_A_Uue_Insn_Calendar WHERE ENTY_ID = 1 AND HDAY_YN = 'N' AND TAGT_DATE = #{yyyymmdd}) /* 청약일자 */ AND NVL(A.PDN_CASH_SECT_CODE, '') = 'CSH' /* 유상현금구분코드 */ AND B.ACNT_OWNR_ID = C.CLNT_ENTY_ID AND A.CANC_YN = 'N' /* 취소여부 */ AND A.LAST_TRDG_YN = 'Y' /* 최종거래여부 : 20211015 추가 */ AND A.RGHT_CRCT_SECT_CODE = 'COM' /* 유통구분코드 */ AND NVL(A.SBSN_CASH_AMNT, 0) >= 1000000 /* 현금금액 */
UNION ALL
SELECT CASE WHEN NVL(A.ASKN_CLNT_ENTY_ID, 0) > 0 then (SELECT MAX(AA.ENTY_ALIS_CRYP) KEEP (DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY AA.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE) FROM SID.IDO_A_UUE_CLIENT_ENTY_ALIAS AA , SID.IDO_A_UUE_LEGAL_ENTY BB WHERE AA.ENTY_ID = BB.ENTY_ID AND AA.ENTY_ID = NVL(A.ASKN_CLNT_ENTY_ID, 0)) ELSE NVL(D.ENTY_ALIS_CRYP, '') END , /* 의뢰인고객번호 */ A.ASKN_CLNT_ENTY_ID, B.ACNT_OWNR_ID , /* 고객ID */ B.ACNT_NO_CRYP , /* 계좌번호 */ B.ACNT_ID , /* 계좌ID */ '01' , '900120' , /* ELS현금청약(사모) */ '01' , /* 창구거래 */ '01' , /* 현금 */ '99' , NVL(A.SBSN_CASH_AMNT, 0) , /* 현금금액 */ NVL(F.DTBR_CODE, ' ') , /* 처리점코드 */ ---A.PRBN_ENTY_ID , /* 처리점ID */ '' , '' , '' , '' , TO_CHAR(A.PRCE_DATE_TIME, 'YYYYMMDD') /* 2017-05-18 추가 */ , NVL(A.CTR_AGNT_RLTP_CODE, '') , NVL(A.AGNT_ENTY_ID, 0) , NVL(SUBSTR(TRIM(A.AGNT_RLTP_NAME),1,30), '') , TO_CHAR(A.PRCE_DATE_TIME, 'HH24MISS') -- , NVL(A.SBSN_CASH_AMNT, 0) -- , (SELECT DTLS_TRDG_NAME FROM SID.IDO_A_UWB_TRD_CD WHERE TRDG_CODE='900120') -- , A.PRCE_DATE_TIME , NVL(TRIM(A.PCPR_ID), 'BATCH') , A.SBSN_TRDG_NO + 80000 -- FROM SID.IDO_A_MDH_DRVT_SBSN A LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_SAMSUNG_DPRT F ON A.PRBN_ENTY_ID = F.ENTY_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUA_ACNT B ON A.ACNT_ID = B.ACNT_ID , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_ADDN_IFMN C LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_CLIENT_ENTY_ALIAS D ON C.CLNT_ENTY_ID = D.ENTY_ID AND C.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE = D.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE WHERE A.PRCE_DATE > ( SELECT Prev_Bsns_Date FROM SID.Ido_A_Uue_Insn_Calendar WHERE ENTY_ID = 1 AND TAGT_DATE = #{yyyymmdd}) AND A.PRCE_DATE <= ( SELECT TAGT_DATE FROM SID.Ido_A_Uue_Insn_Calendar WHERE ENTY_ID = 1 AND HDAY_YN = 'N' AND TAGT_DATE = #{yyyymmdd}) AND A.SBSN_CANC_YN = 'N' AND NVL(A.SBSN_FUNS_SECT_CODE, '') = 'CSH' AND B.ACNT_OWNR_ID = C.CLNT_ENTY_ID AND A.SBSN_PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE = 'A01' AND A.LAST_TRDG_YN = 'Y' AND NVL(A.SBSN_CASH_AMNT, 0) >= 1000000
UNION ALL
SELECT CASE WHEN NVL(A.ASKN_CLNT_ENTY_ID, 0) > 0 then (SELECT MAX(AA.ENTY_ALIS_CRYP) KEEP (DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY AA.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE) FROM SID.IDO_A_UUE_CLIENT_ENTY_ALIAS AA , SID.IDO_A_UUE_LEGAL_ENTY BB WHERE AA.ENTY_ID = BB.ENTY_ID AND AA.ENTY_ID = NVL(A.ASKN_CLNT_ENTY_ID, 0)) ELSE NVL(A.CLNT_RNNO_CRYP, '') END , /* 의뢰인고객번호 */ A.ASKN_CLNT_ENTY_ID , NVL(B.ACNT_OWNR_ID, 0) , NVL(B.ACNT_NO_CRYP, '') , /* 계좌번호 */ NVL(B.ACNT_ID, 0) , /* 계좌ID */ '01' , '900160' , /* 유상현금청약 */ '01' , /* 창구거래 */ '01' , /* 현금 */ '99' , NVL(SBSN_CASH_AMNT, 0) , /* 현금금액 */ NVL(F.DTBR_CODE, ' ') , /* 처리점코드 */ ---A.PRBN_ENTY_ID , /* 처리점ID */ '' , '' , '' , '' , TO_CHAR(A.PRCE_DATE_TIME, 'YYYYMMDD') /* 2017-05-18 추가 */ , NVL(A.CTR_AGNT_RLTP_CODE, '') , NVL(A.AGNT_ENTY_ID, 0) , NVL(SUBSTR(TRIM(A.AGNT_RLTP_NAME),1,30), '') , TO_CHAR(A.PRCE_DATE_TIME, 'HH24MISS') -- , NVL(A.SBSN_CASH_AMNT, 0) -- , (SELECT DTLS_TRDG_NAME FROM SID.IDO_A_UWB_TRD_CD WHERE TRDG_CODE='900160') -- , A.PRCE_DATE_TIME , NVL(TRIM(A.PCPR_ID), 'BATCH') -- , A.SBSN_TRDG_NO + 90000 -- , A.SBSN_TRDG_NO + A.SBSN_PRDT_ID --2024.06.24 거래일련번호 중복으로 인한 변경 FROM SID.IDO_A_MDC_HLDR_SBSN A LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_SAMSUNG_DPRT F ON A.PRBN_ENTY_ID = F.ENTY_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUA_ACNT B ON A.ACNT_ID = B.ACNT_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_ADDN_IFMN C ON B.ACNT_OWNR_ID = C.CLNT_ENTY_ID
WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.PRCE_DATE > ( SELECT Prev_Bsns_Date FROM SID.Ido_A_Uue_Insn_Calendar WHERE ENTY_ID = 1 AND TAGT_DATE = #{yyyymmdd}) AND A.PRCE_DATE <= ( SELECT TAGT_DATE FROM SID.Ido_A_Uue_Insn_Calendar WHERE ENTY_ID = 1 AND HDAY_YN = 'N' AND TAGT_DATE = #{yyyymmdd}) AND A.CANC_YN = 'N' AND A.LAST_TRDG_YN = 'Y' AND NVL(A.SBSN_CASH_AMNT, 0) >= 1000000
mapper.delete: DELETE /*+ FULL(B) PARALLEL(8) */ SSQ.NIC62B B WHERE 1 = 1 AND B.DL_DT > (SELECT Prev_Bsns_Date FROM SID.Ido_A_Uue_Insn_Calendar WHERE ENTY_ID = 1 AND TAGT_DATE = #{yyyymmdd} ) AND B.DL_DT <= ( SELECT TAGT_DATE FROM SID.Ido_A_Uue_Insn_Calendar WHERE ENTY_ID = 1 AND HDAY_YN = 'N' AND TAGT_DATE = #{yyyymmdd})
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO SSQ.NIC62B
SELECT DISTINCT GNL_AC_NO /* 1 계좌ID */ , GDS_NO /* 2 상품번호 */ , DL_DT /* 3 거래일자 */ , DL_SQ /* 4 거래일련번호 */ , CPRTY_TRSNS_OGN_CD /* 5 상대금융기관코드 */ , CPRTY_TRSNS_FOGN_NM /* 6 상대금융기관명 */ , CPRTY_TRSNS_DPRT_CD /* 7 상대금융기관부점코드 */ , CPRTY_TRSNS_PST_NO /* 8 상대금융기관우편번호 */ , CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NO /* 9 상대금융기관계좌번호 */ , CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NM /* 10 상대금융기관계좌명 */ , CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_RNM_NO /* 11 상대금융기관계좌실명번호 */ , CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_RNM_CNFR_CCD /* 12 상대금융기관계좌실명확인구분코드 */ , CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_OWN_NTN_CD /* 13 상대금융기관계좌소유국가코드 */ , AML_CRT_DT /* 14 AML생성일자 */ FROM ( SELECT /*+ FULL(R) FULL(S) PARALLEL(8) */ R.ACNT_ID AS GNL_AC_NO /* 1 계좌ID */ , nvl(C.STND_PRDT_CLSN_CODE,'*') AS GDS_NO /* 2 상품번호 */ , R.TRDG_DATE AS DL_DT /* 3 거래일자 */ , R.TRDG_NO AS DL_SQ /* 4 거래일련번호 */ , R.RLBK_CODE AS CPRTY_TRSNS_OGN_CD /* 5 상대금융기관코드 */ , K.BANK_NAME AS CPRTY_TRSNS_FOGN_NM /* 6 상대금융기관명 */ , R.RLTV_BANK_BNCD AS CPRTY_TRSNS_DPRT_CD /* 7 상대금융기관부점코드 */ , NULL AS CPRTY_TRSNS_PST_NO /* 8 상대금융기관우편번호 */ , TRIM(R.RLTV_FNC_ACNT_NO_CRYP) AS CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NO /* 9 상대금융기관계좌번호 */ , NVL(TRIM(TO_SINGLE_BYTE(R.RLTV_BANK_ACNT_NAME)), NVL(TRIM(TO_SINGLE_BYTE(R.RMRR_NAME)), NVL(TRIM(TO_SINGLE_BYTE(R.RMPR_NAME)), TRIM(TO_SINGLE_BYTE(R.RCMY_PSBO_DISP_CTNT))))) AS CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NM /* 10 상대금융기관계좌명 */
, L.ENTY_ALIS_CRYP AS CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_RNM_NO /* 11 상대금융기관계좌실명번호 */ /* , CASE L.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE WHEN 'BRGN' THEN '03' WHEN 'CRGN' THEN '05' WHEN 'DIRN' THEN '99' WHEN 'FICN' THEN '12' WHEN 'FRIN' THEN '08' WHEN 'FRRN' THEN '07' WHEN 'FSSN' THEN '99' WHEN 'PSPT' THEN '04' WHEN 'SSCN' THEN '01' WHEN 'TXID' THEN '09' ELSE '99' END */ , NVL((SELECT TRNSFRM_CD FROM SSQ.NIC95B WHERE CD = 'L200' AND CD_VL9 = L.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE ), '99') AS CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_RNM_CNFR_CCD /* 12 상대금융기관계좌실명확인구분코드 */ , E.CNTY_CODE AS CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_OWN_NTN_CD /* 13 상대금융기관계좌소유국가코드 */ , SYSDATE AS AML_CRT_DT /* 14 AML생성일자 */ FROM SID.IDO_A_MBP_BNKN_TRDG_DTLD R /* IDO_A_이체_뱅킹거래내역 */
INNER JOIN (SELECT /*+ FULL(J) PARALLEL(8) */ J.ACNT_ID /* 뱅킹거래내역 TRDG_NO 중복건 처리를 위해, MAX(전문번호) 인 건만 처리 */ , J.TRDG_DATE , J.TRDG_NO , MAX(J.TLGR_NO) AS TLGR_NO FROM SID.IDO_A_MBP_BNKN_TRDG_DTLD J WHERE 1 = 1 AND J.CANC_YN = 'N' AND J.BANK_PRCE_STAS_CODE = '1' AND J.ACNT_ID IS NOT NULL AND J.TRDG_CODE NOT LIKE 'W%' AND J.OPRN_MNGN_INSN_CODE NOT IN ('0CH', '0VC', '0HS', '0HN', '0NC', 'KBV', 'FBV', 'LTV', 'NAT', 'ATM', '1HS', '1NC') AND J.TRDG_DATE > ( SELECT Prev_Bsns_Date FROM SID.Ido_A_Uue_Insn_Calendar WHERE ENTY_ID = 1 AND TAGT_DATE = #{yyyymmdd} ) AND J.TRDG_DATE <= ( SELECT TAGT_DATE FROM SID.Ido_A_Uue_Insn_Calendar WHERE ENTY_ID = 1 AND HDAY_YN = 'N' AND TAGT_DATE = #{yyyymmdd}) GROUP BY J.ACNT_ID, J.TRDG_DATE, J.TRDG_NO ) S ON S.ACNT_ID = R.ACNT_ID AND S.TRDG_DATE = R.TRDG_DATE AND S.TRDG_NO = R.TRDG_NO AND S.TLGR_NO = R.TLGR_NO
INNER JOIN SID.IDO_A_MBA_TRDG B /* 거래 */ ON B.ACNT_ID = R.ACNT_ID AND B.PRCE_DATE = R.TRDG_DATE /* 20210703 B.PRCE_DATE를 B.TRDG_DATE로 변경 --> 20210708 다시 PRCE_DATE로... */ AND B.TRDG_NO = R.TRDG_NO LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUP_PRODUCT C /* 상품 */ ON C.PRDT_ID = B.ISUS_PRDT_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUS_BANK K /* IDO_A_Entity_Bank */ ON K.BANK_CODE = RLBK_CODE
LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUA_ACNT A ON TRIM(A.ACNT_NO_CRYP) = TRIM(R.RLTV_FNC_ACNT_NO_CRYP)
LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_ADDN_IFMN M ON M.CLNT_ENTY_ID = A.ACNT_OWNR_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_CLIENT_ENTY_ALIAS L ON L.ENTY_ID = M.CLNT_ENTY_ID AND M.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE = L.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE
LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUF_BZPR_BSC D ON D.ENTY_ID = A.ACNT_OWNR_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_COUNTRY E ON E.CNTY_ID = D.NTNY_ID
WHERE 1 = 1 AND R.TRDG_DATE > ( SELECT Prev_Bsns_Date FROM SID.Ido_A_Uue_Insn_Calendar WHERE ENTY_ID = 1 AND TAGT_DATE = #{yyyymmdd} ) AND R.TRDG_DATE <= ( SELECT TAGT_DATE FROM SID.Ido_A_Uue_Insn_Calendar WHERE ENTY_ID = 1 AND HDAY_YN = 'N' AND TAGT_DATE = #{yyyymmdd})
AND R.CANC_YN = 'N' AND R.BANK_PRCE_STAS_CODE = '1' /* 은행처리결과구분코드 */ AND (R.TNFR_TRDG_CODE IN ('101000','102000','201000','204000','204900', '103020','103100') /* 20220523 KJS 추가 */ OR B.TRDG_CODE IN ('300190', '300210', '400450', '400580')) /* ('300190', '300210', '400560', '400580') */ AND R.ACNT_ID IS NOT NULL AND R.TRDG_CODE NOT LIKE 'W%' AND R.OPRN_MNGN_INSN_CODE NOT IN ('0CH', '0VC', '0HS', '0HN', '0NC', 'KBV', 'FBV', 'LTV', 'NAT', 'ATM', '1HS', '1NC')
UNION ALL /* 20220523 KJS : 미약정계좌대체입출금 거래 추가 */
SELECT /*+ FULL(B) PARALLEL(4) */ B.ACNT_ID AS GNL_AC_NO /* 1 계좌ID */ , '*' AS GDS_NO /* 2 상품번호 */ , B.PRCE_DATE AS DL_DT /* 3 거래일자 */ , B.TRDG_NO AS DL_SQ /* 4 거래일련번호 */ , '240' AS CPRTY_TRSNS_OGN_CD /* 5 상대금융기관코드 */ , '삼성증권' AS CPRTY_TRSNS_FOGN_NM /* 6 상대금융기관명 */ , ' ' AS CPRTY_TRSNS_DPRT_CD /* 7 상대금융기관부점코드 */ , NULL AS CPRTY_TRSNS_PST_NO /* 8 상대금융기관우편번호 */ , TRIM(A.ACNT_NO_CRYP) AS CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NO /* 9 상대금융기관계좌번호 */ , TRIM(TO_SINGLE_BYTE(A.ACNT_NAME)) AS CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NM /* 10 상대금융기관계좌명 */
, L.ENTY_ALIS_CRYP AS CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_RNM_NO /* 11 상대금융기관계좌실명번호 */ /*, CASE L.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE WHEN 'BRGN' THEN '03' WHEN 'CRGN' THEN '05' WHEN 'DIRN' THEN '99' WHEN 'FICN' THEN '12' WHEN 'FRIN' THEN '08' WHEN 'FRRN' THEN '07' WHEN 'FSSN' THEN '99' WHEN 'PSPT' THEN '04' WHEN 'SSCN' THEN '01' WHEN 'TXID' THEN '09' ELSE '99' END */ , NVL((SELECT TRNSFRM_CD FROM SSQ.NIC95B WHERE CD = 'L200' AND CD_VL9 = L.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE ), '99') AS CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_RNM_CNFR_CCD /* 12 상대금융기관계좌실명확인구분코드 */ , E.CNTY_CODE AS CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_OWN_NTN_CD /* 13 상대금융기관계좌소유국가코드 */ , SYSDATE AS AML_CRT_DT /* 14 AML생성일자 */
FROM SID.IDO_A_MBA_TRDG B INNER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUA_ACNT A ON B.RLTV_ACNT_ID = A.ACNT_ID
LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_ADDN_IFMN M ON M.CLNT_ENTY_ID = A.ACNT_OWNR_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_CLIENT_ENTY_ALIAS L ON L.ENTY_ID = M.CLNT_ENTY_ID AND M.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE = L.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE
LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUF_BZPR_BSC D ON D.ENTY_ID = A.ACNT_OWNR_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_COUNTRY E ON E.CNTY_ID = D.NTNY_ID
WHERE 1 = 1 AND B.TRDG_CODE IN ('300190', '300160', '400560', '400440') /* 300190.미약정계좌대체입금, 300160.시간외미약정계좌대체입금, 400560.미약정계좌대체출금, 400440.시간외미약정계좌대체출금 */ AND B.PRCE_DATE > ( SELECT Prev_Bsns_Date FROM SID.Ido_A_Uue_Insn_Calendar WHERE ENTY_ID = 1 AND TAGT_DATE = #{yyyymmdd} ) AND B.PRCE_DATE <= ( SELECT TAGT_DATE FROM SID.Ido_A_Uue_Insn_Calendar WHERE ENTY_ID = 1 AND HDAY_YN = 'N' AND TAGT_DATE = #{yyyymmdd})
) Q WHERE 1 = 1 AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT /*+ FULL(Z) PARALLEL(4) */ 1 FROM SSQ.NIC62B Z WHERE Z.DL_DT = Q.DL_DT AND Z.DL_SQ = Q.DL_SQ AND Z.GNL_AC_NO = Q.GNL_AC_NO AND Z.GDS_NO = Q.GDS_NO )
mapper.delete: delete ssq.NIC63B WHERE 1 = 1 AND DL_DT > ( SELECT Prev_Bsns_Date FROM SID.Ido_A_Uue_Insn_Calendar WHERE ENTY_ID = 1 AND TAGT_DATE = #{yyyymmdd} ) AND DL_DT <= ( SELECT TAGT_DATE FROM SID.Ido_A_Uue_Insn_Calendar WHERE ENTY_ID = 1 AND HDAY_YN = 'N' AND TAGT_DATE = #{yyyymmdd})
mapper.insert:
insert INTO SSQ.NIC63B select GNL_AC_NO , DL_DT , DL_SQ , CHCK_STRT_NO , CHCK_END_NO , GDS_NO , ISNG_BNK_NM , ISNG_BRN_NM , CHCK_ISNG_DT , BLL_TYP_AMT , CHCK_AMT , CHCK_KND_CD , IO_CCD , CHCK_B , CNCL_F , AML_CRT_DT ,ISNG_BNK_CD , ISNG_BRN_CD from (SELECT A.ACNT_ID AS GNL_AC_NO /* 1 계좌번호 */ , A.TRDG_DATE AS DL_DT /* 2 거래일자 */ , A.TRDG_NO AS DL_SQ /* 3 거래일련번호 */ , A.NEW_CHCK_NO AS CHCK_STRT_NO /* 4 수표시작번호 */ , NULL AS CHCK_END_NO /* 5 수표종료번호 */ , '*' AS GDS_NO /* 6 상품번호 */ , B.BANK_NAME AS ISNG_BNK_NM /* 7 발행은행명 */ , B1.BANK_BRNH_NAME AS ISNG_BRN_NM /* 8 발행지점명 */ , A.ISSD_DATE AS CHCK_ISNG_DT /* 9 수표발행일자 */ , A.CTBL_CODE AS BLL_TYP_AMT /* 10 권종금액 */ , A.CHCK_AMNT AS CHCK_AMT /* 11 수표금액 */ , '05' AS CHCK_KND_CD /* 12 수표종류코드 */ -- 자기앞수표 , A.RAPA_SECT_CODE AS IO_CCD /* 13 입출구분코드 */ , 1 AS CHCK_B /* 14 수표매수 */ , 'N' AS CNCL_F /* 15 취소여부 */ , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') AS AML_CRT_DT /* 16 AML생성일자 */ , A.BANK_CODE AS ISNG_BNK_CD /* 17 발행은행코드 */ , A.BANK_BNCD AS ISNG_BRN_CD /* 18 발행은행지점코드 */ , row_number() over(partition by A.ACNT_ID, A.TRDG_DATE, A.TRDG_NO , A.NEW_CHCK_NO order by A.ACNT_ID , A.TRDG_DATE, A.TRDG_NO , A.NEW_CHCK_NO, a.ADTL_CLTN_RMBR_SQNO desc ) as cnt FROM SID.IDO_A_MBA_CHCK_INOU A /* IDO_A_수신_수표출납내역 */ , sid.IDO_A_UUS_BANK B /* IDO_A_Entity_Bank */ , sid.IDO_A_UUS_BANK_BRANCH B1 /* IDO_A_Entity_BankBranch */ WHERE 1 =1 /* AND A.LAST_DTA_YN = 'Y' */ /* 20201102 구자성 : 거래내역에 존재하는 수표금액에 대한 수표입출금상세내역이 미존재하는 경우가 있어, 조건 삭제 */ AND A.ACNT_ID > 0
AND A.TRDG_DATE > ( SELECT Prev_Bsns_Date FROM SID.Ido_A_Uue_Insn_Calendar WHERE ENTY_ID = 1 AND TAGT_DATE = #{yyyymmdd} ) AND A.TRDG_DATE <= ( SELECT TAGT_DATE FROM SID.Ido_A_Uue_Insn_Calendar WHERE ENTY_ID = 1 AND HDAY_YN = 'N' AND TAGT_DATE = #{yyyymmdd})
AND A.CHCK_RCPS_RESN_CODE <> '2' /* 수표출납사유코드 2:영업자금 제외 */ AND A.CHCK_RCPS_CHAN_SECT_CODE IN ('0','1') /* 수표출납변경구분코드 0:정상 1:수정 2:삭제 3:자동삭제 */ AND a.BANK_CODE = b.BANK_CODE (+) -- 은행코드 AND a.BANK_CODE = b1.BANK_CODE (+) -- 은행코드 AND A.BANK_BNCD = B1.BANK_BNCD (+) -- 지점코드 ) where cnt = 1
mapper.delete: DELETE C_USER_GROUP_ROLE WHERE USER_ID not in (select user_id from ssq.c_user where CRE_ID is not null ) /* admin과 사용자가 직접등록한 사번은 제외 */
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO C_DEP_INFO ( DEP_ID , PAR_DEP_ID , DEP_TITLE , DEP_DESC , DEP_TP_CD , DISPLAY_DEPTH , DISPLAY_ORDER , CRE_ID , CRE_DT , UPD_ID , UPD_DT ) WITH DPRT_LIST AS ( SELECT A.DTBR_CODE AS L1_CODE , A.DTBR_NAME AS LI_NAME , B.DTBR_CODE AS L2_CODE , B.DTBR_NAME AS L2_NAME , C.DTBR_CODE AS L3_CODE , C.DTBR_NAME AS L3_NAME , D.DTBR_CODE AS L4_CODE , D.DTBR_NAME AS L4_NAME , E.DTBR_CODE AS L5_CODE , E.DTBR_NAME AS L5_NAME , F.DTBR_CODE AS L6_CODE , F.DTBR_NAME AS L6_NAME , G.DTBR_CODE AS L7_CODE , G.DTBR_NAME AS L7_NAME , H.DTBR_CODE AS L8_CODE , H.DTBR_NAME AS L8_NAME , I.DTBR_CODE AS L9_CODE , I.DTBR_NAME AS L9_NAME , E.CLSG_YN AS CLOSE_YN FROM SID.IDO_A_UUE_SAMSUNG_DPRT A , SID.IDO_A_UUE_SAMSUNG_DPRT B , SID.IDO_A_UUE_SAMSUNG_DPRT C , SID.IDO_A_UUE_SAMSUNG_DPRT D , SID.IDO_A_UUE_SAMSUNG_DPRT E , SID.IDO_A_UUE_SAMSUNG_DPRT F , SID.IDO_A_UUE_SAMSUNG_DPRT G , SID.IDO_A_UUE_SAMSUNG_DPRT H , SID.IDO_A_UUE_SAMSUNG_DPRT I WHERE A.dtbr_code = B.UPPR_DTBR_CODE(+) AND B.dtbr_code = C.UPPR_DTBR_CODE(+) AND C.dtbr_code = D.UPPR_DTBR_CODE(+) AND D.dtbr_code = E.UPPR_DTBR_CODE(+) AND E.dtbr_code = F.UPPR_DTBR_CODE(+) AND F.dtbr_code = G.UPPR_DTBR_CODE(+) AND G.dtbr_code = H.UPPR_DTBR_CODE(+) AND H.dtbr_code = I.UPPR_DTBR_CODE(+) AND A.DTBR_CODE = '30000' ) SELECT A.ENTY_ID AS DEP_ID /* 1 지점ID */ , A.PARN_DTBR_ENTY_ID AS PAR_DEP_ID /* 2 상위지점ID */ , TRIM(A.DTBR_NAME) AS DEP_TITLE /* 3 지점명 */ , A.DTBR_CODE AS DEP_DESC /* 4 지점코드(NIC41B의DPRT_CD)*/ , CASE when SUBSTRB(A.DTBR_CODE,1,1) = '1' then 'B' else 'M' END AS DEP_TP_CD /* 5 지점(B)관리점(M)구분코드 */ , X.DISPLAY_DEPTH AS DISPLAY_DEPTH /* 6 레벨 */ , 1 AS DISPLAY_ORDER /* 7 순서 */ , 9999999 AS CRE_ID /* 8 생성자ID */ , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS CRE_DT /* 9 생성일 */ , 9999999 AS UPD_ID /* 10 수정자ID */ , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS UPD_DT /* 11 수정일 */ FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT L1_CODE AS DPRT_CD , LI_NAME AS DPRT_NM , NULL AS HG_RNK_DPRT_CD , 1 AS DISPLAY_DEPTH , 'N' AS FLAG FROM DPRT_LIST WHERE L1_CODE IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT L2_CODE AS DPRT_CD , L2_NAME AS DPRT_NM , L1_CODE AS HG_RNK_DPRT_CD , 2 AS DISPLAY_DEPTH , CASE WHEN SUBSTR(L2_CODE,1,1) = '1' THEN CASE WHEN SUBSTR(L2_CODE,5,1) = '0' THEN CASE WHEN L2_CODE = '10000' THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END ELSE 'N' END ELSE 'N' END AS FLAG FROM DPRT_LIST WHERE L2_CODE IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT L3_CODE AS DPRT_CD , L3_NAME AS DPRT_NM , L2_CODE AS HG_RNK_DPRT_CD , 3 AS DISPLAY_DEPTH , CASE WHEN SUBSTR(L3_CODE,1,1) = '1' THEN CASE WHEN SUBSTR(L3_CODE,5,1) = '0' THEN CASE WHEN L3_CODE = '10000' THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END ELSE 'N' END ELSE 'N' END AS FLAG FROM DPRT_LIST WHERE L3_CODE IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT L4_CODE AS DPRT_CD , L4_NAME AS DPRT_NM , L3_CODE AS HG_RNK_DPRT_CD , 4 AS DISPLAY_DEPTH , CASE WHEN SUBSTR(L4_CODE,1,1) = '1' THEN CASE WHEN SUBSTR(L4_CODE,5,1) = '0' THEN CASE WHEN L4_CODE = '10000' THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END ELSE 'N' END ELSE 'N' END AS FLAG FROM DPRT_LIST WHERE L4_CODE IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT L5_CODE AS DPRT_CD , L5_NAME AS DPRT_NM , L4_CODE AS HG_RNK_DPRT_CD , 5 AS DISPLAY_DEPTH , CASE WHEN SUBSTR(L5_CODE,1,1) = '1' THEN CASE WHEN SUBSTR(L5_CODE,5,1) = '0' THEN CASE WHEN L5_CODE = '10000' THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END ELSE 'N' END ELSE 'N' END AS FLAG FROM DPRT_LIST WHERE L5_CODE IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT L6_CODE AS DPRT_CD , L6_NAME AS DPRT_NM , L5_CODE AS HG_RNK_DPRT_CD , 6 AS DISPLAY_DEPTH , CASE WHEN SUBSTR(L6_CODE,1,1) = '1' THEN CASE WHEN SUBSTR(L6_CODE,5,1) = '0' THEN CASE WHEN L6_CODE = '10000' THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END ELSE 'N' END ELSE 'N' END AS FLAG FROM DPRT_LIST WHERE L6_CODE IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT L7_CODE AS DPRT_CD , L7_NAME AS DPRT_NM , L6_CODE AS HG_RNK_DPRT_CD , 7 AS DISPLAY_DEPTH , CASE WHEN SUBSTR(L7_CODE,1,1) = '1' THEN CASE WHEN SUBSTR(L7_CODE,5,1) = '0' THEN CASE WHEN L7_CODE = '10000' THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END ELSE 'N' END ELSE 'N' END AS FLAG FROM DPRT_LIST WHERE L7_CODE IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT L8_CODE AS DPRT_CD , L8_NAME AS DPRT_NM , L7_CODE AS HG_RNK_DPRT_CD , 8 AS DISPLAY_DEPTH , CASE WHEN SUBSTR(L8_CODE,1,1) = '1' THEN CASE WHEN SUBSTR(L8_CODE,5,1) = '0' THEN CASE WHEN L8_CODE = '10000' THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END ELSE 'N' END ELSE 'N' END AS FLAG FROM DPRT_LIST WHERE L8_CODE IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT L9_CODE AS DPRT_CD , L9_NAME AS DPRT_NM , L8_CODE AS HG_RNK_DPRT_CD , 9 AS DISPLAY_DEPTH , CASE WHEN SUBSTR(L9_CODE,1,1) = '1' THEN CASE WHEN SUBSTR(L9_CODE,5,1) = '0' THEN CASE WHEN L9_CODE = '10000' THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END ELSE 'N' END ELSE 'N' END AS FLAG FROM DPRT_LIST WHERE L9_CODE IS NOT NULL ) X , SID.IDO_A_UUE_SAMSUNG_DPRT A WHERE X.FLAG = 'N' AND X.DPRT_CD = A.DTBR_CODE AND A.CLSG_YN = 'N' /* AND A.CLSG_YN = (CASE WHEN A.DTBR_CODE = '24050' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END)*/ AND X.DPRT_CD NOT IN ('23070','21070')

MERGE INTO SSQ.NIC93B A USING ( SELECT 'B10000' AS JOB_ID , 'MART 적재' AS JOB_NM , SYSDATE AS STRT_DY_TM , SYSDATE AS END_DY_TM , 'Y' AS LAST_YN FROM DUAL ) B ON ( A.JOB_ID = B.JOB_ID) WHEN Matched THEN UPDATE SET A.JOB_NM = B.JOB_NM , A.STRT_DY_TM = B.STRT_DY_TM -- , A.END_DY_TM = B.END_DY_TM , A.LAST_YN = B.LAST_YN
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( JOB_ID , JOB_NM , STRT_DY_TM , END_DY_TM , LAST_YN ) VALUES ( B.JOB_ID , B.JOB_NM , B.STRT_DY_TM , B.END_DY_TM , B.LAST_YN )

MERGE INTO SSQ.NIC93B A USING ( SELECT 'B10000' AS JOB_ID , 'MART 적재' AS JOB_NM , SYSDATE AS STRT_DY_TM , SYSDATE AS END_DY_TM , 'Y' AS LAST_YN FROM DUAL ) B ON ( A.JOB_ID = B.JOB_ID) WHEN Matched THEN UPDATE SET A.JOB_NM = B.JOB_NM --, A.STRT_DY_TM = B.STRT_DY_TM , A.END_DY_TM = B.END_DY_TM , A.LAST_YN = B.LAST_YN
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( JOB_ID , JOB_NM , STRT_DY_TM , END_DY_TM , LAST_YN ) VALUES ( B.JOB_ID , B.JOB_NM , B.STRT_DY_TM , B.END_DY_TM , B.LAST_YN )

INSERT /*+ APPEND PARALLEL(IT 8) */ INTO SSQ.NIC61B IT SELECT /*+ PARALLEL(B 8) */ A.ACNT_ID AS GNL_AC_NO /* 1 계좌번호ID */ , B.TRDG_NO AS DL_SQ /* 2 거래일련번호 */ , B.TRDG_DATE AS DL_DT /* 3 거래일자 */ , SUBSTR(TO_CHAR(B.PRCE_DATE_TIME,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),9,6) AS DL_TM /* 4 거래시간 */ , nvl(C.STND_PRDT_CLSN_CODE,'*') AS GDS_NO /* 5 표준상품분류코드 */ , A.ACNT_OWNR_ID AS RNMCNO /* 6 고객엔티티ID */ , NVL(B11.TRNSFRM_CD,'99') AS DL_CHNNL_CD /* 7 거래채널코드 처리안된ext는 하드코딩 필요(구vp님) */ , B4.DL_TYP_CD AS DL_TYP_CD /* 8 거래종류코드 */ , CASE WHEN (B4.DL_TYP_CD IN ('01','02') AND B.CHCK_RCMY_AMNT = 0) OR (B.TRDG_CODE IN ('302220' /* 체크카드입금 */ ,'302210' /* 체크카드입금 */ ,'302200' /* 체크카드입금 */ ,'402410' /* 체크카드출금 */ ,'402400' /* 체크카드출금 */ ,'402390' /* 체크카드출금 */ ,'404200' /* 체크카드출금 */ ,'404190' /* 체크카드출금 */ ,'404180' /* 체크카드출금 */ ) ) THEN '01' /* 거래종류코드가 01입금 02출금 이면서 수표금액 = 0인 거래를 현금거래로함*/ WHEN B4.DL_TYP_CD IN ('01','02') AND B.CHCK_RCMY_AMNT > 0 THEN '02' /* 거래종류코드가 01입금 02출금 이면서 수표금액 > 0인 거래를 수표거래로함*/ WHEN SUBSTR(TRIM(C.STND_PRDT_CLSN_CODE),1,1) = 'A' THEN '03' /* 표준상품분류코드가 A로 시작하는거래를 주식으로함 */ WHEN SUBSTR(TRIM(C.STND_PRDT_CLSN_CODE),1,1) = 'D' THEN '04' /* 표준상품분류코드가 D로 시작하는거래를 채권으로함 */ WHEN nvl(trim(B.crny_code),'KRW') <> 'KRW' AND TRIM(B.ISUS_PRDT_ID) IS NULL THEN '05' /* CRNY_CODE가 있고(KRW, SPACE 제외), ISUS_PRDT_ID가 없는 경우 외환거래로함 */ WHEN TRIM(C.STND_PRDT_CLSN_CODE) IS NOT NULL AND SUBSTR(TRIM(C.STND_PRDT_CLSN_CODE),1,1) NOT IN ('A','D') THEN '08' /* 기타유가증권 */ WHEN B1.TRDG_NAME LIKE '%이체%' OR B1.TRDG_NAME LIKE '%대체%' THEN '06' /* 대체 */ ELSE '99' /* 기타 */ END AS DL_WY_CD /* 9 거래수단코드 */ , CASE WHEN SUBSTR(B.TRDG_CODE, 1, 1) IN ('1', '2', '3', '4') /* 1:매수 2:매도 3:입금 4:출금 원화환산거래금액계산 */ THEN ROUND(CASE WHEN NVL(TRIM(B.CRNY_CODE),'KRW') = 'KRW' THEN B.BFTX_KRW_TRDG_AMNT ELSE B.BFTX_FRGN_CRNY_TRDG_AMNT * (I.DATA_VALU / I.BAS_SCLG_FCTR) END,0) WHEN SUBSTR(B.TRDG_CODE, 1, 1) IN ('5', '6') /* 5:입고 6:출고 원화환산거래금액계산 */ THEN CASE WHEN NVL(TRIM(CRNY_CODE),'KRW') = 'KRW' THEN B.TRDG_PRCE_QNTY * B.TRDG_DLNG_UNIT_PRIC ELSE (B.TRDG_PRCE_QNTY * B.TRDG_DLNG_UNIT_PRIC) * (I.DATA_VALU / I.BAS_SCLG_FCTR) END ELSE 0 END AS DL_AMT /* 10 원화환산거래금액 */ , CASE WHEN SUBSTR(B.TRDG_CODE, 1, 1) IN ('3', '4') /* 3:입금 4:출금일경우만 금액 - 수표로 현금계산 */ THEN B.BFTX_KRW_TRDG_AMNT - B.CHCK_RCMY_AMNT ELSE 0 END AS CSH /* 11 현금 */ , B.CHCK_RCMY_AMNT AS CHCK_AMT /* 12 수표금액 */ , B.WTHD_BLNC_AMNT AS TFND_RA /* 13 거래후잔액 */ , nvl(trim(B.crny_code),'KRW') AS CRNCY_CD /* 14 통화코드 */ , CASE WHEN NVL(TRIM(B.CRNY_CODE),'KRW') = 'KRW' THEN 1 ELSE CASE WHEN B.STLM_ECRT <> 0 THEN B.STLM_ECRT ELSE (I.DATA_VALU / I.BAS_SCLG_FCTR) END END AS EXCH_R /* 15 환율 */ , CASE WHEN SUBSTR(B.TRDG_CODE, 1, 1) IN ('1', '2', '3', '4') /* 1:매수 2:매도 3:입금 4:출금 원화환산거래금액계산 */ THEN B.BFTX_FRGN_CRNY_TRDG_AMNT /* 외화금액 */ WHEN SUBSTR(B.TRDG_CODE, 1, 1) IN ('5', '6') AND NVL(TRIM(CRNY_CODE),'KRW') <> 'KRW' /* 5:입고 6:출고 이면서 통화코드가 원화가 아닐경우 */ THEN B.TRDG_PRCE_QNTY * B.TRDG_DNOM_AMNT ELSE 0 END AS FCRNCY_DL_AMT /* 16 외화거래금액 */ , NULL AS I_AMT_P_NM /* 17 무통입금자명 */ , NULL AS I_AMT_P_RNM_NO /* 18 무통입금자실명번호 */ , NULL AS I_AMT_P_RNM_NO_CCD /* 19 무통입금자실명번호구분코드 */ , NULL AS I_AMT_P_TEL_NO /* 20 무통입금자전화번호 */ , B23.DTBR_CODE AS HANDLNG_BRN_CD /* 21 취급지점코드 */ , B.PCPR_ID AS L_HNDL_P_ENO /* 22 계정계처리자사번 */ , SYSDATE AS AML_CRT_DT /* 23 AML생성일자 */ , 'BATCH' AS AML_HNDL_P_ENO /* 24 AML처리자사번 */ , NVL(D1.GDS_DIT_CD,'99') AS GDS_DIT_CD /* 25 KOFIU상품분류코드 */ , A.ACNT_NAME AS ACNT_NAME /* 26 계좌주명 */ , NULL AS CASH_TRDG_ACNT_YN /* 27 현금거래계좌여부 */ , B.TRDG_CODE AS TRDG_CODE /* 28 거래코드 */ , B1.DTLS_TRDG_NAME AS DTLS_TRDG_NAME /* 29 거래코드명 */ , B4.FUNS_SCRS_CODE AS FUNS_SCRS_CODE /* 30 자금증권코드 */ , CASE WHEN B.CANC_YN = 'Y' AND B.TRDG_CANC_RESN_CODE = '1' THEN '2' WHEN B.CANC_YN = 'Y' AND B.TRDG_CANC_RESN_CODE = '2' THEN '3' WHEN B.CANC_YN = 'Y' AND B.TRDG_CANC_RESN_CODE = '3' THEN '4' WHEN B.CANC_YN = 'N' OR RTRIM(B.CANC_YN) IS NULL THEN '1' ELSE '-1' END AS TRDG_RSLT_SECT_CODE /* 31 거래결과구분코드 */ , SUBSTR(C.RPRS_ISCD,4,6) AS STND_IS_CD /* 32 거래종목코드 */ , C.PRDT_NAME AS STND_IS_NM /* 33 거래종목명 */ , CASE WHEN SUBSTR(B.TRDG_CODE, 1, 1) IN ('1', '2') /* 1:매수 2:매도 */ THEN B.TRDG_DLNG_UNIT_PRIC ELSE 0 END AS DL_UPRC /* 34 거래매매단가 */ , CASE WHEN SUBSTR(B.TRDG_CODE, 1, 1) IN ('1', '2') /* 1:매수 2:매도 */ THEN B.TRDG_PRCE_QNTY ELSE 0 END AS DL_Q /* 35 거래처리수량 */ , CASE WHEN A1.ERNR_TYPE_CODE IN ('111', '112', '121', '122', '131', '141') THEN 'P' WHEN A1.ERNR_TYPE_CODE IN ('211', '222') THEN 'C' WHEN A1.ERNR_TYPE_CODE IN ('311', '321', '331') THEN 'G' WHEN A1.ERNR_TYPE_CODE IN ('411', '413', '999', '000') THEN 'E' END AS STR_ERNR_TYPE_CODE /* 36 STR소득자유형코드 */ , CASE WHEN NVL(R.TNFR_TRDG_CODE, L.TNFR_TRDG_CODE) IN ('101000','102000') THEN TO_NUMBER(b.TRDG_DATE || RPAD(b.ACNT_ID,20,'0')|| RPAD(b.TRDG_NO,5,'0')|| b.TRDG_CODE) ELSE -1 END AS AML_XTRL_RMTN_PRS_IDNF_NO /* 37 AML외부송금자식별번호 */ , CASE WHEN NVL(R.TNFR_TRDG_CODE, L.TNFR_TRDG_CODE) IN ('201000','204000','204900') THEN TO_NUMBER(b.TRDG_DATE || RPAD(b.ACNT_ID,20,'0')|| RPAD(b.TRDG_NO,5,'0')|| b.TRDG_CODE) ELSE -1 END AS AML_XTRL_RECN_IDNF_NO /* 38 AML외부수신자식별번호 */ , B.RLTV_ACNT_ID AS RLTV_ACNT_ID /* 39 상대계좌ID */ , B.PRCE_DATE AS TRDG_STMN_DATE /* 40 거래기재일자 */ , R.ASPR_RNNO_CRYP AS ASPR_RNNO_CRYP /* 41 의뢰인실명번호암호문 */ , R.RLTV_FNC_ACNT_NO_CRYP AS RLTV_FNC_ACNT_NO_CRYP /* 42 상대은행계좌번호암호문 */ , R.RLTV_BANK_ACNT_NAME AS RLTV_BANK_ACNT_NAME /* 43 상대은행계좌예금주명 */ , R.RLBK_CODE AS RLBK_CODE /* 44 상대은행코드 */ , R1.BANK_NAME AS RLBK_NAME /* 45 상대은행명 */ , B4.TRTY_DTLS_CODE AS TRTY_DTLS_CODE /* 46 거래유형상세코드 */ , CASE SUBSTR(NVL(B.ORGL_PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE,B.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE),1,1) WHEN 'A' THEN CASE WHEN NVL(B.ORGL_PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE,B.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE) IN ('A01', 'A02', 'A03') THEN 'C01' /* 객장 */ WHEN NVL(B.ORGL_PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE,B.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE) IN ('A05', 'A06', 'A07', 'A08', 'A09', 'A10', 'A11', 'A12', 'A13', 'A14', 'A15') THEN 'C12' /* ODS */ WHEN NVL(B.ORGL_PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE,B.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE) IN ('A04') THEN 'C13' /* 자동화기기 */ ELSE '*' END WHEN 'B' THEN 'C02' WHEN 'C' THEN CASE WHEN NVL(B.ORGL_PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE,B.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE) IN ('C01') THEN 'C01' /* 객장 */ WHEN NVL(B.ORGL_PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE,B.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE) IN ('C02','C03') THEN 'C13' /* 자동화기기 */ ELSE 'C03' /* 뱅킹 */ END WHEN 'D' THEN 'C04' WHEN 'E' THEN 'C05' WHEN 'F' THEN 'C06' WHEN 'G' THEN 'C07' WHEN 'H' THEN 'C08' WHEN 'I' THEN 'C09' WHEN 'J' THEN 'C10' WHEN 'K' THEN 'C11' END AS CHNL_CLSN_CODE /* 47 채널대분류코드 */ , CASE A4.ACNT_TYPE_SMAL_CLSN_CODE WHEN 'AA01' THEN 'P01' /* 종합 -> 종합계좌-종합 */ WHEN 'AA02' THEN 'P02' /* 은행연계(종합) -> 종합계좌-은행연계(종합) */ WHEN 'AA03' THEN 'P03' /* 금현물 -> 종합계좌-금현물 */ WHEN 'AA04' THEN 'P11' /* 퇴직연금(IRP) -> 퇴직연금 */ WHEN 'AA05' THEN 'P04' /* 골든에그 -> 종합계좌-골든에그 */ WHEN 'AA06' THEN 'P05' /* 주식전용 -> 종합계좌-주식전용 */ WHEN 'AA07' THEN 'P06' /* 주식ETF적립식 -> 종합계좌-주식ETF적립식 */ WHEN 'AA08' THEN 'P07' /* 랩종합 -> 종합계좌-랩종합 */ WHEN 'AA09' THEN 'P08' /* 개인종합자산관리 -> 종합계좌-개인종합자산관리*/ WHEN 'AA10' THEN 'P11' /* 퇴직연금(DC) -> 퇴직연금 */ WHEN 'AB01' THEN 'P09' /* 선물옵션 -> 선물옵션계좌 */ WHEN 'AC01' THEN 'P12' /* 일반증권저축 -> 저축 */ WHEN 'AC02' THEN 'P12' /* 근로자저축 -> 저축 */ WHEN 'AC03' THEN 'P12' /* 근로자장기저축 -> 저축 */ WHEN 'AC04' THEN 'P12' /* 근로자주식저축 -> 저축 */ WHEN 'AC05' THEN 'P12' /* 근로자우대저축 -> 저축 */ WHEN 'AC06' THEN 'P12' /* 세금우대저축 -> 저축 */ WHEN 'AC07' THEN 'P12' /* 비과세종합저축 -> 저축 */ WHEN 'AC08' THEN 'P12' /* 해외주식투자전용집합투자증권저축 -> 저축 */ WHEN 'AD01' THEN 'P10' /* 투신 -> 투신계좌 */ WHEN 'AD02' THEN 'P12' /* 연금저축 -> 저축 */ WHEN 'BA01' THEN 'P13' /* 포트폴리오 -> 포트폴리오 */ ELSE '*' END AS ACNT_TYPE_CLSN_CODE /* 48 계좌유형분류코드 */ , SUBSTR(C.STND_PRDT_CLSN_CODE,1,1) AS PRDT_CLSN_CODE /* 49 금융상품분류코드 */ , CASE WHEN substr(B.trdg_code,1,1) in ('3','4') then 'S01' /* 계좌입출금 */ WHEN substr(B.trdg_code,1,1) in ('1','2') AND B.ln_type_dtls_code like '4%' THEN 'S02' /* 신용 */ ELSE NULL END AS SERV_CLSN_CODE /* 50 금융서비스분류코드 */ , B21.DTBR_CODE AS MNGG_BRN_CD /* 51 관리지점코드 */ , B22.DTBR_CODE AS PRFT_BRN_CD /* 52 실적지점코드 */ , B.ISUS_PRDT_ID AS ISUS_PRDT_ID /* 53 종목상품ID */ , CASE WHEN SUBSTR(B.TRDG_CODE, 1, 1) IN ('1', '2', '3', '4') /* 1:매수 2:매도 3:입금 4:출금 원화환산거래금액계산 */ THEN ROUND(CASE WHEN NVL(TRIM(B.CRNY_CODE),'KRW') = 'KRW' THEN B.BFTX_KRW_TRDG_AMNT ELSE B.BFTX_FRGN_CRNY_TRDG_AMNT * (I.DATA_VALU / I.BAS_SCLG_FCTR) END,0) WHEN SUBSTR(B.TRDG_CODE, 1, 1) IN ('5', '6') /* 5:입고 6:출고 원화환산거래금액계산 */ THEN CASE WHEN NVL(TRIM(CRNY_CODE),'KRW') = 'KRW' THEN B.TRDG_PRCE_QNTY * B.TRDG_DLNG_UNIT_PRIC ELSE (B.TRDG_PRCE_QNTY * B.TRDG_DLNG_UNIT_PRIC) * (I.DATA_VALU / I.BAS_SCLG_FCTR) END ELSE 0 END / I1.DATA_VALU AS USD_EXCH_AMT /* 54 달러환산금액 */ , 0 AS ADJST_AMT /* 55 정산금액 */ , 0 AS SECBAL_EVAL_AMT /* 56 유가잔고 */ , B.WTHD_BLNC_AMNT AS DPS_AMT /* 57 예수금잔고 */ , 0 AS RCVBL_BAL_AMT /* 58 미수금잔고 */ , 0 AS MLOAN_SLOAN_AMT /* 59 융자대주금 */ , B.FRGN_CRNY_WTHD_BLNC_AMNT AS FRGN_DPS_AMT /* 60 외화예수금잔고금액 */ , CASE WHEN B52.INDV_CORP_CCD = '1' AND B54.INDV_CORP_CCD = '1' THEN '1' WHEN B52.INDV_CORP_CCD = '1' AND B54.INDV_CORP_CCD = '2' THEN '2' WHEN B52.INDV_CORP_CCD = '2' AND B54.INDV_CORP_CCD = '1' THEN '3' WHEN B52.INDV_CORP_CCD = '2' AND B54.INDV_CORP_CCD = '2' THEN '4' ELSE NULL END AS PECO_TRN_CD /* 61 개인법인거래구분코드 */ , CASE WHEN B6.CNTNT IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS BNCC_TRN_YN /* 62 방카슈량스거래여부 */ , CASE WHEN SUBSTR(B.LN_TYPE_DTLS_CODE,1,1) = '4' AND SUBSTR(B.TRDG_CODE,1,1) IN ('1','2') THEN 'Y' WHEN B.TRDG_CODE IN ('301770','301750') THEN 'Y' /* 매도담보대출, 예탁담보대출 */ ELSE 'N' END AS CRDT_TRN_YN /* 63 신용거래여부 */ , B.RCMY_PSBO_DISP_CTNT AS RCMY_PSBO_DISP_CTNT /* 64 입금통장표시내용 */ , B.WTDW_PSBO_DISP_CTNT AS WTDW_PSBO_DISP_CTNT /* 65 출금통장표시내용 */ FROM SID.IDO_A_UUA_ACNT A /* IDO_A_Account_Account */ , SID.IDO_A_UUA_CLIENT_ACNT A1 /* */ , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_ADDN_IFMN A2 /* IDO_A_고객정보_고객부가정보기본 */ , SID.IDO_A_UUN_ACNT_BSC A3 /* IDO_A_마스터데이터_계좌기본 */ , SID.IDO_A_UUN_ACNT_TYPE_CL_DTLS A4 /* IDO_A_마스터데이터_계좌유형분류명세 */ , SID.IDO_A_MBA_TRDG B /* 거래 */ , ( SELECT ACNT_ID, TRDG_DATE, TRDG_NO FROM SID.IDO_A_MBA_TRDG_ADTL WHERE PCPR_IP LIKE 'md%' -- 제외거래 AND TRDG_DATE LIKE #{yyyymmdd}||'%' ) BM /* 안창우 */
, SID.IDO_A_UWB_TRD_CD B1 /* 거래코드상세 */ , ( SELECT CD_Vl9 , TRNSFRM_CD FROM SSQ.NIC95B WHERE CD='M044' ) B11 /* 거래채널코드 변환 */ , SID.IDO_A_UUE_SAMSUNG_DPRT B21 /* 관리지점코드 추출용 */ , SID.IDO_A_UUE_SAMSUNG_DPRT B22 /* 실적지점코드 추출용 */ , SID.IDO_A_UUE_SAMSUNG_DPRT B23 /* 처리지점코드 추출용 */ , SSQ.NIC81B_1 B4 /* FSC 거래코드 */ , SSQ.NIC17B B51 , SSQ.NIC01B B52 , SSQ.NIC17B B53 , SSQ.NIC01B B54 , ( SELECT CNTNT FROM SSQ.NIC92B WHERE CD = 'S019' /* 방카슈랑스계좌 */ ) B6 , SID.IDO_A_UUP_PRODUCT C /* 상품 */ , SID.IDO_A_IRA_STD_PD_CLSN_CD D /* 표준상품분류코드 : 상성증권에서 거래되는 전 상품에 대한 분류 -> 아너스넷 76303 */ , SSQ.NIC45B D1 , ( SELECT G.BSNS_DATE , H.TAGT_CRNY_CODE , G.DATA_VALU , H.BAS_SCLG_FCTR /* 기초환산계수 */ FROM SID.IDO_A_UUM_MARKET_DATA G , SID.IDO_A_UUP_CURRENCY_PAIR H WHERE G.PRIC_TYPE_CODE = 'BKR' /* 가격유형코드(BKR.한국은행고시환율) */ AND G.DATA_VALU_TYPE_CODE = 'XCR' /* 데이터값유형코드(XCR.환율) */ AND G.DATA_SORC_ENTY_ID = 102001 /* 블룸버그 */ AND G.EOD_TYPE_CODE = 'SNP' /* EOD유형코드(EOD.EOD, SNP.스냅샷) */ AND G.PRDT_ID = H.PRDT_ID AND H.BAS_CRNY_CODE = 'KRW' ) I /* 일자별통화별 환율 안창우 */
, ( SELECT G.BSNS_DATE , H.TAGT_CRNY_CODE , G.DATA_VALU FROM SID.IDO_A_UUM_MARKET_DATA G , SID.IDO_A_UUP_CURRENCY_PAIR H WHERE G.PRIC_TYPE_CODE = 'BKR' /* 가격유형코드(BKR.한국은행고시환율) */ AND G.DATA_VALU_TYPE_CODE = 'XCR' /* 데이터값유형코드(XCR.환율) */ AND G.DATA_SORC_ENTY_ID = 102001 /* 블룸버그 */ AND G.EOD_TYPE_CODE = 'SNP' /* EOD유형코드(EOD.EOD, SNP.스냅샷) */ AND G.PRDT_ID = H.PRDT_ID AND H.BAS_CRNY_CODE = 'KRW' AND H.TAGT_CRNY_CODE = 'USD' ) I1 /* 일자별 원화미화환산환율 안창우 */
, ( SELECT A.* FROM SID.IDO_A_MBP_BNKN_TRDG_DTLD A /* IDO_A_이체_뱅킹거래내역 */ , ( SELECT ACNT_ID , TRDG_DATE , TRDG_NO , TRDG_CODE , MAX(LOG_SQNO) AS LOG_SQNO FROM SID.IDO_A_MBP_BNKN_TRDG_DTLD WHERE 1 = 1 AND CANC_YN = 'N' AND BANK_PRCE_STAS_CODE = '1' /* 은행처리결과구분코드 */ AND TRDG_CODE NOT LIKE 'W%' AND TRDG_DATE LIKE #{yyyymmdd}||'%' GROUP BY ACNT_ID , TRDG_DATE , TRDG_NO , TRDG_CODE ) B WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.CANC_YN = 'N' AND A.BANK_PRCE_STAS_CODE = '1' /* 은행처리결과구분코드 */ AND A.TRDG_CODE NOT LIKE 'W%' AND A.TRDG_DATE LIKE #{yyyymmdd}||'%' AND A.ACNT_ID = B.ACNT_ID AND A.TRDG_DATE = B.TRDG_DATE AND A.TRDG_NO = B.TRDG_NO AND A.TRDG_CODE = B.TRDG_CODE AND A.LOG_SQNO = B.LOG_SQNO ) R /* 안창우 */
, SID.IDO_A_UUS_BANK R1 /* IDO_A_Entity_Bank */ , SID.IDO_A_MBP_BNKN_TRRC_LOG L /*IDO_A_이체_뱅킹송수신로그*/ WHERE 1 = 1 AND B.TRDG_DATE LIKE #{yyyymmdd}||'%' AND A.ACNT_ID = B.ACNT_ID AND A.ACNT_ID = A1.ACNT_ID(+) AND A.ACNT_OWNR_ID = A2.CLNT_ENTY_ID AND A.ACNT_ID = A3.ACNT_ID(+) AND A3.ACNT_TYPE_CLSN_CODE = A4.ACNT_TYPE_CLSN_CODE(+) AND B.CANC_YN <> 'Y' AND B.ACNT_TRDG_KIND_CODE <> '14' /* 주석거래(관리점변경,통장기장등) 제외 */ AND SUBSTR(B.TRDG_CODE,1,1) BETWEEN '1' AND '6' /* 매수매도입금출금입고출고 거래만추출 7: 질권설정부분제외 */ AND B.TRDG_CODE = B1.TRDG_CODE(+) AND NVL(B.ORGL_PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE,B.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE) = B11.CD_Vl9(+) AND B.MNGG_BRNH_ENTY_ENTY_ID = B21.ENTY_ID(+) /* 관리점엔티티ID */ AND B.PRFT_CNTR_ENTY_ENTY_ID = B22.ENTY_ID(+) /* 실적점엔티티ID */ AND B.PRBN_ENTY_ID = B23.ENTY_ID(+) /* 처리점엔티티ID */ AND B.TRDG_CODE = B4.TRDG_CODE(+) AND B.ACNT_ID = B51.GNL_AC_NO(+) AND B51.RNMCNO = b52.RNMCNO(+) AND B.RLTV_ACNT_ID = B53.GNL_AC_NO(+) AND B53.RNMCNO = B54.RNMCNO(+) AND B.RLTV_ACNT_ID = B6.CNTNT(+) AND B.ACNT_ID = BM.ACNT_ID(+) /* 거래제외 */ AND B.TRDG_DATE = BM.TRDG_DATE(+) /* 거래제외 */ AND B.TRDG_NO = BM.TRDG_NO(+) /* 거래제외 */ AND BM.ACNT_ID IS NULL /* 거래제외 */ AND B.ISUS_PRDT_ID = C.PRDT_ID(+) AND C.STND_PRDT_CLSN_CODE = D.STND_PRDT_CLSN_CODE(+) AND D.STND_PRDT_CLSN_CODE = D1.GDS_NO(+) AND B.TRDG_DATE = I.BSNS_DATE(+) AND B.CRNY_CODE = I.TAGT_CRNY_CODE(+) AND B.TRDG_DATE = I.BSNS_DATE(+) AND B.CRNY_CODE = I.TAGT_CRNY_CODE(+) AND I.BSNS_DATE = I1.BSNS_DATE(+) AND B.ACNT_ID = R.ACNT_ID(+) AND B.TRDG_DATE = R.TRDG_DATE(+) AND B.TRDG_NO = R.TRDG_NO(+) AND B.TRDG_CODE = R.TRDG_CODE(+) AND R.RLBK_CODE = R1.BANK_CODE(+) AND R.TRDG_DATE = L.TRDG_DATE (+) AND R.OPRN_MNGN_INSN_CODE = L.OPRN_MNGN_INSN_CODE (+) AND R.TRRC_SECT_CODE = L.TRRC_SECT_CODE (+) AND R.BNKN_BSWR_SECT_CODE = L.BNKN_BSWR_SECT_CODE (+) AND R.LOG_SQNO = L.LOG_SQNO (+)

MERGE INTO SSQ.NIC92B A USING (SELECT CD, CNTNT, CD_NM FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT 'M008' AS CD , CASE RISK_DTLS_CODE WHEN '99995' THEN '64201' WHEN '99996' THEN '91249' WHEN '99997' THEN '66199' WHEN '99998' THEN '64919' WHEN '99999' THEN '66199' WHEN 'ZZZZZ' THEN '94990' ELSE RISK_DTLS_CODE END AS CNTNT , MAX(CASE RISK_DTLS_CODE WHEN '99995' THEN '신탁업 및 집합 투자업' WHEN '99996' THEN '기타 사행시설 관리 및 운영업' WHEN '99997' THEN '그 외 기타 금융 지원 서비스업' WHEN '99998' THEN '그 외 기타 여신 금융업' WHEN '99999' THEN '그 외 기타 금융 지원 서비스업' WHEN 'ZZZZZ' THEN '그 외 기타 협회 및 단체' ELSE NOTE_CTNT END) AS CD_NM FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_RISK_INDR_MN WHERE RISK_LARG_CLSN_CODE = 'CLNT' AND RISK_MDUM_CLSN_CODE = 'INKN' GROUP BY 'M008' , CASE RISK_DTLS_CODE WHEN '99995' THEN '64201' WHEN '99996' THEN '91249' WHEN '99997' THEN '66199' WHEN '99998' THEN '64919' WHEN '99999' THEN '66199' WHEN 'ZZZZZ' THEN '94990' ELSE RISK_DTLS_CODE END ORDER BY 2 ) GROUP BY CD, CNTNT, CD_NM ) B ON ( A.CD = B.CD AND A.CNTNT = B.CNTNT ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET A.CD_NM = B.CD_NM , A.HNDL_DY_TM = SYSDATE WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( A.CD , A.CNTNT , A.CD_NM , A.USE_F , A.CD_RNK_SQ , A.GRP_CD , A.HNDL_DY_TM , A.HNDL_P_ENO ) VALUES ( B.CD , B.CNTNT , B.CD_NM , 'Y' , 1 , NULL , SYSDATE , 99999999 )

MERGE INTO SSQ.NIC95B A USING ( SELECT 'M044' AS CD /* 1 코드 */ , CHNL_SECT_CODE AS CD_VL9 /* 2 코드값9 */ , ' ' AS TRNSFRM_CD /* 3 변환코드 */ , '채널구분코드(KOFIU)' AS CD_NM /* 4 코드명 */ , TRIM(CHNL_SECT_NAME) AS CD_VL_NM /* 5 코드값명 */ , ' ' AS TRNSFRM_CD_EXPL /* 6 변환코드설명 */ , SYSDATE AS HNDL_DY_TM /* 7 처리일시 */ , 0 AS HNDL_P_ENO /* 8 처리자사번 */ /* 9 사용여부 */ FROM SID.IDO_A_UWB_CHANNEL_CD ) B ON ( A.CD = B.CD AND A.CD_VL9 = B.CD_VL9 ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET A.CD_VL_NM = B.CD_VL_NM /* 5 코드값명 */ , A.HNDL_DY_TM = B.HNDL_DY_TM /* 7 처리일시 */ WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( CD /* 1 코드 */ , CD_VL9 /* 2 코드값9 */ , TRNSFRM_CD /* 3 변환코드 */ , CD_NM /* 4 코드명 */ , CD_VL_NM /* 5 코드값명 */ , TRNSFRM_CD_EXPL /* 6 변환코드설명 */ , HNDL_DY_TM /* 7 처리일시 */ , HNDL_P_ENO /* 8 처리자사번 */ , USE_YN /* 9 사용여부 */ ) VALUES ( B.CD /* 1 코드 */ , B.CD_VL9 /* 2 코드값9 */ , B.TRNSFRM_CD /* 3 변환코드 */ , B.CD_NM /* 4 코드명 */ , B.CD_VL_NM /* 5 코드값명 */ , B.TRNSFRM_CD_EXPL /* 6 변환코드설명 */ , B.HNDL_DY_TM /* 7 처리일시 */ , B.HNDL_P_ENO /* 8 처리자사번 */ , 'N' /* 9 사용여부 */ )
